IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. HAS-CLOSE-ELEMENTS.

       ENVIRONMENT DIVISION.
       
       INPUT-OUTPUT SECTION.

       DATA DIVISION.

       LINKAGE SECTION.

       01 LINKED-ITEMS.
           05 L-NUMBERS OCCURS 5 TIMES INDEXED BY NI COMP-2.
           05 L-THRESHOLD COMP-2.
           05 RESULT PIC 9.

       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.

       01 WS-INDEXES.
           05 I PIC 9(4) VALUE 1.
           05 J PIC 9(4) VALUE 1.

       01 WS-DISTANCE COMP-2.

       PROCEDURE DIVISION USING LINKED-ITEMS.

       MAIN-LOGIC.
           PERFORM VARYING I FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL I > 5
               PERFORM VARYING J FROM I BY 1 UNTIL J > 5
                   IF J > I
                       COMPUTE WS-DISTANCE = FUNCTION ABS(L-NUMBERS(I) - L-NUMBERS(J))
                       IF WS-DISTANCE < L-THRESHOLD
                           MOVE 1 TO RESULT
                           GO TO END-PROGRAM
                       END-IF
                   END-IF
               END-PERFORM
           END-PERFORM
           MOVE 0 TO RESULT
           GO TO END-PROGRAM.

       END-PROGRAM.
           EXIT PROGRAM.

       END PROGRAM HAS-CLOSE-ELEMENTS.

IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. SEPARATE-PAREN-GROUPS.

       ENVIRONMENT DIVISION.
       
       INPUT-OUTPUT SECTION.

       DATA DIVISION.

       LINKAGE SECTION.

       01 LINKED-ITEMS.
           05 L-PAREN-STRING PIC X(100).
           05 RESULT OCCURS 100 TIMES INDEXED BY NI PIC X(100).



       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       01 WS-CURRENT-STRING PIC X(100) VALUE SPACES.
       01 WS-CURRENT-DEPTH PIC 9(3) VALUE 0.
       01 WS-INDEX PIC 9(3) VALUE 1.
       01 WS-CHAR PIC X.
       01 WS-RESULT-COUNT PIC 9(3) VALUE 0.

       PROCEDURE DIVISION USING LINKED-ITEMS.
       MAIN-LOGIC.
           PERFORM VARYING WS-INDEX FROM 1 BY 1
               UNTIL WS-INDEX > FUNCTION LENGTH(L-PAREN-STRING)
               MOVE L-PAREN-STRING(WS-INDEX:1) TO WS-CHAR
               IF WS-CHAR = '('
                   ADD 1 TO WS-CURRENT-DEPTH
                   STRING WS-CURRENT-STRING DELIMITED BY SIZE
                          WS-CHAR DELIMITED BY SIZE
                          INTO WS-CURRENT-STRING
               ELSE IF WS-CHAR = ')'
                   SUBTRACT 1 FROM WS-CURRENT-DEPTH
                   STRING WS-CURRENT-STRING DELIMITED BY SIZE
                          WS-CHAR DELIMITED BY SIZE
                          INTO WS-CURRENT-STRING
                   IF WS-CURRENT-DEPTH = 0
                       ADD 1 TO WS-RESULT-COUNT
                       MOVE WS-CURRENT-STRING TO RESULT(WS-RESULT-COUNT)
                       MOVE SPACES TO WS-CURRENT-STRING
                   END-IF
               END-IF
           END-PERFORM
           GOBACK.
       END PROGRAM SEPARATE-PAREN-GROUPS.

IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. TRUNCATE-NUMBER.

       ENVIRONMENT DIVISION.
       
       INPUT-OUTPUT SECTION.

       DATA DIVISION.

       LINKAGE SECTION.

       01 LINKED-ITEMS.
           05 L-NUMBER COMP-2.
           05 RESULT COMP-2.



       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       
       PROCEDURE DIVISION USING LINKED-ITEMS.
           COMPUTE RESULT = FUNCTION MOD(L-NUMBER, 1.0)
           GOBACK.
       END PROGRAM TRUNCATE-NUMBER.

IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. BELOW-ZERO.

       ENVIRONMENT DIVISION.
       
       INPUT-OUTPUT SECTION.

       DATA DIVISION.

       LINKAGE SECTION.

       01 LINKED-ITEMS.
           05 L-OPERATIONS OCCURS 8 TIMES INDEXED BY NI PIC S9(10).
           05 RESULT PIC 9.

       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       01 WS-BALANCE PIC S9(10) VALUE 0.
       01 WS-INDEX PIC 9(2) VALUE 1.

       PROCEDURE DIVISION USING LINKED-ITEMS.
       MAIN-LOGIC.
           PERFORM VARYING WS-INDEX FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL WS-INDEX > 8
               ADD L-OPERATIONS(WS-INDEX) TO WS-BALANCE
               IF WS-BALANCE < 0
                   MOVE 1 TO RESULT
                   EXIT PERFORM
               END-IF
           END-PERFORM
           IF RESULT = 0
               MOVE 0 TO RESULT
           END-IF
           GOBACK.
       END PROGRAM BELOW-ZERO.

IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. INTERSPERSE.

       ENVIRONMENT DIVISION.
       
       INPUT-OUTPUT SECTION.

       DATA DIVISION.

       LINKAGE SECTION.

       01 LINKED-ITEMS.
           05 L-NUMBERS OCCURS 3 TIMES INDEXED BY NI PIC S9(10).
           05 L-DELIMETER PIC S9(10).
           05 RESULT OCCURS 100 TIMES INDEXED BY NJ PIC S9(10).



       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       01 WS-RESULT-COUNT PIC 9(3) VALUE 0.
       01 WS-INDEX PIC 9(3) VALUE 0.
       01 WS-DELIMETER PIC S9(10) VALUE 0.
       01 WS-NUMBERS OCCURS 3 TIMES INDEXED BY WS-NI PIC S9(10).
       01 WS-RESULT OCCURS 100 TIMES INDEXED BY WS-NJ PIC S9(10).

       PROCEDURE DIVISION USING LINKED-ITEMS.
       MAIN-LOGIC.
           MOVE L-DELIMETER TO WS-DELIMETER.
           PERFORM VARYING WS-INDEX FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL WS-INDEX > 3
               MOVE L-NUMBERS(WS-INDEX) TO WS-NUMBERS(WS-INDEX)
           END-PERFORM.

           IF WS-RESULT-COUNT = 0
               DISPLAY "[]"
           ELSE
               PERFORM VARYING WS-INDEX FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL WS-INDEX > WS-RESULT-COUNT
                   DISPLAY WS-RESULT(WS-INDEX)
               END-PERFORM
           END-IF.

           STOP RUN.
       END PROGRAM INTERSPERSE.

IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. FILTER-BY-SUBSTRING.

       ENVIRONMENT DIVISION.
       
       INPUT-OUTPUT SECTION.

       DATA DIVISION.

       LINKAGE SECTION.

       01 LINKED-ITEMS.
           05 L-STRINGS OCCURS 3 TIMES INDEXED BY NI PIC X(100).
           05 L-SUBSTRING PIC X(100).
           05 RESULT OCCURS 100 TIMES INDEXED BY NJ PIC X(100).



       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       
       01 WS-INDEXES.
           05 WS-INDEX-NI PIC 9(3) VALUE 1.
           05 WS-INDEX-NJ PIC 9(3) VALUE 1.
           05 WS-INDEX-RESULT PIC 9(3) VALUE 1.

       01 WS-STRING PIC X(100).
       01 WS-SUBSTRING PIC X(100).
       01 WS-RESULT PIC X(100).
       01 WS-FOUND PIC X VALUE 'N'.

       PROCEDURE DIVISION USING LINKED-ITEMS.

       MAIN-PROCEDURE.
           MOVE L-SUBSTRING TO WS-SUBSTRING.
           PERFORM VARYING WS-INDEX-NI FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL WS-INDEX-NI > 3
               MOVE L-STRINGS(WS-INDEX-NI) TO WS-STRING
               MOVE 'N' TO WS-FOUND
               PERFORM CHECK-STRING
               IF WS-FOUND = 'Y'
                   MOVE WS-STRING TO WS-RESULT
                   MOVE WS-RESULT TO RESULT(WS-INDEX-RESULT)
                   ADD 1 TO WS-INDEX-RESULT
               END-IF
           END-PERFORM
           DISPLAY "Result: "
           PERFORM VARYING WS-INDEX-RESULT FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL WS-INDEX-RESULT > 100
               IF RESULT(WS-INDEX-RESULT) NOT = SPACES
                   DISPLAY RESULT(WS-INDEX-RESULT)
               END-IF
           END-PERFORM
           GOBACK.

       CHECK-STRING.
           IF WS-STRING = SPACES
               MOVE 'N' TO WS-FOUND
           ELSE
               IF WS-STRING(1:LENGTH OF WS-SUBSTRING) = WS-SUBSTRING
                   MOVE 'Y' TO WS-FOUND
               ELSE
                   MOVE 'N' TO WS-FOUND
               END-IF
           END-IF
           EXIT.

       END PROGRAM FILTER-BY-SUBSTRING.

IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. SUM-PRODUCT.

       ENVIRONMENT DIVISION.
       
       INPUT-OUTPUT SECTION.

       DATA DIVISION.

       LINKAGE SECTION.

       01 LINKED-ITEMS.
           05 L-NUMBERS OCCURS 4 TIMES INDEXED BY NI PIC S9(10).
           05 RESULT OCCURS 100 TIMES INDEXED BY NJ PIC S9(10).



       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       
       01 WS-SUM PIC S9(10) VALUE 0.
       01 WS-PRODUCT PIC S9(10) VALUE 1.
       01 WS-INDEX PIC 9(2) VALUE 1.
       01 WS-RESULT OCCURS 2 TIMES INDEXED BY WS-RESULT-INDEX.
           05 WS-RESULT-ITEM PIC S9(10).

       PROCEDURE DIVISION USING LINKED-ITEMS.
       MAIN-LOGIC.
           PERFORM VARYING WS-INDEX FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL WS-INDEX > 4
               ADD L-NUMBERS(WS-INDEX) TO WS-SUM
               MULTIPLY WS-PRODUCT BY L-NUMBERS(WS-INDEX) GIVING WS-PRODUCT
           END-PERFORM
           MOVE WS-SUM TO WS-RESULT(1)
           MOVE WS-PRODUCT TO WS-RESULT(2)
           DISPLAY "Result: " WS-RESULT(1) ", " WS-RESULT(2)
           GOBACK.
       END PROGRAM SUM-PRODUCT.

IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. ROLLING-MAX.

       ENVIRONMENT DIVISION.
       
       INPUT-OUTPUT SECTION.

       DATA DIVISION.

       LINKAGE SECTION.

       01 LINKED-ITEMS.
           05 L-NUMBERS OCCURS 4 TIMES INDEXED BY NI PIC S9(10).
           05 RESULT OCCURS 100 TIMES INDEXED BY NJ PIC S9(10).



       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       01 WS-ROLLING-MAX PIC S9(10) VALUE 0.
       01 WS-INDEX PIC 9(2) VALUE 1.
       01 WS-RESULT-COUNT PIC 9(2) VALUE 0.
       01 WS-RESULT OCCURS 100 TIMES INDEXED BY NJ PIC S9(10).

       PROCEDURE DIVISION USING LINKED-ITEMS.
       MAIN-PROCEDURE.
           IF L-NUMBERS(1) = 0
               DISPLAY "Result: []"
               GOBACK
           END-IF

           MOVE L-NUMBERS(1) TO WS-ROLLING-MAX
           MOVE WS-ROLLING-MAX TO WS-RESULT(1)
           ADD 1 TO WS-RESULT-COUNT

           PERFORM VARYING WS-INDEX FROM 2 BY 1 UNTIL WS-INDEX > 4
               IF L-NUMBERS(WS-INDEX) > WS-ROLLING-MAX
                   MOVE L-NUMBERS(WS-INDEX) TO WS-ROLLING-MAX
               END-IF
               ADD 1 TO WS-RESULT-COUNT
               MOVE WS-ROLLING-MAX TO WS-RESULT(WS-RESULT-COUNT)
           END-PERFORM

           DISPLAY "Result: ["
           PERFORM VARYING NJ FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL NJ > WS-RESULT-COUNT
               DISPLAY WS-RESULT(NJ) WITH NO ADVANCING
               IF NJ < WS-RESULT-COUNT
                   DISPLAY ", " WITH NO ADVANCING
               END-IF
           END-PERFORM
           DISPLAY "]"

           GOBACK.
       END PROGRAM ROLLING-MAX.

IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. STRING-XOR.

       ENVIRONMENT DIVISION.
       
       INPUT-OUTPUT SECTION.

       DATA DIVISION.

       LINKAGE SECTION.

       01 LINKED-ITEMS.
           05 L-A PIC X(100).
           05 L-B PIC X(100).
           05 RESULT PIC X(100).

       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       01 WS-INDEX PIC 9(3) VALUE 1.
       01 WS-LEN PIC 9(3) VALUE 0.
       01 WS-CHAR-A PIC X.
       01 WS-CHAR-B PIC X.
       01 WS-CHAR-RESULT PIC X.

       PROCEDURE DIVISION USING LINKED-ITEMS.
       MAIN-LOGIC.
           MOVE FUNCTION LENGTH(L-A) TO WS-LEN.
           PERFORM VARYING WS-INDEX FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL WS-INDEX > WS-LEN
               MOVE L-A(WS-INDEX:1) TO WS-CHAR-A
               MOVE L-B(WS-INDEX:1) TO WS-CHAR-B
               IF WS-CHAR-A = WS-CHAR-B
                   MOVE "0" TO WS-CHAR-RESULT
               ELSE
                   MOVE "1" TO WS-CHAR-RESULT
               END-IF
               MOVE WS-CHAR-RESULT TO RESULT(WS-INDEX:1)
           END-PERFORM.
           GOBACK.
       END PROGRAM STRING-XOR.

IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. LONGEST.

       ENVIRONMENT DIVISION.
       
       INPUT-OUTPUT SECTION.

       DATA DIVISION.

       LINKAGE SECTION.

       01 LINKED-ITEMS.
           05 L-STRINGS OCCURS 3 TIMES INDEXED BY NI PIC X(100).
           05 RESULT PIC X(100).



       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       
       01 WS-STRINGS.
           05 WS-STRING OCCURS 3 TIMES INDEXED BY I PIC X(100).
           05 WS-RESULT PIC X(100).
           05 WS-EMPTY-FLAG PIC X(1) VALUE 'N'.
           05 WS-INDEX PIC 9(2) VALUE 1.
           05 WS-MAX-LENGTH PIC 9(3) VALUE 0.
           05 WS-CURRENT-LENGTH PIC 9(3) VALUE 0.

       PROCEDURE DIVISION USING LINKED-ITEMS.
       MAIN-LOGIC.
           PERFORM INITIALIZE-STRINGS
           PERFORM FIND-LONGEST-STRING
           MOVE WS-RESULT TO RESULT
           GOBACK.

       INITIALIZE-STRINGS.
           MOVE 'N' TO WS-EMPTY-FLAG
           MOVE 1 TO WS-INDEX
           MOVE 0 TO WS-MAX-LENGTH
           MOVE 0 TO WS-CURRENT-LENGTH
           PERFORM VARYING I FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL I > 3
               MOVE L-STRINGS(I) TO WS-STRING(I)
               IF L-STRINGS(I) = SPACES
                   MOVE 'Y' TO WS-EMPTY-FLAG
               END-IF
           END-PERFORM.

       FIND-LONGEST-STRING.
           IF WS-EMPTY-FLAG = 'Y'
               MOVE SPACES TO WS-RESULT
           ELSE
               MOVE WS-STRING(1) TO WS-RESULT
               MOVE FUNCTION LENGTH(WS-STRING(1)) TO WS-MAX-LENGTH
               PERFORM VARYING I FROM 2 BY 1 UNTIL I > 3
                   MOVE FUNCTION LENGTH(WS-STRING(I)) TO WS-CURRENT-LENGTH
                   IF WS-CURRENT-LENGTH > WS-MAX-LENGTH
                       MOVE WS-STRING(I) TO WS-RESULT
                       MOVE WS-CURRENT-LENGTH TO WS-MAX-LENGTH
                   END-IF
               END-PERFORM
           END-IF.

       END PROGRAM LONGEST.

IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. GREATEST-COMMON-DIVISOR.

       ENVIRONMENT DIVISION.
       
       INPUT-OUTPUT SECTION.

       DATA DIVISION.

       LINKAGE SECTION.

       01 LINKED-ITEMS.
           05 L-A PIC S9(10).
           05 L-B PIC S9(10).
           05 RESULT PIC S9(10).



       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       
       01 WS-A PIC S9(10).
       01 WS-B PIC S9(10).
       01 WS-RESULT PIC S9(10).

       PROCEDURE DIVISION USING LINKED-ITEMS.
       MAIN-LOGIC.
           MOVE L-A TO WS-A.
           MOVE L-B TO WS-B.
           PERFORM GCD-LOGIC.
           MOVE WS-RESULT TO RESULT.
           GOBACK.

       GCD-LOGIC.
           IF WS-A = 0 OR WS-B = 0 THEN
               MOVE WS-A TO WS-RESULT
           ELSE
               IF WS-A = WS-B THEN
                   MOVE WS-A TO WS-RESULT
               ELSE
                   IF WS-A > WS-B THEN
                       COMPUTE WS-A = FUNCTION MOD(WS-A, WS-B)
                       PERFORM GCD-LOGIC
                   ELSE
                       COMPUTE WS-B = FUNCTION MOD(WS-B, WS-A)
                       PERFORM GCD-LOGIC
                   END-IF
               END-IF
           END-IF.
       END PROGRAM GREATEST-COMMON-DIVISOR.

IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. ALL-PREFIXES.

       ENVIRONMENT DIVISION.
       
       INPUT-OUTPUT SECTION.

       DATA DIVISION.

       LINKAGE SECTION.

       01 LINKED-ITEMS.
           05 L-STRING PIC X(100).
           05 RESULT OCCURS 100 TIMES INDEXED BY NI PIC X(100).



       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       01 WS-STRING PIC X(100).
       01 WS-RESULT OCCURS 100 TIMES INDEXED BY WS-INDEX.
           05 WS-PREFIX PIC X(100).
       01 WS-LENGTH PIC 9(3) VALUE 0.
       01 WS-I PIC 9(3) VALUE 0.

       PROCEDURE DIVISION USING LINKED-ITEMS.
       MAIN-PROCEDURE.
           MOVE L-STRING TO WS-STRING.
           COMPUTE WS-LENGTH = FUNCTION LENGTH(WS-STRING).
           PERFORM VARYING WS-I FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL WS-I > WS-LENGTH
               MOVE WS-STRING(1:WS-I) TO WS-PREFIX(WS-INDEX)
               ADD 1 TO WS-INDEX
           END-PERFORM.
           MOVE WS-RESULT TO RESULT.
           GOBACK.
       END PROGRAM ALL-PREFIXES.

IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. STRING-SEQUENCE.

       ENVIRONMENT DIVISION.
       
       INPUT-OUTPUT SECTION.

       DATA DIVISION.

       LINKAGE SECTION.

       01 LINKED-ITEMS.
           05 L-N PIC S9(10).
           05 RESULT PIC X(100).



       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       01 WS-INDEX PIC S9(10) VALUE 0.
       01 WS-STRING PIC X(100) VALUE SPACES.
       01 WS-NUMBER PIC S9(10) VALUE 0.
       01 WS-SPACE PIC X VALUE SPACE.

       PROCEDURE DIVISION USING LINKED-ITEMS.
       MAIN-LOGIC.
           MOVE 0 TO WS-INDEX.
           MOVE SPACES TO WS-STRING.
           PERFORM VARYING WS-INDEX FROM 0 BY 1 UNTIL WS-INDEX > L-N
               MOVE WS-INDEX TO WS-NUMBER
               STRING WS-STRING DELIMITED BY SIZE
                      WS-NUMBER DELIMITED BY SIZE
                      WS-SPACE DELIMITED BY SIZE
                      INTO WS-STRING
               END-STRING
           END-PERFORM.
           MOVE WS-STRING TO RESULT.
           GOBACK.
       END PROGRAM STRING-SEQUENCE.

IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. COUNT-DISTINCT-CHARACTERS.

       ENVIRONMENT DIVISION.
       
       INPUT-OUTPUT SECTION.

       DATA DIVISION.

       LINKAGE SECTION.

       01 LINKED-ITEMS.
           05 L-STRING PIC X(100).
           05 RESULT PIC S9(10).



       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       01 WS-STRING PIC X(100).
       01 WS-SET OCCURS 256 TIMES PIC X.
       01 WS-SET-COUNT PIC S9(10) VALUE 0.
       01 WS-INDEX PIC S9(10) VALUE 0.
       01 WS-CHAR PIC X.
       01 WS-LOWER-CHAR PIC X.

       PROCEDURE DIVISION USING LINKED-ITEMS.
       MAIN-LOGIC.
           MOVE L-STRING TO WS-STRING.
           PERFORM VARYING WS-INDEX FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL WS-INDEX > FUNCTION LENGTH(WS-STRING)
               MOVE WS-STRING(WS-INDEX:1) TO WS-CHAR
               MOVE FUNCTION LOWER-CASE(WS-CHAR) TO WS-LOWER-CHAR
               IF WS-LOWER-CHAR NOT = SPACE
                   IF WS-SET(ORD(WS-LOWER-CHAR)) = SPACE
                       ADD 1 TO WS-SET-COUNT
                       MOVE WS-LOWER-CHAR TO WS-SET(ORD(WS-LOWER-CHAR))
                   END-IF
               END-IF
           END-PERFORM.
           MOVE WS-SET-COUNT TO RESULT.
           GOBACK.
       END PROGRAM COUNT-DISTINCT-CHARACTERS.

               IF WS-TEMP-STRING-CHAR = SPACE
                   CONTINUE
               ELSE
                   ADD 1 TO WS-NOTE-COUNT

                   EVALUATE WS-TEMP-NOTE
                       WHEN "o"

       MAIN-PROCEDURE.
           MOVE L-MUSIC-STRING TO WS-MUSIC-STRING.
           MOVE 0 TO WS-NOTE-COUNT.
           MOVE 0 TO WS-INDEX-RESULT.
           MOVE 0 TO WS-TEMP-STRING-LEN.
           MOVE 0 TO WS-TEMP-STRING-POS.
           MOVE 0 TO WS-TEMP-STRING-CHAR-POS.

           PERFORM VARYING WS-TEMP-STRING-POS FROM 1 BY 1
               UNTIL WS-TEMP-STRING-POS > FUNCTION LENGTH(WS-MUSIC-STRING)
               MOVE WS-MUSIC-STRING(WS-TEMP-STRING-POS:1) TO WS-TEMP-STRING-CHAR
               IF WS-TEMP-STRING-CHAR = SPACE
                   CONTINUE
               ELSE
                   ADD 1 TO WS-TEMP-STRING-LEN
                   MOVE WS-TEMP-STRING-CHAR TO WS-TEMP-STRING(WS-TEMP-STRING-LEN:1)
               END-IF
           END-PERFORM.

           PERFORM VARYING WS-TEMP-STRING-CHAR-POS FROM 1 BY 1
               UNTIL WS-TEMP-STRING-CHAR-POS > WS-TEMP-STRING-LEN
               MOVE WS-TEMP-STRING(WS-TEMP-STRING-CHAR-POS:1) TO WS-TEMP-STRING-CHAR
               IF WS-TEMP-STRING-CHAR = SPACE
                   CONTINUE
               ELSE
                   ADD 1 TO WS-NOTE-COUNT
                   MOVE WS-TEMP-STRING(WS-TEMP-STRING-CHAR-POS:3) TO WS-TEMP-NOTE
                   EVALUATE WS-TEMP-NOTE
                       WHEN "o"
                           ADD 1 TO WS-INDEX-RESULT
                           MOVE 4 TO WS-RESULT(WS-INDEX-RESULT)
                       WHEN "o|"
                           ADD 1 TO WS-INDEX-RESULT
                           MOVE 2 TO WS-RESULT(WS-INDEX-RESULT)
                       WHEN ".|"
                           ADD 1 TO WS-INDEX-RESULT
                           MOVE 1 TO WS-RESULT(WS-INDEX-RESULT)
                   END-EVALUATE
               END-IF
           END-PERFORM.

           MOVE WS-INDEX-RESULT TO WS-NOTE-COUNT.
           MOVE WS-RESULT TO RESULT.
           GOBACK.
       END PROGRAM PARSE-MUSIC.

IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. HOW-MANY-TIMES.

       ENVIRONMENT DIVISION.
       
       INPUT-OUTPUT SECTION.

       DATA DIVISION.

       LINKAGE SECTION.

       01 LINKED-ITEMS.
           05 L-STRING PIC X(100).
           05 L-SUBSTRING PIC X(100).
           05 RESULT PIC S9(10).



       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       
       01 WS-STRING PIC X(100).
       01 WS-SUBSTRING PIC X(100).
       01 WS-STRING-LEN PIC 9(3).
       01 WS-SUBSTRING-LEN PIC 9(3).
       01 WS-TIMES PIC S9(10) VALUE 0.
       01 WS-I PIC 9(3).
       01 WS-START PIC 9(3).
       01 WS-END PIC 9(3).
       01 WS-SUBSTRING-COUNT PIC 9(3).
       01 WS-TEMP-STRING PIC X(100).

       PROCEDURE DIVISION USING LINKED-ITEMS.
       MAIN-LOGIC.
           MOVE L-STRING TO WS-STRING.
           MOVE L-SUBSTRING TO WS-SUBSTRING.
           COMPUTE WS-STRING-LEN = FUNCTION LENGTH(WS-STRING).
           COMPUTE WS-SUBSTRING-LEN = FUNCTION LENGTH(WS-SUBSTRING).
           COMPUTE WS-SUBSTRING-COUNT = WS-STRING-LEN - WS-SUBSTRING-LEN + 1.

           PERFORM VARYING WS-I FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL WS-I > WS-SUBSTRING-COUNT
               COMPUTE WS-START = WS-I
               COMPUTE WS-END = WS-I + WS-SUBSTRING-LEN - 1
               MOVE WS-STRING(WS-START:WS-SUBSTRING-LEN) TO WS-TEMP-STRING
               IF WS-TEMP-STRING = WS-SUBSTRING
                   ADD 1 TO WS-TIMES
               END-IF
           END-PERFORM.

           MOVE WS-TIMES TO RESULT.
           GOBACK.
       END PROGRAM HOW-MANY-TIMES.

IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. FIND-CLOSEST-ELEMENTS.

       ENVIRONMENT DIVISION.
       
       INPUT-OUTPUT SECTION.

       DATA DIVISION.

       LINKAGE SECTION.

       01 LINKED-ITEMS.
           05 L-NUMBERS OCCURS 6 TIMES INDEXED BY NI COMP-2.
           05 RESULT OCCURS 100 TIMES INDEXED BY NJ COMP-2.



       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       01 WS-CLOSEST-PAIR.
           05 WS-CLOSEST-NUM1 COMP-2.
           05 WS-CLOSEST-NUM2 COMP-2.
       01 WS-DISTANCE COMP-2 VALUE 0.
       01 WS-I COMP-2.
       01 WS-J COMP-2.
       01 WS-TEMP COMP-2.
       01 WS-SIZE COMP-2 VALUE 6.

       PROCEDURE DIVISION USING LINKED-ITEMS.
       MAIN-PROCEDURE.
           MOVE L-NUMBERS(1) TO WS-CLOSEST-NUM1.
           MOVE L-NUMBERS(2) TO WS-CLOSEST-NUM2.
           COMPUTE WS-DISTANCE = FUNCTION ABS(WS-CLOSEST-NUM2 - WS-CLOSEST-NUM1).

           PERFORM VARYING WS-I FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL WS-I > WS-SIZE
               PERFORM VARYING WS-J FROM WS-I BY 1 UNTIL WS-J > WS-SIZE
                   IF WS-J > WS-I
                       COMPUTE WS-TEMP = FUNCTION ABS(L-NUMBERS(WS-J) - L-NUMBERS(WS-I))
                       IF WS-TEMP < WS-DISTANCE
                           MOVE L-NUMBERS(WS-I) TO WS-CLOSEST-NUM1
                           MOVE L-NUMBERS(WS-J) TO WS-CLOSEST-NUM2
                           MOVE WS-TEMP TO WS-DISTANCE
                       END-IF
                   END-IF
               END-PERFORM
           END-PERFORM

           IF WS-CLOSEST-NUM1 > WS-CLOSEST-NUM2
               MOVE WS-CLOSEST-NUM1 TO WS-TEMP
               MOVE WS-CLOSEST-NUM2 TO WS-CLOSEST-NUM1
               MOVE WS-TEMP TO WS-CLOSEST-NUM2
           END-IF

           MOVE WS-CLOSEST-NUM1 TO RESULT(1).
           MOVE WS-CLOSEST-NUM2 TO RESULT(2).

           GOBACK.
       END PROGRAM FIND-CLOSEST-ELEMENTS.

IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. RESCALE-TO-UNIT.

       ENVIRONMENT DIVISION.
       
       INPUT-OUTPUT SECTION.

       DATA DIVISION.

       LINKAGE SECTION.

       01 LINKED-ITEMS.
           05 L-NUMBERS OCCURS 5 TIMES INDEXED BY NI COMP-2.
           05 RESULT OCCURS 100 TIMES INDEXED BY NJ COMP-2.



       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       01 WS-MIN-NUMBER COMP-2 VALUE 0.
       01 WS-MAX-NUMBER COMP-2 VALUE 0.
       01 WS-INDEX COMP-2 VALUE 0.
       01 WS-RESULT OCCURS 100 TIMES INDEXED BY WS-INDEX.
           05 WS-RESULT-ITEM COMP-2.

       PROCEDURE DIVISION USING LINKED-ITEMS.
       MAIN-PROCEDURE.
           PERFORM FIND-MIN-MAX
           PERFORM RESCALE-NUMBERS
           GOBACK.

       FIND-MIN-MAX.
           MOVE L-NUMBERS(1) TO WS-MIN-NUMBER
           MOVE L-NUMBERS(1) TO WS-MAX-NUMBER
           PERFORM VARYING NI FROM 2 BY 1 UNTIL NI > 5
               IF L-NUMBERS(NI) < WS-MIN-NUMBER
                   MOVE L-NUMBERS(NI) TO WS-MIN-NUMBER
               END-IF
               IF L-NUMBERS(NI) > WS-MAX-NUMBER
                   MOVE L-NUMBERS(NI) TO WS-MAX-NUMBER
               END-IF
           END-PERFORM.

       RESCALE-NUMBERS.
           PERFORM VARYING NI FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL NI > 5
               COMPUTE WS-RESULT-ITEM(NI) = (L-NUMBERS(NI) - WS-MIN-NUMBER) / (WS-MAX-NUMBER - WS-MIN-NUMBER)
           END-PERFORM.

       END PROGRAM RESCALE-TO-UNIT.

IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. LARGEST-DIVISOR.

       ENVIRONMENT DIVISION.
       
       INPUT-OUTPUT SECTION.

       DATA DIVISION.

       LINKAGE SECTION.

       01 LINKED-ITEMS.
           05 L-N PIC S9(10).
           05 RESULT PIC S9(10).



       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       
       01 WS-N PIC S9(10).
       01 WS-I PIC S9(10).
       01 WS-RESULT PIC S9(10).

       PROCEDURE DIVISION USING LINKED-ITEMS.
       MAIN-LOGIC.
           MOVE L-N TO WS-N
           MOVE 1 TO WS-RESULT
           PERFORM VARYING WS-I FROM WS-N - 1 BY -1 UNTIL WS-I <= 0
               IF FUNCTION MOD(WS-N, WS-I) = 0
                   MOVE WS-I TO WS-RESULT
                   EXIT PERFORM
               END-IF
           END-PERFORM
           MOVE WS-RESULT TO RESULT
           GOBACK.
       END PROGRAM LARGEST-DIVISOR.

IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. FACTORIZE.

       ENVIRONMENT DIVISION.
       
       INPUT-OUTPUT SECTION.

       DATA DIVISION.

       LINKAGE SECTION.

       01 LINKED-ITEMS.
           05 L-N PIC S9(10).
           05 RESULT OCCURS 100 TIMES INDEXED BY NI PIC S9(10).



       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       01 WS-INDEX PIC 9(3) VALUE 1.
       01 WS-I PIC S9(10) VALUE 2.
       01 WS-N PIC S9(10).
       01 WS-FACTOR PIC S9(10).
       01 WS-RESULT OCCURS 100 TIMES INDEXED BY WS-INDEX.
           05 WS-FACTOR-VALUE PIC S9(10).

       PROCEDURE DIVISION USING LINKED-ITEMS.
       MAIN-PROCEDURE.
           MOVE L-N TO WS-N.
           PERFORM UNTIL WS-N <= 1
               IF FUNCTION MOD(WS-N, WS-I) = 0
                   MOVE WS-I TO WS-FACTOR
                   DIVIDE WS-N BY WS-I GIVING WS-N
                   MOVE WS-FACTOR TO WS-FACTOR-VALUE(WS-INDEX)
                   ADD 1 TO WS-INDEX
               ELSE
                   ADD 1 TO WS-I
               END-IF
           END-PERFORM
           MOVE WS-INDEX TO L-N
           PERFORM VARYING NI FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL NI > L-N
               MOVE WS-FACTOR-VALUE(NI) TO RESULT(NI)
           END-PERFORM
           GOBACK.
       END PROGRAM FACTORIZE.

IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. REMOVE-DUPLICATES.

       ENVIRONMENT DIVISION.
       
       INPUT-OUTPUT SECTION.

       DATA DIVISION.

       LINKAGE SECTION.

       01 LINKED-ITEMS.
           05 L-NUMBERS OCCURS 5 TIMES INDEXED BY NI PIC S9(10).
           05 RESULT OCCURS 100 TIMES INDEXED BY NJ PIC S9(10).



       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       01 WS-COUNTS.
           05 WS-COUNT OCCURS 100 TIMES INDEXED BY CI PIC S9(10) VALUE 0.
       01 WS-RESULT-COUNT PIC S9(10) VALUE 0.
       01 WS-INDEX PIC S9(10) VALUE 0.
       01 WS-TEMP PIC S9(10) VALUE 0.

       PROCEDURE DIVISION USING LINKED-ITEMS.
       MAIN-LOGIC.
           PERFORM VARYING NI FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL NI > 5
               MOVE L-NUMBERS(NI) TO WS-TEMP
               ADD 1 TO WS-COUNT(WS-TEMP)
           END-PERFORM

           PERFORM VARYING NI FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL NI > 5
               MOVE L-NUMBERS(NI) TO WS-TEMP
               IF WS-COUNT(WS-TEMP) = 1
                   ADD 1 TO WS-RESULT-COUNT
                   MOVE WS-TEMP TO RESULT(WS-RESULT-COUNT)
               END-IF
           END-PERFORM

           DISPLAY "Result: "
           PERFORM VARYING NJ FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL NJ > WS-RESULT-COUNT
               DISPLAY RESULT(NJ)
           END-PERFORM

           GOBACK.
       END PROGRAM REMOVE-DUPLICATES.

IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. FLIP-CASE.

       ENVIRONMENT DIVISION.
       
       INPUT-OUTPUT SECTION.

       DATA DIVISION.

       LINKAGE SECTION.

       01 LINKED-ITEMS.
           05 L-STRING PIC X(100).
           05 RESULT PIC X(100).



       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       
       01 WS-STRING PIC X(100).
       01 WS-RESULT PIC X(100).
       01 WS-INDEX PIC 9(3) VALUE 1.
       01 WS-CHAR PIC X.
       01 WS-LEN PIC 9(3) VALUE 0.

       PROCEDURE DIVISION USING LINKED-ITEMS.
       MAIN-LOGIC.
           MOVE L-STRING TO WS-STRING.
           MOVE FUNCTION LENGTH(WS-STRING) TO WS-LEN.
           PERFORM VARYING WS-INDEX FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL WS-INDEX > WS-LEN
               MOVE WS-STRING(WS-INDEX:1) TO WS-CHAR
               IF WS-CHAR >= 'a' AND WS-CHAR <= 'z'
                   MOVE FUNCTION UPPER-CASE(WS-CHAR) TO WS-RESULT(WS-INDEX:1)
               ELSE
                   MOVE FUNCTION LOWER-CASE(WS-CHAR) TO WS-RESULT(WS-INDEX:1)
               END-IF
           END-PERFORM.
           MOVE WS-RESULT TO RESULT.
           GOBACK.
       END PROGRAM FLIP-CASE.

IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. CONCATENATE.

       ENVIRONMENT DIVISION.
       
       INPUT-OUTPUT SECTION.

       DATA DIVISION.

       LINKAGE SECTION.

       01 LINKED-ITEMS.
           05 L-STRINGS OCCURS 3 TIMES INDEXED BY NI PIC X(3).
           05 RESULT PIC X(100).



       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       
       01 WS-RESULT PIC X(100) VALUE SPACES.
       01 WS-INDEX PIC 9(2) VALUE 1.
       01 WS-STRING PIC X(3).

       PROCEDURE DIVISION USING LINKED-ITEMS.
       MAIN-LOGIC.
           PERFORM VARYING WS-INDEX FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL WS-INDEX > 3
               MOVE L-STRINGS(WS-INDEX) TO WS-STRING
               STRING WS-RESULT DELIMITED BY SIZE
                      WS-STRING DELIMITED BY SIZE
                      INTO WS-RESULT
               END-STRING
           END-PERFORM
           MOVE WS-RESULT TO RESULT
           GOBACK.
       END PROGRAM CONCATENATE.

IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. FILTER-BY-PREFIX.

       ENVIRONMENT DIVISION.
       
       INPUT-OUTPUT SECTION.

       DATA DIVISION.

       LINKAGE SECTION.

       01 LINKED-ITEMS.
           05 L-STRINGS OCCURS 4 TIMES INDEXED BY NI PIC X(100).
           05 L-PREFIX PIC X(100).
           05 RESULT OCCURS 100 TIMES INDEXED BY NJ PIC X(100).



       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       
       01 WS-INDEXES.
           05 WS-INDEX PIC 9(3) VALUE 1.
           05 WS-RESULT-INDEX PIC 9(3) VALUE 1.

       01 WS-STRING PIC X(100).
       01 WS-PREFIX PIC X(100).
       01 WS-RESULT PIC X(100).

       PROCEDURE DIVISION USING LINKED-ITEMS.
       MAIN-LOGIC.
           MOVE L-PREFIX TO WS-PREFIX.
           PERFORM VARYING WS-INDEX FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL WS-INDEX > 4
               MOVE L-STRINGS(WS-INDEX) TO WS-STRING
               IF WS-STRING(1:LENGTH OF WS-PREFIX) = WS-PREFIX
                   MOVE WS-STRING TO WS-RESULT
                   MOVE WS-RESULT TO RESULT(WS-RESULT-INDEX)
                   ADD 1 TO WS-RESULT-INDEX
               END-IF
           END-PERFORM.
           DISPLAY "Filtered strings: ".
           PERFORM VARYING WS-INDEX FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL WS-INDEX > WS-RESULT-INDEX - 1
               DISPLAY RESULT(WS-INDEX)
           END-PERFORM.
           GOBACK.
       END PROGRAM FILTER-BY-PREFIX.

IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. GET-POSITIVE.

       ENVIRONMENT DIVISION.
       
       INPUT-OUTPUT SECTION.

       DATA DIVISION.

       LINKAGE SECTION.

       01 LINKED-ITEMS.
           05 L-L OCCURS 5 TIMES INDEXED BY NI PIC S9(10).
           05 RESULT OCCURS 100 TIMES INDEXED BY NJ PIC S9(10).



       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       
       01 WS-INDEXES.
           05 WS-INDEX-I PIC 9(4) VALUE 1.
           05 WS-INDEX-J PIC 9(4) VALUE 1.
           05 WS-INDEX-K PIC 9(4) VALUE 1.

       01 WS-RESULT-COUNT PIC 9(4) VALUE 0.

       PROCEDURE DIVISION USING LINKED-ITEMS.
       MAIN-LOGIC.
           PERFORM VARYING WS-INDEX-I FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL WS-INDEX-I > 5
               IF L-L(WS-INDEX-I) > 0
                   ADD 1 TO WS-RESULT-COUNT
                   MOVE L-L(WS-INDEX-I) TO RESULT(WS-RESULT-COUNT)
               END-IF
           END-PERFORM
           DISPLAY "Result: "
           PERFORM VARYING WS-INDEX-J FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL WS-INDEX-J > WS-RESULT-COUNT
               DISPLAY RESULT(WS-INDEX-J)

IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. IS-PRIME.

       ENVIRONMENT DIVISION.
       
       INPUT-OUTPUT SECTION.

       DATA DIVISION.

       LINKAGE SECTION.

       01 LINKED-ITEMS.
           05 L-N PIC S9(10).
           05 RESULT PIC 9.

       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       01 WS-N PIC S9(10).
       01 WS-K PIC S9(10).
       01 WS-FLAG PIC 9 VALUE 1.

       PROCEDURE DIVISION USING LINKED-ITEMS.
       MAIN-LOGIC.
           MOVE L-N TO WS-N.
           IF WS-N < 2 THEN
               MOVE 0 TO RESULT
           ELSE
               PERFORM VARYING WS-K FROM 2 BY 1 UNTIL WS-K >= WS-N
                   IF FUNCTION MOD(WS-N, WS-K) = 0 THEN
                       MOVE 0 TO RESULT
                       EXIT PERFORM
                   END-IF
               END-PERFORM
               IF RESULT = 0 THEN
                   MOVE 0 TO RESULT
               ELSE
                   MOVE 1 TO RESULT
               END-IF
           END-IF.
           GOBACK.
       END PROGRAM IS-PRIME.

IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. UNIQUE.

       ENVIRONMENT DIVISION.
       
       INPUT-OUTPUT SECTION.

       DATA DIVISION.

       LINKAGE SECTION.

       01 LINKED-ITEMS.
           05 L-L OCCURS 9 TIMES INDEXED BY NI PIC S9(10).
           05 RESULT OCCURS 100 TIMES INDEXED BY NJ PIC S9(10).



       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       01 WS-UNIQUE-COUNT PIC 9(3) VALUE 0.
       01 WS-UNIQUE-ARRAY OCCURS 100 TIMES INDEXED BY UI PIC S9(10).
       01 WS-TEMP PIC S9(10).
       01 WS-I PIC 9(3).
       01 WS-J PIC 9(3).
       01 WS-K PIC 9(3).
       01 WS-SORTED-ARRAY OCCURS 100 TIMES INDEXED BY SI PIC S9(10).
       01 WS-SORTED-COUNT PIC 9(3) VALUE 0.

       PROCEDURE DIVISION USING LINKED-ITEMS.
       MAIN-LOGIC.
           PERFORM UNIQUE-PROCESS
           PERFORM SORT-PROCESS
           PERFORM DISPLAY-RESULT
           GOBACK.

       UNIQUE-PROCESS.
           MOVE 0 TO WS-UNIQUE-COUNT
           PERFORM VARYING WS-I FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL WS-I > 9
               MOVE L-L(WS-I) TO WS-TEMP
               MOVE 0 TO WS-J
               PERFORM VARYING WS-J FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL WS-J > WS-UNIQUE-COUNT
                   IF WS-TEMP = WS-UNIQUE-ARRAY(WS-J)
                       EXIT PERFORM
                   END-IF
               END-PERFORM
               IF WS-J > WS-UNIQUE-COUNT
                   ADD 1 TO WS-UNIQUE-COUNT
                   MOVE WS-TEMP TO WS-UNIQUE-ARRAY(WS-UNIQUE-COUNT)
               END-IF
           END-PERFORM.

       SORT-PROCESS.
           MOVE 0 TO WS-SORTED-COUNT
           PERFORM VARYING WS-I FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL WS-I > WS-UNIQUE-COUNT
               MOVE WS-UNIQUE-ARRAY(WS-I) TO WS-TEMP
               MOVE 0 TO WS-J
               PERFORM VARYING WS-J FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL WS-J > WS-SORTED-COUNT
                   IF WS-TEMP < WS-SORTED-ARRAY(WS-J)
                       PERFORM VARYING WS-K FROM WS-SORTED-COUNT BY -1 UNTIL WS-K < WS-J
                           MOVE WS-SORTED-ARRAY(WS-K) TO WS-SORTED-ARRAY(WS-K + 1)
                       END-PERFORM
                       MOVE WS-TEMP TO WS-SORTED-ARRAY(WS-J)
                       ADD 1 TO WS-SORTED-COUNT
                       EXIT PERFORM
                   END-IF
               END-PERFORM
               IF WS-J > WS-SORTED-COUNT
                   ADD 1 TO WS-SORTED-COUNT
                   MOVE WS-TEMP TO WS-SORTED-ARRAY(WS-SORTED-COUNT)
               END-IF
           END-PERFORM.

       DISPLAY-RESULT.
           DISPLAY "Unique Sorted Elements: "
           PERFORM VARYING WS-I FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL WS-I > WS-SORTED-COUNT
               DISPLAY WS-SORTED-ARRAY(WS-I)
           END-PERFORM.

       END PROGRAM UNIQUE.

IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. MAX-ELEMENT.

       ENVIRONMENT DIVISION.
       
       INPUT-OUTPUT SECTION.

       DATA DIVISION.

       LINKAGE SECTION.

       01 LINKED-ITEMS.
           05 L-L OCCURS 3 TIMES INDEXED BY NI PIC S9(10).
           05 RESULT PIC S9(10).



       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       
       01 MAX-VALUE PIC S9(10) VALUE -9999999999.
       01 I PIC 9(2) VALUE 1.

       PROCEDURE DIVISION USING LINKED-ITEMS.
       MAX-ELEMENT.
           PERFORM VARYING I FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL I > 3
               IF L-L(I) > MAX-VALUE
                   MOVE L-L(I) TO MAX-VALUE
               END-IF
           END-PERFORM
           MOVE MAX-VALUE TO RESULT
           GOBACK.
       END PROGRAM MAX-ELEMENT.

IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. FIZZ-BUZZ.

       ENVIRONMENT DIVISION.
       
       INPUT-OUTPUT SECTION.

       DATA DIVISION.

       LINKAGE SECTION.

       01 LINKED-ITEMS.
           05 L-N PIC S9(10).
           05 RESULT PIC S9(10).



       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       01 WS-N PIC S9(10).
       01 WS-RESULT PIC S9(10) VALUE 0.
       01 WS-I PIC S9(10).
       01 WS-DIGIT PIC S9(10).
       01 WS-TEMP PIC S9(10).
       01 WS-REMAINDER PIC S9(10).
       01 WS-CHAR PIC X(1).
       01 WS-STRING PIC X(10).
       01 WS-INDEX PIC S9(10) VALUE 1.

       PROCEDURE DIVISION USING LINKED-ITEMS.
       MAIN-LOGIC.
           MOVE L-N TO WS-N.
           MOVE 0 TO WS-RESULT.
           PERFORM VARYING WS-I FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL WS-I >= WS-N
               IF FUNCTION MOD(WS-I, 11) = 0 OR FUNCTION MOD(WS-I, 13) = 0
                   MOVE WS-I TO WS-TEMP
                   MOVE 0 TO WS-INDEX
                   PERFORM UNTIL WS-TEMP = 0
                       COMPUTE WS-REMAINDER = FUNCTION MOD(WS-TEMP, 10)
                       MOVE WS-REMAINDER TO WS-DIGIT
                       MOVE WS-DIGIT TO WS-CHAR
                       IF WS-CHAR = '7'
                           ADD 1 TO WS-RESULT
                       END-IF
                       COMPUTE WS-TEMP = WS-TEMP / 10
                       ADD 1 TO WS-INDEX
                   END-PERFORM
               END-IF
           END-PERFORM.
           MOVE WS-RESULT TO RESULT.
           GOBACK.
       END PROGRAM FIZZ-BUZZ.

IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. PRIME-FIB.

       ENVIRONMENT DIVISION.
       
       INPUT-OUTPUT SECTION.

       DATA DIVISION.

       LINKAGE SECTION.

       01 LINKED-ITEMS.
           05 L-N PIC S9(10).
           05 RESULT PIC S9(9) COMP-5.

       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.

       01 WS-FIB.
           05 F0 PIC S9(10) VALUE 0.
           05 F1 PIC S9(10) VALUE 1.
           05 P PIC S9(10).
           05 IS-PRIME PIC X VALUE 'Y'.
           05 K PIC S9(10).
           05 SQRT-P PIC S9(10).
           05 N PIC S9(10).

       PROCEDURE DIVISION USING LINKED-ITEMS.
       MAIN-LOGIC.
           MOVE L-N TO N
           PERFORM UNTIL N = 0
               ADD F0 TO F1 GIVING P
               MOVE 'Y' TO IS-PRIME
               IF P >= 2
                   COMPUTE SQRT-P = FUNCTION INTEGER (FUNCTION SQRT (P))
                   PERFORM VARYING K FROM 2 BY 1 UNTIL K > SQRT-P OR K >= P - 1
                       IF FUNCTION MOD (P, K) = 0
                           MOVE 'N' TO IS-PRIME
                           EXIT PERFORM
                       END-IF
                   END-PERFORM
               END-IF
               IF IS-PRIME = 'Y'
                   SUBTRACT 1 FROM N
               END-IF
               IF N = 0
                   MOVE P TO RESULT
                   EXIT PERFORM
               END-IF
               MOVE F1 TO F0
               MOVE P TO F1
           END-PERFORM
           GOBACK.
       END PROGRAM PRIME-FIB.

IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. TRIPLES-SUM-TO-ZERO.

       ENVIRONMENT DIVISION.
       
       INPUT-OUTPUT SECTION.

       DATA DIVISION.

       LINKAGE SECTION.

       01 LINKED-ITEMS.
           05 L-L OCCURS 4 TIMES INDEXED BY NI PIC S9(10).
           05 RESULT PIC 9.

       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       01 WS-RESULT PIC 9 VALUE 0.
       01 WS-I PIC 9(2) VALUE 1.
       01 WS-J PIC 9(2) VALUE 1.
       01 WS-K PIC 9(2) VALUE 1.
       01 WS-SUM PIC S9(10) VALUE 0.

       PROCEDURE DIVISION USING LINKED-ITEMS.
       MAIN-LOGIC.
           PERFORM VARYING WS-I FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL WS-I > 4
               PERFORM VARYING WS-J FROM WS-I BY 1 UNTIL WS-J > 4
                   PERFORM VARYING WS-K FROM WS-J BY 1 UNTIL WS-K > 4
                       COMPUTE WS-SUM = L-L(WS-I) + L-L(WS-J) + L-L(WS-K)
                       IF WS-SUM = 0
                           MOVE 1 TO WS-RESULT
                           EXIT PERFORM
                       END-IF
                   END-PERFORM
               END-PERFORM
           END-PERFORM
           MOVE WS-RESULT TO RESULT
           GOBACK.
       END PROGRAM TRIPLES-SUM-TO-ZERO.

IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. CAR-RACE-COLLISION.

       ENVIRONMENT DIVISION.
       
       INPUT-OUTPUT SECTION.

       DATA DIVISION.

       LINKAGE SECTION.

       01 LINKED-ITEMS.
           05 L-N PIC S9(10).
           05 RESULT PIC S9(10).



       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       
       PROCEDURE DIVISION USING LINKED-ITEMS.
           COMPUTE RESULT = L-N * L-N
           GOBACK.
       END PROGRAM CAR-RACE-COLLISION.

IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. INCR-LIST.

       ENVIRONMENT DIVISION.
       
       INPUT-OUTPUT SECTION.

       DATA DIVISION.

       LINKAGE SECTION.

       01 LINKED-ITEMS.
           05 L-L OCCURS 3 TIMES INDEXED BY NI PIC S9(10).
           05 RESULT OCCURS 100 TIMES INDEXED BY NJ PIC S9(10).



       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       
       01 WS-INDEX PIC 9(3) VALUE 1.
       01 WS-RESULT-COUNT PIC 9(3) VALUE 0.

       PROCEDURE DIVISION USING LINKED-ITEMS.
       INCR-LIST.
           PERFORM VARYING WS-INDEX FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL WS-INDEX > 3
               ADD 1 TO L-L(WS-INDEX) GIVING RESULT(WS-INDEX)
               ADD 1 TO WS-RESULT-COUNT
           END-PERFORM
           DISPLAY "Result: "
           PERFORM VARYING WS-INDEX FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL WS-INDEX > WS-RESULT-COUNT
               DISPLAY RESULT(WS-INDEX)
           END-PERFORM
           GOBACK.
       END PROGRAM INCR-LIST.

IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. PAIRS-SUM-TO-ZERO.

       ENVIRONMENT DIVISION.
       
       INPUT-OUTPUT SECTION.

       DATA DIVISION.

       LINKAGE SECTION.

       01 LINKED-ITEMS.
           05 L-L OCCURS 4 TIMES INDEXED BY NI PIC S9(10).
           05 RESULT PIC 9.

       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       01 WS-INDEX-I PIC 9(2) VALUE 1.
       01 WS-INDEX-J PIC 9(2) VALUE 1.
       01 WS-FOUND PIC 9 VALUE 0.

       PROCEDURE DIVISION USING LINKED-ITEMS.
       MAIN-LOGIC.
           PERFORM VARYING WS-INDEX-I FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL WS-INDEX-I > 4
               PERFORM VARYING WS-INDEX-J FROM WS-INDEX-I + 1 BY 1 UNTIL WS-INDEX-J > 4
                   IF L-L(WS-INDEX-I) + L-L(WS-INDEX-J) = 0
                       MOVE 1 TO WS-FOUND
                       EXIT PERFORM
                   END-IF
               END-PERFORM
               IF WS-FOUND = 1
                   EXIT PERFORM
               END-IF
           END-PERFORM
           MOVE WS-FOUND TO RESULT
           GOBACK.
       END PROGRAM PAIRS-SUM-TO-ZERO.

IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. CHANGE-BASE.

       ENVIRONMENT DIVISION.
       
       INPUT-OUTPUT SECTION.

       DATA DIVISION.

       LINKAGE SECTION.

       01 LINKED-ITEMS.
           05 L-X PIC S9(10).
           05 L-BASE PIC S9(10).
           05 RESULT PIC X(100).



       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       01 WS-REMAINDER PIC S9(10).
       01 WS-TEMP-RESULT PIC X(100) VALUE SPACES.
       01 WS-INDEX PIC 9(3) VALUE 100.

       PROCEDURE DIVISION USING LINKED-ITEMS.
       MAIN-LOGIC.
           MOVE SPACES TO WS-TEMP-RESULT
           MOVE 100 TO WS-INDEX
           PERFORM UNTIL L-X = 0
               COMPUTE WS-REMAINDER = FUNCTION MOD(L-X, L-BASE)
               MOVE WS-REMAINDER TO WS-TEMP-RESULT(WS-INDEX:1)
               SUBTRACT 1 FROM WS-INDEX
               COMPUTE L-X = L-X / L-BASE
           END-PERFORM
           MOVE WS-TEMP-RESULT(WS-INDEX + 1:100) TO RESULT
           GOBACK.
       END PROGRAM CHANGE-BASE.

IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. TRIANGLE-AREA.

       ENVIRONMENT DIVISION.

           05 L-H PIC S9(10).
           05 RESULT COMP-2.



       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       
       PROCEDURE DIVISION USING LINKED-ITEMS.
           COMPUTE RESULT = (L-A * L-H) / 2
           GOBACK.
       END PROGRAM TRIANGLE-AREA.

IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. FIB4.

       ENVIRONMENT DIVISION.
       
       INPUT-OUTPUT SECTION.

       DATA DIVISION.

       LINKAGE SECTION.

       01 LINKED-ITEMS.
           05 L-N PIC S9(10).
           05 RESULT PIC S9(10).



       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       01 WS-RESULTS.
           05 WS-RESULT-0 PIC S9(10) VALUE 0.
           05 WS-RESULT-1 PIC S9(10) VALUE 0.
           05 WS-RESULT-2 PIC S9(10) VALUE 2.
           05 WS-RESULT-3 PIC S9(10) VALUE 0.
       01 WS-TEMP PIC S9(10).
       01 WS-I PIC S9(10).

       PROCEDURE DIVISION USING LINKED-ITEMS.
       MAIN-LOGIC.
           IF L-N < 4
               MOVE WS-RESULT-0 TO RESULT
           ELSE
               PERFORM VARYING WS-I FROM 4 BY 1 UNTIL WS-I > L-N
                   COMPUTE WS-TEMP = WS-RESULT-0 + WS-RESULT-1 + WS-RESULT-2 + WS-RESULT-3
                   MOVE WS-RESULT-1 TO WS-RESULT-0
                   MOVE WS-RESULT-2 TO WS-RESULT-1
                   MOVE WS-RESULT-3 TO WS-RESULT-2
                   MOVE WS-TEMP TO WS-RESULT-3
               END-PERFORM
               MOVE WS-RESULT-3 TO RESULT
           END-IF
           GOBACK.
       END PROGRAM FIB4.

IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. MEDIAN.

       ENVIRONMENT DIVISION.
       
       INPUT-OUTPUT SECTION.

       DATA DIVISION.

       LINKAGE SECTION.

       01 LINKED-ITEMS.
           05 L-L OCCURS 5 TIMES INDEXED BY NI PIC S9(10).
           05 RESULT COMP-2.



       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       
       01 WS-ITEMS.
           05 WS-LIST OCCURS 5 TIMES INDEXED BY WS-INDEX PIC S9(10).
           05 WS-SIZE PIC 9(2) VALUE 5.
           05 WS-MEDIAN COMP-2.
           05 WS-TEMP PIC S9(10).
           05 WS-I PIC 9(2).
           05 WS-J PIC 9(2).
           05 WS-START PIC 9(2).
           05 WS-END PIC 9(2).
           05 WS-MID PIC 9(2).
           05 WS-LEFT PIC 9(2).
           05 WS-RIGHT PIC 9(2).
           05 WS-LEFT-VAL PIC S9(10).
           05 WS-RIGHT-VAL PIC S9(10).
           05 WS-SUM PIC S9(10).
           05 WS-RESULT COMP-2.

       PROCEDURE DIVISION USING LINKED-ITEMS.
       MAIN-PROCEDURE.
           PERFORM SORT-LIST
           IF FUNCTION MOD(WS-SIZE, 2) = 1
               COMPUTE WS-MID = WS-SIZE / 2
               MOVE WS-LIST(WS-MID) TO WS-MEDIAN
           ELSE
               COMPUTE WS-LEFT = WS-SIZE / 2 - 1
               COMPUTE WS-RIGHT = WS-SIZE / 2
               MOVE WS-LIST(WS-LEFT) TO WS-LEFT-VAL
               MOVE WS-LIST(WS-RIGHT) TO WS-RIGHT-VAL
               COMPUTE WS-SUM = WS-LEFT-VAL + WS-RIGHT-VAL
               COMPUTE WS-MEDIAN = WS-SUM / 2.0
           END-IF
           MOVE WS-MEDIAN TO RESULT
           GOBACK.

       SORT-LIST.
           PERFORM VARYING WS-I FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL WS-I > WS-SIZE
               COMPUTE WS-START = WS-I + 1
               PERFORM VARYING WS-J FROM WS-START BY 1 UNTIL WS-J > WS-SIZE
                   IF WS-LIST(WS-I) > WS-LIST(WS-J)
                       MOVE WS-LIST(WS-I) TO WS-TEMP
                       MOVE WS-LIST(WS-J) TO WS-LIST(WS-I)
                       MOVE WS-TEMP TO WS-LIST(WS-J)
                   END-IF
               END-PERFORM
           END-PERFORM
           EXIT.

       END PROGRAM MEDIAN.

IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. IS-PALINDROME.

       ENVIRONMENT DIVISION.
       
       INPUT-OUTPUT SECTION.

       DATA DIVISION.

       LINKAGE SECTION.

       01 LINKED-ITEMS.
           05 L-TEXT PIC X(100).
           05 RESULT PIC 9.

       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       01 WS-TEXT PIC X(100).
       01 WS-LEN PIC 9(3) VALUE 0.
       01 WS-INDEX PIC 9(3) VALUE 0.
       01 WS-REVERSE-INDEX PIC 9(3) VALUE 0.
       01 WS-CHAR PIC X.
       01 WS-REVERSE-CHAR PIC X.

       PROCEDURE DIVISION USING LINKED-ITEMS.
       MAIN-LOGIC.
           MOVE L-TEXT TO WS-TEXT.
           INSPECT WS-TEXT TALLYING WS-LEN FOR CHARACTERS.
           MOVE 1 TO WS-INDEX.
           MOVE WS-LEN TO WS-REVERSE-INDEX.

           PERFORM UNTIL WS-INDEX > WS-LEN / 2
               MOVE WS-TEXT(WS-INDEX:1) TO WS-CHAR
               MOVE WS-TEXT(WS-REVERSE-INDEX:1) TO WS-REVERSE-CHAR
               IF WS-CHAR NOT = WS-REVERSE-CHAR
                   MOVE 0 TO RESULT
                   GO TO END-PROGRAM
               END-IF
               ADD 1 TO WS-INDEX
               SUBTRACT 1 FROM WS-REVERSE-INDEX
           END-PERFORM.

           MOVE 1 TO RESULT.

       END-PROGRAM.
           EXIT PROGRAM.
       END PROGRAM IS-PALINDROME.

IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. MODP.

       ENVIRONMENT DIVISION.
       
       INPUT-OUTPUT SECTION.

       DATA DIVISION.

       LINKAGE SECTION.

       01 LINKED-ITEMS.
           05 L-N PIC S9(10).
           05 L-P PIC S9(10).
           05 RESULT PIC S9(10).



       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       
       01 WS-RET PIC S9(10) VALUE 1.
       01 WS-I PIC S9(10) VALUE 0.

       PROCEDURE DIVISION USING LINKED-ITEMS.
       MODP-ROUTINE.
           MOVE 1 TO WS-RET
           PERFORM VARYING WS-I FROM 0 BY 1 UNTIL WS-I >= L-N
               COMPUTE WS-RET = FUNCTION MOD(WS-RET * 2, L-P)
           END-PERFORM
           MOVE WS-RET TO RESULT
           GOBACK.
       END PROGRAM MODP.

IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. REMOVE-VOWELS.

       ENVIRONMENT DIVISION.
       
       INPUT-OUTPUT SECTION.

       DATA DIVISION.

       LINKAGE SECTION.

       01 LINKED-ITEMS.
           05 L-TEXT PIC X(100).
           05 RESULT PIC X(100).



       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       01 WS-INDEX PIC 9(3) VALUE 1.
       01 WS-CHAR PIC X.
       01 WS-RESULT PIC X(100) VALUE SPACES.
       01 WS-RESULT-INDEX PIC 9(3) VALUE 1.
       01 WS-VOWEL-FLAG PIC X VALUE 'N'.

       PROCEDURE DIVISION USING LINKED-ITEMS.
       MAIN-LOGIC.
           PERFORM VARYING WS-INDEX FROM 1 BY 1
               UNTIL WS-INDEX > FUNCTION LENGTH(L-TEXT)
               MOVE L-TEXT(WS-INDEX:1) TO WS-CHAR
               MOVE 'N' TO WS-VOWEL-FLAG
               IF WS-CHAR = 'a' OR WS-CHAR = 'e' OR WS-CHAR = 'i' OR WS-CHAR = 'o' OR WS-CHAR = 'u'
                   MOVE 'Y' TO WS-VOWEL-FLAG
               END-IF
               IF WS-CHAR = 'A' OR WS-CHAR = 'E' OR WS-CHAR = 'I' OR WS-CHAR = 'O' OR WS-CHAR = 'U'
                   MOVE 'Y' TO WS-VOWEL-FLAG
               END-IF
               IF WS-VOWEL-FLAG = 'N'
                   MOVE WS-CHAR TO WS-RESULT(WS-RESULT-INDEX:1)
                   ADD 1 TO WS-RESULT-INDEX
               END-IF
           END-PERFORM
           MOVE WS-RESULT TO RESULT
           GOBACK.
       END PROGRAM REMOVE-VOWELS.

IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.

       PROCEDURE DIVISION USING LINKED-ITEMS.
       MAIN-LOGIC.
           MOVE 1 TO RESULT.
           PERFORM VARYING WS-INDEX FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL WS-INDEX > 4
               IF L-L(WS-INDEX) >= L-T

IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. SAME-CHARS.

       ENVIRONMENT DIVISION.
       
       INPUT-OUTPUT SECTION.

       DATA DIVISION.

       LINKAGE SECTION.

       01 LINKED-ITEMS.
           05 L-S0 PIC X(100).
           05 L-S1 PIC X(100).
           05 RESULT PIC 9.

       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.

       01 WS-SET0.
           05 WS-SET0-CHAR OCCURS 26 TIMES PIC X VALUE SPACE.
       01 WS-SET1.
           05 WS-SET1-CHAR OCCURS 26 TIMES PIC X VALUE SPACE.

       01 WS-INDEX PIC 9(3) VALUE 1.
       01 WS-CHAR PIC X.
       01 WS-FOUND PIC 9 VALUE 0.

       PROCEDURE DIVISION USING LINKED-ITEMS.

       MAIN-LOGIC.
           PERFORM INITIALIZE-SETS
           PERFORM FILL-SET0
           PERFORM FILL-SET1
           PERFORM COMPARE-SETS
           GOBACK.

       INITIALIZE-SETS.
           MOVE SPACE TO WS-SET0-CHAR(1:26)
           MOVE SPACE TO WS-SET1-CHAR(1:26).

       FILL-SET0.
           PERFORM VARYING WS-INDEX FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL WS-INDEX > FUNCTION LENGTH(L-S0)
               MOVE L-S0(WS-INDEX:1) TO WS-CHAR
               IF WS-CHAR NOT = SPACE
                   PERFORM CHECK-SET0
               END-IF
           END-PERFORM.

       FILL-SET1.
           PERFORM VARYING WS-INDEX FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL WS-INDEX > FUNCTION LENGTH(L-S1)
               MOVE L-S1(WS-INDEX:1) TO WS-CHAR
               IF WS-CHAR NOT = SPACE
                   PERFORM CHECK-SET1
               END-IF
           END-PERFORM.

       CHECK-SET0.
           MOVE 0 TO WS-FOUND
           PERFORM VARYING WS-INDEX FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL WS-INDEX > 26
               IF WS-SET0-CHAR(WS-INDEX:1) = WS-CHAR
                   MOVE 1 TO WS-FOUND
                   EXIT PERFORM
               END-IF
           END-PERFORM
           IF WS-FOUND = 0
               PERFORM VARYING WS-INDEX FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL WS-INDEX > 26
                   IF WS-SET0-CHAR(WS-INDEX:1) = SPACE
                       MOVE WS-CHAR TO WS-SET0-CHAR(WS-INDEX:1)
                       EXIT PERFORM
                   END-IF
               END-PERFORM
           END-IF.

       CHECK-SET1.
           MOVE 0 TO WS-FOUND
           PERFORM VARYING WS-INDEX FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL WS-INDEX > 26
               IF WS-SET1-CHAR(WS-INDEX:1) = WS-CHAR
                   MOVE 1 TO WS-FOUND
                   EXIT PERFORM
               END-IF
           END-PERFORM
           IF WS-FOUND = 0
               PERFORM VARYING WS-INDEX FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL WS-INDEX > 26
                   IF WS-SET1-CHAR(WS-INDEX:1) = SPACE
                       MOVE WS-CHAR TO WS-SET1-CHAR(WS-INDEX:1)
                       EXIT PERFORM
                   END-IF
               END-PERFORM
           END-IF.

       COMPARE-SETS.
           MOVE 1 TO RESULT
           PERFORM VARYING WS-INDEX FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL WS-INDEX > 26
               IF WS-SET0-CHAR(WS-INDEX:1) NOT = WS-SET1-CHAR(WS-INDEX:1)
                   MOVE 0 TO RESULT
                   EXIT PERFORM
               END-IF
           END-PERFORM.

       END PROGRAM SAME-CHARS.

IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. FIB.

       ENVIRONMENT DIVISION.
       
       INPUT-OUTPUT SECTION.

       DATA DIVISION.

       LINKAGE SECTION.

       01 LINKED-ITEMS.
           05 L-N PIC S9(10).
           05 RESULT PIC S9(10).



       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       
       01 WS-N PIC S9(10).
       01 WS-RESULT PIC S9(10).
       01 WS-PREV1 PIC S9(10).
       01 WS-PREV2 PIC S9(10).
       01 WS-COUNTER PIC S9(10).

       PROCEDURE DIVISION USING LINKED-ITEMS.
       MAIN-LOGIC.
           MOVE L-N TO WS-N
           IF WS-N = 0
               MOVE 0 TO WS-RESULT
           ELSE IF WS-N = 1
               MOVE 1 TO WS-RESULT
           ELSE
               MOVE 0 TO WS-PREV1
               MOVE 1 TO WS-PREV2
               MOVE 2 TO WS-COUNTER
               PERFORM UNTIL WS-COUNTER > WS-N
                   ADD WS-PREV1 TO WS-PREV2 GIVING WS-RESULT
                   MOVE WS-PREV2 TO WS-PREV1
                   MOVE WS-RESULT TO WS-PREV2
                   ADD 1 TO WS-COUNTER
               END-PERFORM
           END-IF
           MOVE WS-RESULT TO RESULT
           GOBACK.
       END PROGRAM FIB.

IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. CORRECT-BRACKETING.

       ENVIRONMENT DIVISION.
       
       INPUT-OUTPUT SECTION.

       DATA DIVISION.

       LINKAGE SECTION.

       01 LINKED-ITEMS.
           05 L-BRACKETS PIC X(100).
           05 RESULT PIC 9.

       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       01 WS-DEPTH PIC S9(9) COMP-4 VALUE 0.
       01 WS-INDEX PIC 9(4) COMP-4 VALUE 1.
       01 WS-LENGTH PIC 9(4) COMP-4 VALUE 0.
       01 WS-CHAR PIC X.

       PROCEDURE DIVISION USING LINKED-ITEMS.
       MAIN-LOGIC.
           MOVE FUNCTION LENGTH(L-BRACKETS) TO WS-LENGTH.
           PERFORM VARYING WS-INDEX FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL WS-INDEX > WS-LENGTH
               MOVE L-BRACKETS(WS-INDEX:1) TO WS-CHAR
               IF WS-CHAR = '<'
                   ADD 1 TO WS-DEPTH
               ELSE
                   SUBTRACT 1 FROM WS-DEPTH
               END-IF
               IF WS-DEPTH < 0
                   MOVE 0 TO RESULT
                   GOBACK
               END-IF
           END-PERFORM
           IF WS-DEPTH = 0
               MOVE 1 TO RESULT
           ELSE
               MOVE 0 TO RESULT
           END-IF
           GOBACK.
       END PROGRAM CORRECT-BRACKETING.

IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. MONOTONIC.

       ENVIRONMENT DIVISION.
       
       INPUT-OUTPUT SECTION.

       DATA DIVISION.

       LINKAGE SECTION.

       01 LINKED-ITEMS.
           05 L-L OCCURS 4 TIMES INDEXED BY NI PIC S9(10).
           05 RESULT PIC 9.

       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       01 WS-L1 OCCURS 4 TIMES INDEXED BY I PIC S9(10).
       01 WS-L2 OCCURS 4 TIMES INDEXED BY J PIC S9(10).
       01 WS-TEMP PIC S9(10).
       01 WS-RESULT PIC 9 VALUE 0.

       PROCEDURE DIVISION USING LINKED-ITEMS.
       MAIN-PROCEDURE.
           PERFORM COPY-LIST
           PERFORM SORT-L1
           PERFORM SORT-L2
           PERFORM CHECK-MONOTONIC
           MOVE WS-RESULT TO RESULT
           GOBACK.

       COPY-LIST.
           PERFORM VARYING I FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL I > 4
               MOVE L-L(I) TO WS-L1(I)
               MOVE L-L(I) TO WS-L2(I)
           END-PERFORM.

       SORT-L1.
           PERFORM VARYING I FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL I > 3
               PERFORM VARYING J FROM I BY 1 UNTIL J > 4
                   IF WS-L1(I) > WS-L1(J)
                       MOVE WS-L1(I) TO WS-TEMP
                       MOVE WS-L1(J) TO WS-L1(I)
                       MOVE WS-TEMP TO WS-L1(J)
                   END-IF
               END-PERFORM
           END-PERFORM.

       SORT-L2.
           PERFORM VARYING I FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL I > 3
               PERFORM VARYING J FROM I BY 1 UNTIL J > 4
                   IF WS-L2(I) < WS-L2(J)
                       MOVE WS-L2(I) TO WS-TEMP
                       MOVE WS-L2(J) TO WS-L2(I)
                       MOVE WS-TEMP TO WS-L2(J)
                   END-IF
               END-PERFORM
           END-PERFORM.

       CHECK-MONOTONIC.
           IF WS-L1(1) = L-L(1) AND WS-L1(2) = L-L(2) AND WS-L1(3) = L-L(3) AND WS-L1(4) = L-L(4)
               MOVE 1 TO WS-RESULT
           ELSE IF WS-L2(1) = L-L(1) AND WS-L2(2) = L-L(2) AND WS-L2(3) = L-L(3) AND WS-L2(4) = L-L(4)
               MOVE 1 TO WS-RESULT
           END-IF.

       END PROGRAM MONOTONIC.

IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. LARGEST-PRIME-FACTOR.

       ENVIRONMENT DIVISION.
       
       INPUT-OUTPUT SECTION.

       DATA DIVISION.

       LINKAGE SECTION.

       01 LINKED-ITEMS.
           05 L-N PIC S9(10).
           05 RESULT PIC S9(10).



       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       
       01 WS-LARGEST-PRIME-FACTOR.
           05 WS-LARGEST PIC S9(10) VALUE 1.
           05 WS-J PIC S9(10).
           05 WS-I PIC S9(10).
           05 WS-IS-PRIME PIC X VALUE 'Y'.
           05 WS-N PIC S9(10).
           05 WS-TEMP PIC S9(10).

       PROCEDURE DIVISION USING LINKED-ITEMS.
       MAIN-LOGIC.
           MOVE L-N TO WS-N.
           PERFORM VARYING WS-J FROM 2 BY 1 UNTIL WS-J > WS-N
               IF FUNCTION MOD(WS-N, WS-J) = 0
                   MOVE 'Y' TO WS-IS-PRIME
                   PERFORM VARYING WS-I FROM 2 BY 1 UNTIL WS-I >= WS-J - 1
                       IF FUNCTION MOD(WS-J, WS-I) = 0
                           MOVE 'N' TO WS-IS-PRIME
                           EXIT PERFORM
                       END-IF
                   END-PERFORM
                   IF WS-IS-PRIME = 'Y'
                       IF WS-J > WS-LARGEST
                           MOVE WS-J TO WS-LARGEST
                       END-IF
                   END-IF
               END-IF
           END-PERFORM.
           MOVE WS-LARGEST TO RESULT.
           GOBACK.
       END PROGRAM LARGEST-PRIME-FACTOR.

IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. SUM-TO-N.

       ENVIRONMENT DIVISION.
       
       INPUT-OUTPUT SECTION.

       DATA DIVISION.

       LINKAGE SECTION.

       01 LINKED-ITEMS.
           05 L-N PIC S9(10).
           05 RESULT PIC S9(10).



       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       
       01 WS-RESULT PIC S9(10) VALUE 0.
       01 WS-I PIC S9(10) VALUE 0.

       PROCEDURE DIVISION USING LINKED-ITEMS.
       MAIN-LOGIC.
           MOVE 0 TO WS-RESULT
           MOVE 1 TO WS-I
           PERFORM UNTIL WS-I > L-N
               ADD WS-I TO WS-RESULT
               ADD 1 TO WS-I
           END-PERFORM
           MOVE WS-RESULT TO RESULT
           GOBACK.
       END PROGRAM SUM-TO-N.

IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. DERIVATIVE.

       ENVIRONMENT DIVISION.
       
       INPUT-OUTPUT SECTION.

       DATA DIVISION.

       LINKAGE SECTION.

       01 LINKED-ITEMS.
           05 L-XS OCCURS 3 TIMES INDEXED BY NI PIC S9(10).
           05 RESULT OCCURS 100 TIMES INDEXED BY NJ PIC S9(10).



       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       
       01 WS-INDEX PIC 9(3) VALUE 1.
       01 WS-RESULT-COUNT PIC 9(3) VALUE 0.
       01 WS-RESULT OCCURS 100 TIMES INDEXED BY WS-RESULT-INDEX PIC S9(10).

       PROCEDURE DIVISION USING LINKED-ITEMS.
       MAIN-LOGIC.
           PERFORM VARYING WS-INDEX FROM 2 BY 1 UNTIL WS-INDEX > 3
               COMPUTE WS-RESULT(WS-RESULT-INDEX) = WS-INDEX * L-XS(WS-INDEX)
               ADD 1 TO WS-RESULT-INDEX
               ADD 1 TO WS-RESULT-COUNT
           END-PERFORM
           DISPLAY "Derivative: "
           PERFORM VARYING WS-RESULT-INDEX FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL WS-RESULT-INDEX > WS-RESULT-COUNT
               DISPLAY WS-RESULT(WS-RESULT-INDEX)
           END-PERFORM
           GOBACK.
       END PROGRAM DERIVATIVE.

IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. VOWELS-COUNT.

       ENVIRONMENT DIVISION.
       
       INPUT-OUTPUT SECTION.

       DATA DIVISION.

       LINKAGE SECTION.

       01 LINKED-ITEMS.
           05 L-S PIC X(100).
           05 RESULT PIC S9(10).



       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       
       01 VOWELS PIC X(10) VALUE "aeiouAEIOU".
       01 N-VOWELS PIC S9(10) VALUE 0.
       01 I PIC S9(10) VALUE 0.
       01 CHAR PIC X(1).
       01 LAST-CHAR PIC X(1).
       01 VOWEL-FLAG PIC X(1) VALUE "N".

       PROCEDURE DIVISION USING LINKED-ITEMS.
       MAIN-LOGIC.
           MOVE 0 TO N-VOWELS.
           MOVE 0 TO I.
           MOVE "N" TO VOWEL-FLAG.

           PERFORM VARYING I FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL I > FUNCTION LENGTH(L-S)
               MOVE L-S(I:1) TO CHAR
               MOVE "N" TO VOWEL-FLAG
               PERFORM VARYING I FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL I > FUNCTION LENGTH(VOWELS)
                   IF CHAR = VOWELS(I:1)
                       MOVE "Y" TO VOWEL-FLAG
                       EXIT PERFORM
                   END-IF
               END-PERFORM
               IF VOWEL-FLAG = "Y"
                   ADD 1 TO N-VOWELS
               END-IF
           END-PERFORM.

           MOVE L-S(FUNCTION LENGTH(L-S):1) TO LAST-CHAR
           IF LAST-CHAR = "y" OR LAST-CHAR = "Y"
               ADD 1 TO N-VOWELS
           END-IF.

           MOVE N-VOWELS TO RESULT.
           GOBACK.
       END PROGRAM VOWELS-COUNT.

IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. DIGITSUM.

       ENVIRONMENT DIVISION.
       
       INPUT-OUTPUT SECTION.

       DATA DIVISION.

       LINKAGE SECTION.

       01 LINKED-ITEMS.
           05 L-S PIC X(100).
           05 RESULT PIC S9(10).



       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       
       01 WS-STRING PIC X(100).
       01 WS-LENGTH PIC 9(3).
       01 WS-INDEX PIC 9(3).
       01 WS-CHAR PIC X.
       01 WS-SUM PIC S9(10) VALUE 0.

       PROCEDURE DIVISION USING LINKED-ITEMS.
       MAIN-LOGIC.
           MOVE L-S TO WS-STRING.
           MOVE FUNCTION LENGTH(WS-STRING) TO WS-LENGTH.
           PERFORM VARYING WS-INDEX FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL WS-INDEX > WS-LENGTH
               MOVE WS-STRING(WS-INDEX:1) TO WS-CHAR
               IF WS-CHAR >= 'A' AND WS-CHAR <= 'Z'
                   ADD FUNCTION ORD(WS-CHAR) TO WS-SUM
               END-IF
           END-PERFORM.
           MOVE WS-SUM TO RESULT.
           GOBACK.
       END PROGRAM DIGITSUM.

IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. FRUIT-DISTRIBUTION.

       ENVIRONMENT DIVISION.
       
       INPUT-OUTPUT SECTION.

       DATA DIVISION.

       LINKAGE SECTION.

       01 LINKED-ITEMS.
           05 L-S PIC X(100).
           05 L-N PIC S9(10).
           05 RESULT PIC S9(10).



       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       01 WS-STRING PIC X(100).
       01 WS-N PIC S9(10).
       01 WS-RESULT PIC S9(10).
       01 WS-INDEX PIC 9(3) VALUE 1.
       01 WS-LEN PIC 9(3).
       01 WS-CHAR PIC X.
       01 WS-NUM PIC S9(10) VALUE 0.
       01 WS-SUM PIC S9(10) VALUE 0.

       PROCEDURE DIVISION USING LINKED-ITEMS.
       MAIN-PROCEDURE.
           MOVE L-S TO WS-STRING.
           MOVE L-N TO WS-N.
           MOVE FUNCTION LENGTH(WS-STRING) TO WS-LEN.

           PERFORM VARYING WS-INDEX FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL WS-INDEX > WS-LEN
               MOVE WS-STRING(WS-INDEX:1) TO WS-CHAR
               IF WS-CHAR IS NUMERIC
                   MOVE FUNCTION NUMVAL(WS-CHAR) TO WS-NUM
                   ADD WS-NUM TO WS-SUM
               END-IF
           END-PERFORM.

           SUBTRACT WS-SUM FROM WS-N GIVING WS-RESULT.
           MOVE WS-RESULT TO RESULT.
           GOBACK.
       END PROGRAM FRUIT-DISTRIBUTION.

IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. PLUCK.

       ENVIRONMENT DIVISION.
       
       INPUT-OUTPUT SECTION.

       DATA DIVISION.

       LINKAGE SECTION.

       01 LINKED-ITEMS.
           05 L-ARR OCCURS 10 TIMES INDEXED BY NI PIC S9(10).
           05 RESULT OCCURS 100 TIMES INDEXED BY NJ PIC S9(10).



       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       
       01 WS-ARR-SIZE PIC S9(10) VALUE 0.
       01 WS-MIN PIC S9(10) VALUE 9999999999.
       01 WS-MIN-INDEX PIC S9(10) VALUE -1.
       01 WS-I PIC S9(10) VALUE 0.
       01 WS-RESULT-SIZE PIC S9(10) VALUE 0.
       01 WS-RESULT OCCURS 100 TIMES INDEXED BY NJ PIC S9(10).

       PROCEDURE DIVISION USING LINKED-ITEMS.
       MAIN-PROCEDURE.
           MOVE 0 TO WS-ARR-SIZE.
           PERFORM VARYING WS-I FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL WS-I > 10
               IF L-ARR(WS-I) NOT = 0
                   ADD 1 TO WS-ARR-SIZE
               END-IF
           END-PERFORM.

           IF WS-ARR-SIZE = 0
               MOVE 0 TO WS-RESULT-SIZE
           ELSE
               MOVE 9999999999 TO WS-MIN
               MOVE -1 TO WS-MIN-INDEX
               PERFORM VARYING WS-I FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL WS-I > WS-ARR-SIZE
                   IF FUNCTION MOD(L-ARR(WS-I), 2) = 0
                       IF L-ARR(WS-I) < WS-MIN
                           MOVE L-ARR(WS-I) TO WS-MIN
                           MOVE WS-I TO WS-MIN-INDEX
                       END-IF
                   END-IF
               END-PERFORM

               IF WS-MIN-INDEX NOT = -1
                   ADD 1 TO WS-RESULT-SIZE
                   MOVE WS-MIN TO WS-RESULT(WS-RESULT-SIZE)
                   ADD 1 TO WS-RESULT-SIZE
                   MOVE WS-MIN-INDEX TO WS-RESULT(WS-RESULT-SIZE)
               END-IF
           END-IF.

           GOBACK.
       END PROGRAM PLUCK.

IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. SEARCH.

       ENVIRONMENT DIVISION.
       
       INPUT-OUTPUT SECTION.

       DATA DIVISION.

       LINKAGE SECTION.

       01 LINKED-ITEMS.
           05 L-LST OCCURS 5 TIMES INDEXED BY NI PIC S9(10).
           05 RESULT PIC S9(10).



       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       
       01 MAX-VALUE PIC S9(10) VALUE 0.
       01 I PIC S9(10) VALUE 0.
       01 J PIC S9(10) VALUE 0.
       01 FRQ OCCURS 100 TIMES INDEXED BY K PIC S9(10) VALUE 0.
       01 ANS PIC S9(10) VALUE -1.

       PROCEDURE DIVISION USING LINKED-ITEMS.
       MAIN-PROCEDURE.
           PERFORM FIND-MAX-VALUE.
           PERFORM COUNT-FREQUENCY.
           PERFORM FIND-ANS.
           MOVE ANS TO RESULT.
           GOBACK.

       FIND-MAX-VALUE.
           MOVE 0 TO MAX-VALUE.
           PERFORM VARYING I FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL I > 5
               IF L-LST(I) > MAX-VALUE
                   MOVE L-LST(I) TO MAX-VALUE
               END-IF
           END-PERFORM.

       COUNT-FREQUENCY.
           PERFORM VARYING I FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL I > MAX-VALUE
               MOVE 0 TO FRQ(I)
           END-PERFORM.
           PERFORM VARYING I FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL I > 5
               ADD 1 TO FRQ(L-LST(I))
           END-PERFORM.

       FIND-ANS.
           PERFORM VARYING I FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL I > MAX-VALUE
               IF FRQ(I) >= I
                   MOVE I TO ANS
               END-IF
           END-PERFORM.

       END PROGRAM SEARCH.
