IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. TRIANGLE-AREA.

       ENVIRONMENT DIVISION.
       
       INPUT-OUTPUT SECTION.

       DATA DIVISION.

       LINKAGE SECTION.

       01 LINKED-ITEMS.
           05 L-A PIC S9(10).
           05 L-B PIC S9(10).
           05 L-C PIC S9(10).
           05 RESULT COMP-2.



       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       
       01 WS-S PIC S9(10)V9(10).
       01 WS-AREA PIC S9(10)V9(10).
       01 WS-TEMP PIC S9(10)V9(10).
       01 WS-ROUND PIC S9(10)V9(10).
       01 WS-RESULT PIC S9(10)V9(10).
       
       PROCEDURE DIVISION USING LINKED-ITEMS.
       
       MAIN-LOGIC.
           IF L-A + L-B <= L-C OR L-A + L-C <= L-B OR L-B + L-C <= L-A
               MOVE -1 TO WS-RESULT
           ELSE
               COMPUTE WS-S = (L-A + L-B + L-C) / 2
               COMPUTE WS-AREA = FUNCTION SQRT(WS-S * (WS-S - L-A) * (WS-S - L-B) * (WS-S - L-C))
               COMPUTE WS-TEMP = WS-AREA * 100
               COMPUTE WS-ROUND = FUNCTION INTEGER(WS-TEMP)
               COMPUTE WS-RESULT = WS-ROUND / 100
           END-IF
           MOVE WS-RESULT TO RESULT
           GOBACK.
       END PROGRAM TRIANGLE-AREA.

IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. WILL-IT-FLY.

       ENVIRONMENT DIVISION.
       
       INPUT-OUTPUT SECTION.

       DATA DIVISION.

       LINKAGE SECTION.

       01 LINKED-ITEMS.
           05 L-Q OCCURS 3 TIMES INDEXED BY NI PIC S9(10).
           05 L-W PIC S9(10).
           05 RESULT PIC 9.

       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       01 WS-SUM PIC S9(10) VALUE 0.
       01 WS-I PIC S9(10) VALUE 1.
       01 WS-J PIC S9(10) VALUE 3.
       01 WS-INDEX PIC S9(10) VALUE 0.

       PROCEDURE DIVISION USING LINKED-ITEMS.
       MAIN-LOGIC.
           PERFORM CHECK-SUM.
           IF WS-SUM > L-W
               MOVE 0 TO RESULT
               GOBACK
           END-IF.

           PERFORM CHECK-BALANCED.
           IF RESULT = 0
               GOBACK
           END-IF.

           MOVE 1 TO RESULT.
           GOBACK.

       CHECK-SUM.
           MOVE 0 TO WS-SUM.
           PERFORM VARYING WS-INDEX FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL WS-INDEX > 3
               ADD L-Q(WS-INDEX) TO WS-SUM
           END-PERFORM.

       CHECK-BALANCED.
           MOVE 1 TO WS-I.
           MOVE 3 TO WS-J.
           PERFORM UNTIL WS-I >= WS-J
               IF L-Q(WS-I) NOT = L-Q(WS-J)
                   MOVE 0 TO RESULT
                   EXIT PERFORM
               END-IF
               ADD 1 TO WS-I
               SUBTRACT 1 FROM WS-J
           END-PERFORM.

       END PROGRAM WILL-IT-FLY.

IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. SMALLEST-CHANGE.

       ENVIRONMENT DIVISION.
       
       INPUT-OUTPUT SECTION.

       DATA DIVISION.

       LINKAGE SECTION.

       01 LINKED-ITEMS.
           05 L-ARR OCCURS 7 TIMES INDEXED BY NI PIC S9(10).
           05 RESULT PIC S9(10).



       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       
       01 WS-ARR OCCURS 7 TIMES INDEXED BY I PIC S9(10).
       01 WS-ANS PIC S9(10) VALUE 0.
       01 WS-INDEX PIC S9(10) VALUE 0.
       01 WS-LEN PIC S9(10) VALUE 7.

       PROCEDURE DIVISION USING LINKED-ITEMS.
       MAIN-LOGIC.
           MOVE L-ARR TO WS-ARR.
           PERFORM VARYING I FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL I > WS-LEN / 2
               IF WS-ARR(I) NOT = WS-ARR(WS-LEN - I + 1)
                   ADD 1 TO WS-ANS
               END-IF
           END-PERFORM.
           MOVE WS-ANS TO RESULT.
           GOBACK.
       END PROGRAM SMALLEST-CHANGE.

IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. TOTAL-MATCH.

       ENVIRONMENT DIVISION.
       
       INPUT-OUTPUT SECTION.

       DATA DIVISION.

       LINKAGE SECTION.

       01 LINKED-ITEMS.
           05 L-LST1 OCCURS 10 TIMES INDEXED BY NI PIC X(100).
           05 L-LST2 OCCURS 10 TIMES INDEXED BY NJ PIC X(100).
           05 RESULT OCCURS 100 TIMES INDEXED BY NK PIC X(100).

       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       01 WS-LST1-COUNT PIC 9(3) VALUE 0.
       01 WS-LST2-COUNT PIC 9(3) VALUE 0.
       01 WS-LST1-LEN PIC 9(5) VALUE 0.
       01 WS-LST2-LEN PIC 9(5) VALUE 0.
       01 WS-RESULT-COUNT PIC 9(3) VALUE 0.
       01 WS-RESULT-INDEX PIC 9(3) VALUE 0.

       PROCEDURE DIVISION USING LINKED-ITEMS.
       MAIN-LOGIC.
           PERFORM CALCULATE-LST1-LEN
           PERFORM CALCULATE-LST2-LEN
           IF WS-LST1-LEN <= WS-LST2-LEN
               PERFORM COPY-LST1-TO-RESULT
           ELSE
               PERFORM COPY-LST2-TO-RESULT
           END-IF
           DISPLAY "Result: "
           PERFORM DISPLAY-RESULT
           STOP RUN.

       CALCULATE-LST1-LEN.
           MOVE 0 TO WS-LST1-LEN
           PERFORM VARYING WS-LST1-COUNT FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL WS-LST1-COUNT > 10
               IF L-LST1(WS-LST1-COUNT) NOT = SPACES
                   ADD FUNCTION LENGTH(L-LST1(WS-LST1-COUNT)) TO WS-LST1-LEN
               END-IF
           END-PERFORM.

       CALCULATE-LST2-LEN.
           MOVE 0 TO WS-LST2-LEN
           PERFORM VARYING WS-LST2-COUNT FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL WS-LST2-COUNT > 10
               IF L-LST2(WS-LST2-COUNT) NOT = SPACES
                   ADD FUNCTION LENGTH(L-LST2(WS-LST2-COUNT)) TO WS-LST2-LEN
               END-IF
           END-PERFORM.

       COPY-LST1-TO-RESULT.
           MOVE 0 TO WS-RESULT-COUNT
           PERFORM VARYING WS-LST1-COUNT FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL WS-LST1-COUNT > 10
               IF L-LST1(WS-LST1-COUNT) NOT = SPACES
                   ADD 1 TO WS-RESULT-COUNT
                   MOVE L-LST1(WS-LST1-COUNT) TO RESULT(WS-RESULT-COUNT)
               END-IF
           END-PERFORM.

       COPY-LST2-TO-RESULT.
           MOVE 0 TO WS-RESULT-COUNT
           PERFORM VARYING WS-LST2-COUNT FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL WS-LST2-COUNT > 10
               IF L-LST2(WS-LST2-COUNT) NOT = SPACES
                   ADD 1 TO WS-RESULT-COUNT
                   MOVE L-LST2(WS-LST2-COUNT) TO RESULT(WS-RESULT-COUNT)
               END-IF
           END-PERFORM.

       DISPLAY-RESULT.
           PERFORM VARYING WS-RESULT-INDEX FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL WS-RESULT-INDEX > WS-RESULT-COUNT
               DISPLAY RESULT(WS-RESULT-INDEX)
           END-PERFORM.

       END PROGRAM TOTAL-MATCH.

IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. IS-MULTIPLY-PRIME.

       ENVIRONMENT DIVISION.
       
       INPUT-OUTPUT SECTION.

       DATA DIVISION.

       LINKAGE SECTION.

       01 LINKED-ITEMS.
           05 L-A PIC S9(10).
           05 RESULT PIC 9.

       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.

       01 WS-PRIME-FLAG PIC 9 VALUE 1.
       01 WS-I PIC S9(10) VALUE 2.
       01 WS-J PIC S9(10) VALUE 2.
       01 WS-K PIC S9(10) VALUE 2.
       01 WS-PRODUCT PIC S9(10) VALUE 0.

       PROCEDURE DIVISION USING LINKED-ITEMS.

       MAIN-LOGIC.
           MOVE 0 TO RESULT
           PERFORM VARYING WS-I FROM 2 BY 1 UNTIL WS-I > 100
               PERFORM CHECK-PRIME
               IF WS-PRIME-FLAG = 0
                   CONTINUE
               END-IF
               PERFORM VARYING WS-J FROM WS-I BY 1 UNTIL WS-J > 100
                   PERFORM CHECK-PRIME
                   IF WS-PRIME-FLAG = 0
                       CONTINUE
                   END-IF
                   PERFORM VARYING WS-K FROM WS-J BY 1 UNTIL WS-K > 100
                       PERFORM CHECK-PRIME
                       IF WS-PRIME-FLAG = 0
                           CONTINUE
                       END-IF
                       COMPUTE WS-PRODUCT = WS-I * WS-J * WS-K
                       IF WS-PRODUCT = L-A
                           MOVE 1 TO RESULT
                           EXIT PERFORM
                       END-IF
                   END-PERFORM
               END-PERFORM
           END-PERFORM
           GOBACK.

       CHECK-PRIME.
           MOVE 1 TO WS-PRIME-FLAG
           PERFORM VARYING WS-J FROM 2 BY 1 UNTIL WS-J >= WS-I
               IF FUNCTION MOD(WS-I, WS-J) = 0
                   MOVE 0 TO WS-PRIME-FLAG
                   EXIT PERFORM
               END-IF
           END-PERFORM
           EXIT.

       END PROGRAM IS-MULTIPLY-PRIME.

IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. IS-SIMPLE-POWER.

       ENVIRONMENT DIVISION.
       
       INPUT-OUTPUT SECTION.

       DATA DIVISION.

       LINKAGE SECTION.

       01 LINKED-ITEMS.
           05 L-X PIC S9(10).
           05 L-N PIC S9(10).
           05 RESULT PIC 9.

       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       01 WS-POWER PIC S9(10) VALUE 1.
       01 WS-TEMP-X PIC S9(10).
       01 WS-TEMP-N PIC S9(10).

       PROCEDURE DIVISION USING LINKED-ITEMS.
       MAIN-LOGIC.
           MOVE L-X TO WS-TEMP-X.
           MOVE L-N TO WS-TEMP-N.

           IF WS-TEMP-N = 1 THEN
               IF WS-TEMP-X = 1 THEN
                   MOVE 1 TO RESULT
               ELSE
                   MOVE 0 TO RESULT
               END-IF
           ELSE
               PERFORM UNTIL WS-POWER >= WS-TEMP-X
                   MULTIPLY WS-POWER BY WS-TEMP-N GIVING WS-POWER
               END-PERFORM

               IF WS-POWER = WS-TEMP-X THEN
                   MOVE 1 TO RESULT
               ELSE
                   MOVE 0 TO RESULT
               END-IF
           END-IF.

           GOBACK.
       END PROGRAM IS-SIMPLE-POWER.

IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. ISCUBE.

       ENVIRONMENT DIVISION.
       
       INPUT-OUTPUT SECTION.

       DATA DIVISION.

       LINKAGE SECTION.

       01 LINKED-ITEMS.
           05 L-A PIC S9(10).
           05 RESULT PIC 9.

       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       01 WS-ABS-A PIC S9(10).
       01 WS-CUBE-ROOT PIC S9(10).
       01 WS-CUBE-ROOT-INT PIC S9(10).
       01 WS-CUBE-ROOT-INT-CUBED PIC S9(10).

       PROCEDURE DIVISION USING LINKED-ITEMS.
       MAIN-LOGIC.
           MOVE L-A TO WS-ABS-A
           IF WS-ABS-A < 0
               COMPUTE WS-ABS-A = -WS-ABS-A
           END-IF

           COMPUTE WS-CUBE-ROOT = FUNCTION CUBEROOT(WS-ABS-A)
           COMPUTE WS-CUBE-ROOT-INT = FUNCTION INTEGER(WS-CUBE-ROOT)
           COMPUTE WS-CUBE-ROOT-INT-CUBED = WS-CUBE-ROOT-INT * WS-CUBE-ROOT-INT * WS-CUBE-ROOT-INT

           IF WS-CUBE-ROOT-INT-CUBED = WS-ABS-A
               MOVE 1 TO RESULT
           ELSE
               MOVE 0 TO RESULT
           END-IF

           GOBACK.
       END PROGRAM ISCUBE.

IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. HEX-KEY.

       ENVIRONMENT DIVISION.
       
       INPUT-OUTPUT SECTION.

       DATA DIVISION.

       LINKAGE SECTION.

       01 LINKED-ITEMS.
           05 L-NUM PIC X(100).
           05 RESULT PIC S9(10).



       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       01 PRIMES PIC X(6) VALUE "2357BD".
       01 TOTAL PIC S9(10) VALUE 0.
       01 I PIC S9(10) VALUE 0.
       01 J PIC S9(10) VALUE 0.
       01 CHAR PIC X(1).
       01 FOUND PIC X(1) VALUE "N".

       PROCEDURE DIVISION USING LINKED-ITEMS.
       MAIN-LOGIC.
           PERFORM VARYING I FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL I > FUNCTION LENGTH(L-NUM)
               MOVE L-NUM(I:1) TO CHAR
               MOVE "N" TO FOUND
               PERFORM VARYING J FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL J > 6
                   IF CHAR = PRIMES(J:1)
                       MOVE "Y" TO FOUND
                       EXIT PERFORM
                   END-IF
               END-PERFORM
               IF FOUND = "Y"
                   ADD 1 TO TOTAL
               END-IF
           END-PERFORM
           MOVE TOTAL TO RESULT
           GOBACK.
       END PROGRAM HEX-KEY.

IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. DECIMAL-TO-BINARY.

       ENVIRONMENT DIVISION.
       
       INPUT-OUTPUT SECTION.

       DATA DIVISION.

       LINKAGE SECTION.

       01 LINKED-ITEMS.
           05 L-DECIMAL PIC S9(10).
           05 RESULT PIC X(100).



       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       
       01 WS-BINARY-STRING PIC X(100) VALUE SPACES.
       01 WS-DECIMAL PIC S9(10) VALUE 0.
       01 WS-INDEX PIC 9(3) VALUE 0.
       01 WS-REMAINDER PIC 9 VALUE 0.
       01 WS-BINARY-CHAR PIC X VALUE SPACE.

       PROCEDURE DIVISION USING LINKED-ITEMS.
       MAIN-LOGIC.
           MOVE L-DECIMAL TO WS-DECIMAL.
           MOVE SPACES TO WS-BINARY-STRING.
           MOVE 0 TO WS-INDEX.

           PERFORM UNTIL WS-DECIMAL = 0
               COMPUTE WS-REMAINDER = FUNCTION MOD(WS-DECIMAL, 2)
               COMPUTE WS-DECIMAL = WS-DECIMAL / 2
               MOVE WS-REMAINDER TO WS-BINARY-CHAR
               ADD 1 TO WS-INDEX
               MOVE WS-BINARY-CHAR TO WS-BINARY-STRING(WS-INDEX:1)
           END-PERFORM.

           MOVE "db" TO RESULT(1:2).
           MOVE WS-BINARY-STRING TO RESULT(3:).
           MOVE "db" TO RESULT(3 + WS-INDEX:2).

           GOBACK.
       END PROGRAM DECIMAL-TO-BINARY.

IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. IS-HAPPY.

       ENVIRONMENT DIVISION.
       
       INPUT-OUTPUT SECTION.

       DATA DIVISION.

       LINKAGE SECTION.

       01 LINKED-ITEMS.
           05 L-S PIC X(100).
           05 RESULT PIC 9.

       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       01 WS-LEN PIC 9(3) VALUE 0.
       01 WS-INDEX PIC 9(3) VALUE 0.
       01 WS-CHAR1 PIC X.
       01 WS-CHAR2 PIC X.
       01 WS-CHAR3 PIC X.

       PROCEDURE DIVISION USING LINKED-ITEMS.
       MAIN-LOGIC.
           MOVE FUNCTION LENGTH(L-S) TO WS-LEN.
           IF WS-LEN < 3
               MOVE 0 TO RESULT
               GOBACK
           END-IF.

           PERFORM VARYING WS-INDEX FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL WS-INDEX > WS-LEN - 2
               MOVE L-S(WS-INDEX:1) TO WS-CHAR1
               MOVE L-S(WS-INDEX + 1:1) TO WS-CHAR2
               MOVE L-S(WS-INDEX + 2:1) TO WS-CHAR3
               IF WS-CHAR1 = WS-CHAR2 OR WS-CHAR2 = WS-CHAR3 OR WS-CHAR1 = WS-CHAR3
                   MOVE 0 TO RESULT
                   GOBACK
               END-IF
           END-PERFORM.

           MOVE 1 TO RESULT
           GOBACK.
       END PROGRAM IS-HAPPY.

IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. NUMERICAL-LETTER-GRADE.

       ENVIRONMENT DIVISION.
       
       INPUT-OUTPUT SECTION.

       DATA DIVISION.

       LINKAGE SECTION.

       01 LINKED-ITEMS.
           05 L-GRADES OCCURS 5 TIMES INDEXED BY NI COMP-2.
           05 RESULT OCCURS 100 TIMES INDEXED BY NJ PIC X(100).



       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       
       01 WS-INDEXES.
           05 WS-INDEX-NI PIC 9(2) VALUE 1.
           05 WS-INDEX-NJ PIC 9(2) VALUE 1.

       01 WS-GRADES.
           05 WS-GRADE OCCURS 5 TIMES INDEXED BY NI COMP-2.

       01 WS-RESULT.
           05 WS-LETTER-GRADE OCCURS 100 TIMES INDEXED BY NJ PIC X(100).

       PROCEDURE DIVISION USING LINKED-ITEMS.
       MAIN-PROCEDURE.
           PERFORM VARYING WS-INDEX-NI FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL WS-INDEX-NI > 5
               MOVE L-GRADES(WS-INDEX-NI) TO WS-GRADE(WS-INDEX-NI)
               EVALUATE TRUE
                   WHEN WS-GRADE(WS-INDEX-NI) = 4.0
                       MOVE "A+" TO WS-LETTER-GRADE(WS-INDEX-NJ)
                   WHEN WS-GRADE(WS-INDEX-NI) > 3.7
                       MOVE "A" TO WS-LETTER-GRADE(WS-INDEX-NJ)
                   WHEN WS-GRADE(WS-INDEX-NI) > 3.3
                       MOVE "A-" TO WS-LETTER-GRADE(WS-INDEX-NJ)
                   WHEN WS-GRADE(WS-INDEX-NI) > 3.0
                       MOVE "B+" TO WS-LETTER-GRADE(WS-INDEX-NJ)
                   WHEN WS-GRADE(WS-INDEX-NI) > 2.7
                       MOVE "B" TO WS-LETTER-GRADE(WS-INDEX-NJ)
                   WHEN WS-GRADE(WS-INDEX-NI) > 2.3
                       MOVE "B-" TO WS-LETTER-GRADE(WS-INDEX-NJ)
                   WHEN WS-GRADE(WS-INDEX-NI) > 2.0
                       MOVE "C+" TO WS-LETTER-GRADE(WS-INDEX-NJ)
                   WHEN WS-GRADE(WS-INDEX-NI) > 1.7
                       MOVE "C" TO WS-LETTER-GRADE(WS-INDEX-NJ)
                   WHEN WS-GRADE(WS-INDEX-NI) > 1.3
                       MOVE "C-" TO WS-LETTER-GRADE(WS-INDEX-NJ)
                   WHEN WS-GRADE(WS-INDEX-NI) > 1.0
                       MOVE "D+" TO WS-LETTER-GRADE(WS-INDEX-NJ)
                   WHEN WS-GRADE(WS-INDEX-NI) > 0.7
                       MOVE "D" TO WS-LETTER-GRADE(WS-INDEX-NJ)
                   WHEN WS-GRADE(WS-INDEX-NI) > 0.0
                       MOVE "D-" TO WS-LETTER-GRADE(WS-INDEX-NJ)
                   WHEN OTHER
                       MOVE "E" TO WS-LETTER-GRADE(WS-INDEX-NJ)
               END-EVALUATE
               ADD 1 TO WS-INDEX-NJ
           END-PERFORM
           EXIT PROGRAM.
       END PROGRAM NUMERICAL-LETTER-GRADE.

IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. PRIME-LENGTH.

       ENVIRONMENT DIVISION.
       
       INPUT-OUTPUT SECTION.

       DATA DIVISION.

       LINKAGE SECTION.

       01 LINKED-ITEMS.
           05 L-STRING PIC X(100).
           05 RESULT PIC 9.

       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       01 WS-LENGTH PIC 9(3) VALUE 0.
       01 WS-I PIC 9(3) VALUE 0.
       01 WS-FLAG PIC 9 VALUE 0.

       PROCEDURE DIVISION USING LINKED-ITEMS.
       MAIN-LOGIC.
           MOVE FUNCTION LENGTH(L-STRING) TO WS-LENGTH.
           IF WS-LENGTH = 0 OR WS-LENGTH = 1 THEN
               MOVE 0 TO RESULT
           ELSE
               MOVE 1 TO WS-FLAG
               PERFORM VARYING WS-I FROM 2 BY 1 UNTIL WS-I >= WS-LENGTH
                   IF FUNCTION MOD(WS-LENGTH, WS-I) = 0 THEN
                       MOVE 0 TO WS-FLAG
                       EXIT PERFORM
                   END-IF
               END-PERFORM
               MOVE WS-FLAG TO RESULT
           END-IF.
           GOBACK.
       END PROGRAM PRIME-LENGTH.

IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. STARTS-ONE-ENDS.

       ENVIRONMENT DIVISION.
       
       INPUT-OUTPUT SECTION.

       DATA DIVISION.

       LINKAGE SECTION.

       01 LINKED-ITEMS.
           05 L-N PIC S9(10).
           05 RESULT PIC S9(10).



       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       
       01 WS-N PIC S9(10).
       01 WS-RESULT PIC S9(10).
       01 WS-POWER PIC S9(10).
       01 WS-TEMP PIC S9(10).

       PROCEDURE DIVISION USING LINKED-ITEMS.
       MAIN-LOGIC.
           MOVE L-N TO WS-N.
           IF WS-N = 1 THEN
               MOVE 1 TO WS-RESULT
           ELSE
               COMPUTE WS-POWER = 10 ** (WS-N - 2)
               COMPUTE WS-TEMP = 18 * WS-POWER
               MOVE WS-TEMP TO WS-RESULT
           END-IF.
           MOVE WS-RESULT TO RESULT.
           GOBACK.
       END PROGRAM STARTS-ONE-ENDS.

IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. SOLVE.

       ENVIRONMENT DIVISION.
       
       INPUT-OUTPUT SECTION.

       DATA DIVISION.

       LINKAGE SECTION.

       01 LINKED-ITEMS.
           05 L-N PIC S9(10).
           05 RESULT PIC X(100).



       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       01 WS-SUM PIC S9(10) VALUE 0.
       01 WS-TEMP PIC S9(10) VALUE 0.
       01 WS-INDEX PIC 9(4) VALUE 0.
       01 WS-CHAR PIC X.
       01 WS-BINARY PIC X(100) VALUE SPACES.
       01 WS-REMAINDER PIC S9(10) VALUE 0.
       01 WS-REMAINDER-CHAR PIC X.
       01 WS-REMAINDER-INDEX PIC 9(4) VALUE 0.

       PROCEDURE DIVISION USING LINKED-ITEMS.
       MAIN-LOGIC.
           MOVE 0 TO WS-SUM.
           MOVE 0 TO WS-INDEX.
           MOVE SPACES TO WS-BINARY.
           MOVE 0 TO WS-REMAINDER-INDEX.

           PERFORM VARYING WS-INDEX FROM 1 BY 1
               UNTIL WS-INDEX > FUNCTION LENGTH(FUNCTION NUMVAL-C(L-N))
               MOVE FUNCTION NUMVAL-C(L-N)(WS-INDEX:1) TO WS-CHAR
               COMPUTE WS-TEMP = FUNCTION NUMVAL(WS-CHAR)
               ADD WS-TEMP TO WS-SUM
           END-PERFORM.

           MOVE WS-SUM TO WS-TEMP.

           PERFORM UNTIL WS-TEMP = 0
               COMPUTE WS-REMAINDER = FUNCTION MOD(WS-TEMP, 2)
               MOVE FUNCTION CHAR(WS-REMAINDER + 48) TO WS-REMAINDER-CHAR
               ADD 1 TO WS-REMAINDER-INDEX
               MOVE WS-REMAINDER-CHAR TO WS-BINARY(WS-REMAINDER-INDEX:1)
               COMPUTE WS-TEMP = WS-TEMP / 2
           END-PERFORM.

           MOVE WS-BINARY TO RESULT.

           GOBACK.
       END PROGRAM SOLVE.

       MAIN-LOGIC.

               IF FUNCTION MOD(L-LST(WS-INDEX), 2) = 0

           END-PERFORM
           MOVE WS-SUM TO RESULT

       END PROGRAM ADD.

IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. ENCRYPT.

       ENVIRONMENT DIVISION.
       
       INPUT-OUTPUT SECTION.

       DATA DIVISION.

       LINKAGE SECTION.

       01 LINKED-ITEMS.
           05 L-S PIC X(100).
           05 RESULT PIC X(100).



       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       01 WS-INDEX PIC 9(3) VALUE 1.
       01 WS-LEN PIC 9(3) VALUE 0.
       01 WS-CHAR PIC X.
       01 WS-RESULT PIC X(100) VALUE SPACES.
       01 WS-TEMP PIC 9(3) VALUE 0.

       PROCEDURE DIVISION USING LINKED-ITEMS.
       ENCRYPT-STRING.
           MOVE FUNCTION LENGTH(L-S) TO WS-LEN.
           PERFORM VARYING WS-INDEX FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL WS-INDEX > WS-LEN
               MOVE L-S(WS-INDEX:1) TO WS-CHAR
               IF WS-CHAR >= 'a' AND WS-CHAR <= 'z'
                   COMPUTE WS-TEMP = FUNCTION ORD(WS-CHAR) - FUNCTION ORD('a') + 4
                   COMPUTE WS-TEMP = FUNCTION MOD(WS-TEMP, 26)
                   COMPUTE WS-TEMP = WS-TEMP + FUNCTION ORD('a')
                   MOVE FUNCTION CHAR(WS-TEMP) TO WS-RESULT(WS-INDEX:1)
               ELSE
                   MOVE WS-CHAR TO WS-RESULT(WS-INDEX:1)
               END-IF
           END-PERFORM.
           MOVE WS-RESULT TO RESULT.
           GOBACK.
       END PROGRAM ENCRYPT.

IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. NEXT-SMALLEST.

       ENVIRONMENT DIVISION.
       
       INPUT-OUTPUT SECTION.

       DATA DIVISION.

       LINKAGE SECTION.

       01 LINKED-ITEMS.
           05 L-LST OCCURS 5 TIMES INDEXED BY NI PIC S9(10).
           05 RESULT PIC S9(10).



       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       
       01 WS-SET.
           05 WS-SET-ITEM OCCURS 5 TIMES INDEXED BY SI PIC S9(10).
           05 WS-SET-COUNT PIC 9(2) VALUE 0.

       01 WS-SORTED-LIST.
           05 WS-SORTED-ITEM OCCURS 5 TIMES INDEXED BY SSI PIC S9(10).
           05 WS-SORTED-COUNT PIC 9(2) VALUE 0.

       01 WS-RESULT PIC S9(10) VALUE 0.

       PROCEDURE DIVISION USING LINKED-ITEMS.
       MAIN-LOGIC.
           PERFORM REMOVE-DUPLICATES
           PERFORM SORT-LIST
           IF WS-SORTED-COUNT < 2
               MOVE 0 TO WS-RESULT
           ELSE
               MOVE WS-SORTED-ITEM(2) TO WS-RESULT
           END-IF
           MOVE WS-RESULT TO RESULT
           GOBACK.

       REMOVE-DUPLICATES.
           MOVE 0 TO WS-SET-COUNT
           PERFORM VARYING NI FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL NI > 5
               IF WS-SET-COUNT = 0
                   ADD 1 TO WS-SET-COUNT
                   MOVE L-LST(NI) TO WS-SET-ITEM(WS-SET-COUNT)
               ELSE
                   PERFORM VARYING SI FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL SI > WS-SET-COUNT
                       IF L-LST(NI) = WS-SET-ITEM(SI)
                           EXIT PERFORM
                       END-IF
                   END-PERFORM
                   IF SI > WS-SET-COUNT
                       ADD 1 TO WS-SET-COUNT
                       MOVE L-LST(NI) TO WS-SET-ITEM(WS-SET-COUNT)
                   END-IF
               END-IF
           END-PERFORM.

       SORT-LIST.
           MOVE 0 TO WS-SORTED-COUNT
           PERFORM VARYING SI FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL SI > WS-SET-COUNT
               ADD 1 TO WS-SORTED-COUNT
               MOVE WS-SET-ITEM(SI) TO WS-SORTED-ITEM(WS-SORTED-COUNT)
           END-PERFORM
           PERFORM VARYING SSI FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL SSI > WS-SORTED-COUNT - 1
               PERFORM VARYING SSI2 FROM SSI + 1 BY 1 UNTIL SSI2 > WS-SORTED-COUNT
                   IF WS-SORTED-ITEM(SSI) > WS-SORTED-ITEM(SSI2)
                       MOVE WS-SORTED-ITEM(SSI) TO WS-TEMP
                       MOVE WS-SORTED-ITEM(SSI2) TO WS-SORTED-ITEM(SSI)
                       MOVE WS-TEMP TO WS-SORTED-ITEM(SSI2)
                   END-IF
               END-PERFORM
           END-PERFORM.

       END PROGRAM NEXT-SMALLEST.

IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. ANY-INT.

       ENVIRONMENT DIVISION.
       
       INPUT-OUTPUT SECTION.

       DATA DIVISION.

       LINKAGE SECTION.

       01 LINKED-ITEMS.
           05 L-X COMP-2.
           05 L-Y COMP-2.
           05 L-Z COMP-2.
           05 RESULT PIC 9.

       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       
       PROCEDURE DIVISION USING LINKED-ITEMS.
           IF L-X = FUNCTION INTEGER(L-X) AND L-Y = FUNCTION INTEGER(L-Y) AND L-Z = FUNCTION INTEGER(L-Z)
               IF L-X + L-Y = L-Z OR L-X + L-Z = L-Y OR L-Y + L-Z = L-X
                   MOVE 1 TO RESULT
               ELSE
                   MOVE 0 TO RESULT
               END-IF
           ELSE
               MOVE 0 TO RESULT
           END-IF
           GOBACK.
       END PROGRAM ANY-INT.

IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. ENCODE.

       ENVIRONMENT DIVISION.
       
       INPUT-OUTPUT SECTION.

       DATA DIVISION.

       LINKAGE SECTION.

       01 LINKED-ITEMS.
           05 L-MESSAGE PIC X(100).
           05 RESULT PIC X(100).



       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       
       01 WS-VOWELS PIC X(10) VALUE "aeiouAEIOU".
       01 WS-INDEX PIC 9(2) VALUE 0.
       01 WS-CHAR PIC X.
       01 WS-RESULT PIC X(100) VALUE SPACES.
       01 WS-LEN PIC 9(3) VALUE 0.
       01 WS-I PIC 9(3) VALUE 0.
       01 WS-FOUND PIC X VALUE "N".
       01 WS-NEW-CHAR PIC X.

       PROCEDURE DIVISION USING L-MESSAGE RESULT.
       MAIN-PROCEDURE.
           MOVE FUNCTION LENGTH(L-MESSAGE) TO WS-LEN.
           PERFORM VARYING WS-I FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL WS-I > WS-LEN
               MOVE L-MESSAGE(WS-I:1) TO WS-CHAR
               MOVE "N" TO WS-FOUND
               IF WS-CHAR >= "A" AND WS-CHAR <= "Z"
                   MOVE FUNCTION LOWER-CASE(WS-CHAR) TO WS-CHAR
                   PERFORM VARYING WS-INDEX FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL WS-INDEX > 10
                       IF WS-CHAR = WS-VOWELS(WS-INDEX:1)
                           MOVE "Y" TO WS-FOUND
                           EXIT PERFORM
                       END-IF
                   END-PERFORM
                   IF WS-FOUND = "Y"
                       COMPUTE WS-NEW-CHAR = FUNCTION CHAR(
                           FUNCTION ORD('a') + 
                           (FUNCTION ORD(WS-CHAR) - FUNCTION ORD('a') + 28) MOD 26)
                       )
                       MOVE WS-NEW-CHAR TO WS-CHAR
                   END-IF
                   MOVE FUNCTION UPPER-CASE(WS-CHAR) TO WS-CHAR
               ELSE IF WS-CHAR >= "a" AND WS-CHAR <= "z"
                   MOVE FUNCTION UPPER-CASE(WS-CHAR) TO WS-CHAR
                   PERFORM VARYING WS-INDEX FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL WS-INDEX > 10
                       IF WS-CHAR = WS-VOWELS(WS-INDEX:1)
                           MOVE "Y" TO WS-FOUND
                           EXIT PERFORM
                       END-IF
                   END-PERFORM
                   IF WS-FOUND = "Y"
                       COMPUTE WS-NEW-CHAR = FUNCTION CHAR(
                           FUNCTION ORD('A') + 
                           (FUNCTION ORD(WS-CHAR) - FUNCTION ORD('A') + 28) MOD 26)
                       )
                       MOVE WS-NEW-CHAR TO WS-CHAR
                   END-IF
                   MOVE FUNCTION LOWER-CASE(WS-CHAR) TO WS-CHAR
               END-IF
               STRING WS-CHAR DELIMITED BY SIZE INTO WS-RESULT
           END-PERFORM.
           MOVE WS-RESULT TO RESULT.
           GOBACK.
       END PROGRAM ENCODE.

IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. SKJKASDKD.

       ENVIRONMENT DIVISION.
       
       INPUT-OUTPUT SECTION.

       DATA DIVISION.

       LINKAGE SECTION.

       01 LINKED-ITEMS.
           05 L-LST OCCURS 6 TIMES INDEXED BY NI PIC S9(10).
           05 RESULT PIC S9(10).



       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       
       01 MAXX PIC S9(10) VALUE 0.
       01 I PIC S9(10).
       01 J PIC S9(10).
       01 IS-PRIME PIC X VALUE 'Y'.
       01 SUM PIC S9(10) VALUE 0.
       01 TEMP PIC S9(10).
       01 DIGIT PIC S9(10).
       01 MAXX-STR PIC X(10).
       01 MAXX-LEN PIC S9(10).
       01 IDX PIC S9(10).
       01 MAXX-CHAR PIC X.

       PROCEDURE DIVISION USING LINKED-ITEMS.
       MAIN-LOGIC.
           PERFORM VARYING I FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL I > 6
               IF L-LST(I) > MAXX
                   MOVE 'Y' TO IS-PRIME
                   IF L-LST(I) = 1
                       MOVE 'N' TO IS-PRIME
                   ELSE
                       PERFORM VARYING J FROM 2 BY 1 UNTIL J > L-LST(I) - 1
                           IF FUNCTION MOD(L-LST(I), J) = 0
                               MOVE 'N' TO IS-PRIME
                               EXIT PERFORM
                           END-IF
                       END-PERFORM
                   END-IF
                   IF IS-PRIME = 'Y'
                       MOVE L-LST(I) TO MAXX
                   END-IF
               END-IF
           END-PERFORM

           MOVE MAXX TO TEMP
           MOVE 0 TO SUM
           PERFORM UNTIL TEMP = 0
               COMPUTE DIGIT = FUNCTION MOD(TEMP, 10)
               COMPUTE SUM = SUM + DIGIT
               COMPUTE TEMP = TEMP / 10
           END-PERFORM

           MOVE SUM TO RESULT
           GOBACK.
       END PROGRAM SKJKASDKD.

IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. COUNT-UP-TO.

       ENVIRONMENT DIVISION.
       
       INPUT-OUTPUT SECTION.

       DATA DIVISION.

       LINKAGE SECTION.

       01 LINKED-ITEMS.
           05 L-N PIC S9(10).
           05 RESULT OCCURS 100 TIMES INDEXED BY NI PIC S9(10).



       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       01 WS-PRIMES.
           05 WS-PRIME-COUNT PIC 9(3) VALUE 0.
           05 WS-PRIME-ARRAY OCCURS 100 TIMES INDEXED BY PI.
               10 WS-PRIME-VALUE PIC S9(10).

       01 WS-I PIC S9(10).
       01 WS-J PIC S9(10).
       01 WS-IS-PRIME PIC X VALUE 'Y'.

       PROCEDURE DIVISION USING LINKED-ITEMS.
       MAIN-LOGIC.
           MOVE 0 TO WS-PRIME-COUNT.
           PERFORM VARYING WS-I FROM 2 BY 1 UNTIL WS-I >= L-N
               MOVE 'Y' TO WS-IS-PRIME
               PERFORM VARYING WS-J FROM 2 BY 1 UNTIL WS-J >= WS-I
                   IF FUNCTION MOD(WS-I, WS-J) = 0
                       MOVE 'N' TO WS-IS-PRIME
                       EXIT PERFORM
                   END-IF
               END-PERFORM
               IF WS-IS-PRIME = 'Y'
                   ADD 1 TO WS-PRIME-COUNT
                   MOVE WS-I TO WS-PRIME-VALUE(WS-PRIME-COUNT)
               END-IF
           END-PERFORM
           PERFORM VARYING NI FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL NI > WS-PRIME-COUNT
               MOVE WS-PRIME-VALUE(NI) TO RESULT(NI)
           END-PERFORM
           GOBACK.
       END PROGRAM COUNT-UP-TO.

IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. MULTIPLY.

       ENVIRONMENT DIVISION.
       
       INPUT-OUTPUT SECTION.

       DATA DIVISION.

       LINKAGE SECTION.

       01 LINKED-ITEMS.
           05 L-A PIC S9(10).
           05 L-B PIC S9(10).
           05 RESULT PIC S9(10).



       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       
       PROCEDURE DIVISION USING LINKED-ITEMS.
           COMPUTE RESULT = FUNCTION ABS(L-A) MOD 10 * FUNCTION ABS(L-B) MOD 10
           GOBACK.
       END PROGRAM MULTIPLY.

IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. COUNT-UPPER.

       ENVIRONMENT DIVISION.
       
       INPUT-OUTPUT SECTION.

       DATA DIVISION.

       LINKAGE SECTION.

       01 LINKED-ITEMS.
           05 L-S PIC X(100).
           05 RESULT PIC S9(10).



       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       
       01 WS-STRING PIC X(100).
       01 WS-LENGTH PIC 9(3).
       01 WS-COUNT PIC 9(3) VALUE 0.
       01 WS-INDEX PIC 9(3).
       01 WS-CHAR PIC X.
       01 WS-UPPER-VOWEL PIC X(5) VALUE "AEIOU".

       PROCEDURE DIVISION USING LINKED-ITEMS.
       MAIN-LOGIC.
           MOVE L-S TO WS-STRING.
           MOVE FUNCTION LENGTH(WS-STRING) TO WS-LENGTH.
           MOVE 0 TO WS-COUNT.
           MOVE 1 TO WS-INDEX.

           PERFORM UNTIL WS-INDEX > WS-LENGTH
               MOVE WS-STRING(WS-INDEX:1) TO WS-CHAR
               IF WS-CHAR = "A" OR WS-CHAR = "E" OR WS-CHAR = "I" OR WS-CHAR = "O" OR WS-CHAR = "U"
                   ADD 1 TO WS-COUNT
               END-IF
               ADD 2 TO WS-INDEX
           END-PERFORM.

           MOVE WS-COUNT TO RESULT.
           GOBACK.
       END PROGRAM COUNT-UPPER.

IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. MAKE-A-PILE.

       ENVIRONMENT DIVISION.
       
       INPUT-OUTPUT SECTION.

       DATA DIVISION.

       LINKAGE SECTION.

       01 LINKED-ITEMS.
           05 L-N PIC S9(10).
           05 RESULT OCCURS 100 TIMES INDEXED BY NI PIC S9(10).



       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       
       01 WS-INDEX PIC S9(10) VALUE 0.
       01 WS-RESULT OCCURS 100 TIMES INDEXED BY WS-INDEX.
           05 WS-RESULT-ITEM PIC S9(10).

       PROCEDURE DIVISION USING LINKED-ITEMS.
       MAIN-LOGIC.
           PERFORM VARYING WS-INDEX FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL WS-INDEX > L-N
               COMPUTE WS-RESULT-ITEM(WS-INDEX) = L-N + 2 * (WS-INDEX - 1)
           END-PERFORM
           MOVE WS-RESULT TO RESULT
           GOBACK.
       END PROGRAM MAKE-A-PILE.

IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. WORDS-STRING.

       ENVIRONMENT DIVISION.
       
       INPUT-OUTPUT SECTION.

       DATA DIVISION.

       LINKAGE SECTION.

       01 LINKED-ITEMS.
           05 L-S PIC X(100).
           05 RESULT OCCURS 100 TIMES INDEXED BY NI PIC X(100).



       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       01 WS-STRING PIC X(100).
       01 WS-RESULT OCCURS 100 TIMES INDEXED BY NI PIC X(100).
       01 WS-INDEX PIC 9(3) VALUE 1.
       01 WS-CHAR PIC X.
       01 WS-LEN PIC 9(3).
       01 WS-WORD PIC X(100).
       01 WS-WORD-LEN PIC 9(3) VALUE 0.
       01 WS-SPACE-FLAG PIC X VALUE 'N'.

       PROCEDURE DIVISION USING LINKED-ITEMS.
       MAIN-PROCEDURE.
           MOVE L-S TO WS-STRING.
           MOVE FUNCTION LENGTH(WS-STRING) TO WS-LEN.

           IF WS-LEN = 0
               DISPLAY "Result: []"
               GOBACK
           END-IF.

           PERFORM VARYING WS-INDEX FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL WS-INDEX > WS-LEN
               MOVE WS-STRING(WS-INDEX:1) TO WS-CHAR
               IF WS-CHAR = ','
                   MOVE ' ' TO WS-CHAR
               END-IF
               IF WS-CHAR = ' '
                   IF WS-WORD-LEN > 0
                       ADD 1 TO WS-INDEX
                       MOVE WS-WORD TO WS-RESULT(WS-INDEX)
                       MOVE 0 TO WS-WORD-LEN
                   END-IF
               ELSE
                   ADD 1 TO WS-WORD-LEN
                   MOVE WS-CHAR TO WS-WORD(WS-WORD-LEN:1)
               END-IF
           END-PERFORM.

           IF WS-WORD-LEN > 0
               ADD 1 TO WS-INDEX
               MOVE WS-WORD TO WS-RESULT(WS-INDEX)
           END-IF.

           DISPLAY "Result: [".
           PERFORM VARYING WS-INDEX FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL WS-INDEX > WS-LEN
               IF WS-RESULT(WS-INDEX) NOT = SPACES
                   DISPLAY WS-RESULT(WS-INDEX)
               END-IF
           END-PERFORM.
           DISPLAY "]".

           GOBACK.
       END PROGRAM WORDS-STRING.

IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. CHOOSE-NUM.

       ENVIRONMENT DIVISION.
       
       INPUT-OUTPUT SECTION.

       DATA DIVISION.

       LINKAGE SECTION.

       01 LINKED-ITEMS.
           05 L-X PIC S9(10).
           05 L-Y PIC S9(10).
           05 RESULT PIC S9(10).



       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       
       PROCEDURE DIVISION USING LINKED-ITEMS.
           IF L-X > L-Y
               MOVE -1 TO RESULT
           ELSE
               IF FUNCTION MOD(L-Y, 2) = 0
                   MOVE L-Y TO RESULT
               ELSE
                   IF L-X = L-Y
                       MOVE -1 TO RESULT
                   ELSE
                       SUBTRACT 1 FROM L-Y GIVING RESULT
                   END-IF
               END-IF
           END-IF
           GOBACK.
       END PROGRAM CHOOSE-NUM.

IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. ROUNDED-AVG.

       ENVIRONMENT DIVISION.
       
       INPUT-OUTPUT SECTION.

       DATA DIVISION.

       LINKAGE SECTION.

       01 LINKED-ITEMS.
           05 L-N PIC S9(10).
           05 L-M PIC S9(10).
           05 RESULT PIC X(100).



       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       
       01 WS-N PIC S9(10).
       01 WS-M PIC S9(10).
       01 WS-SUM PIC S9(10).
       01 WS-AVG PIC S9(10).
       01 WS-BINARY PIC X(100).
       01 WS-INDEX PIC 9(3) VALUE 1.
       01 WS-REMAINDER PIC 9(1).
       01 WS-TEMP PIC S9(10).
       01 WS-RESULT PIC X(100).

       PROCEDURE DIVISION USING LINKED-ITEMS.
       MAIN-PROCEDURE.
           MOVE L-N TO WS-N.
           MOVE L-M TO WS-M.

           IF WS-N > WS-M
               MOVE "-1" TO WS-RESULT
           ELSE
               COMPUTE WS-SUM = WS-N + WS-M
               COMPUTE WS-AVG = FUNCTION INTEGER(WS-SUM / 2)
               MOVE WS-AVG TO WS-TEMP

               PERFORM UNTIL WS-TEMP = 0
                   COMPUTE WS-REMAINDER = FUNCTION MOD(WS-TEMP, 2)
                   IF WS-REMAINDER = 1
                       MOVE "1" TO WS-BINARY(WS-INDEX:1)
                   ELSE
                       MOVE "0" TO WS-BINARY(WS-INDEX:1)
                   END-IF
                   COMPUTE WS-TEMP = WS-TEMP / 2
                   ADD 1 TO WS-INDEX
               END-PERFORM

               MOVE WS-BINARY(1:WS-INDEX - 1) TO WS-RESULT
           END-IF.

           MOVE WS-RESULT TO RESULT.
           GOBACK.
       END PROGRAM ROUNDED-AVG.

IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. UNIQUE-DIGITS.

       ENVIRONMENT DIVISION.
       
       INPUT-OUTPUT SECTION.

       DATA DIVISION.

       LINKAGE SECTION.

       01 LINKED-ITEMS.
           05 L-X OCCURS 4 TIMES INDEXED BY NI PIC S9(10).
           05 RESULT OCCURS 100 TIMES INDEXED BY NJ PIC S9(10).



       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       
       01 WS-ODD-DIGIT-ELEMENTS.
           05 WS-ODD-DIGIT-ELEMENT OCCURS 100 TIMES INDEXED BY OI PIC S9(10).
           05 WS-ODD-DIGIT-COUNT PIC 9(3) VALUE 0.

       01 WS-TEMP-STRING PIC X(10).
       01 WS-CHAR PIC X.
       01 WS-INDEX PIC 9(3).
       01 WS-RESULT-COUNT PIC 9(3) VALUE 0.

       PROCEDURE DIVISION USING LINKED-ITEMS.
       MAIN-LOGIC.
           PERFORM VARYING NI FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL NI > 4
               MOVE L-X(NI) TO WS-TEMP-STRING
               MOVE 1 TO WS-INDEX
               MOVE 'Y' TO WS-CHAR
               PERFORM UNTIL WS-INDEX > FUNCTION LENGTH(WS-TEMP-STRING)
                   MOVE WS-TEMP-STRING(WS-INDEX:1) TO WS-CHAR
                   IF FUNCTION NUMVAL(WS-CHAR) MOD 2 = 0
                       MOVE 'N' TO WS-CHAR
                       EXIT PERFORM
                   END-IF
                   ADD 1 TO WS-INDEX
               END-PERFORM
               IF WS-CHAR = 'Y'
                   ADD 1 TO WS-ODD-DIGIT-COUNT
                   MOVE L-X(NI) TO WS-ODD-DIGIT-ELEMENT(WS-ODD-DIGIT-COUNT)
               END-IF
           END-PERFORM

           PERFORM SORT-ODD-DIGIT-ELEMENTS

           MOVE WS-ODD-DIGIT-COUNT TO WS-RESULT-COUNT
           PERFORM VARYING NJ FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL NJ > WS-RESULT-COUNT
               MOVE WS-ODD-DIGIT-ELEMENT(NJ) TO RESULT(NJ)
           END-PERFORM

           GOBACK.

       SORT-ODD-DIGIT-ELEMENTS.
           PERFORM VARYING OI FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL OI >= WS-ODD-DIGIT-COUNT
               PERFORM VARYING OJ FROM OI BY 1 UNTIL OJ > WS-ODD-DIGIT-COUNT
                   IF WS-ODD-DIGIT-ELEMENT(OI) > WS-ODD-DIGIT-ELEMENT(OJ)
                       MOVE WS-ODD-DIGIT-ELEMENT(OI) TO WS-TEMP-STRING
                       MOVE WS-ODD-DIGIT-ELEMENT(OJ) TO WS-ODD-DIGIT-ELEMENT(OI)
                       MOVE WS-TEMP-STRING TO WS-ODD-DIGIT-ELEMENT(OJ)
                   END-IF
               END-PERFORM
           END-PERFORM
           EXIT.

       END PROGRAM UNIQUE-DIGITS.

IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. BY-LENGTH.

       ENVIRONMENT DIVISION.
       
       INPUT-OUTPUT SECTION.

       DATA DIVISION.

       LINKAGE SECTION.

       01 LINKED-ITEMS.
           05 L-ARR OCCURS 8 TIMES INDEXED BY NI PIC S9(10).
           05 RESULT OCCURS 100 TIMES INDEXED BY NJ PIC X(100).



       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       
       01 WS-ARR OCCURS 8 TIMES INDEXED BY I PIC S9(10).
       01 WS-RESULT OCCURS 100 TIMES INDEXED BY J PIC X(100).
       01 WS-COUNT PIC 9(3) VALUE 0.
       01 WS-TEMP PIC S9(10).
       01 WS-INDEX PIC 9(3).
       01 WS-START PIC 9(3).
       01 WS-END PIC 9(3).
       01 WS-STR PIC X(100).

       PROCEDURE DIVISION USING LINKED-ITEMS.
       MAIN-PROCEDURE.
           PERFORM INITIALIZE-ARRAY
           PERFORM SORT-ARRAY
           PERFORM REVERSE-ARRAY
           PERFORM CONVERT-TO-STRING
           PERFORM DISPLAY-RESULT
           GOBACK.

       INITIALIZE-ARRAY.
           MOVE 0 TO WS-COUNT
           PERFORM VARYING I FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL I > 8
               MOVE L-ARR(I) TO WS-ARR(I)
               IF L-ARR(I) NOT = 0
                   ADD 1 TO WS-COUNT
               END-IF
           END-PERFORM.

       SORT-ARRAY.
           PERFORM VARYING I FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL I > WS-COUNT
               MOVE I TO WS-START
               ADD 1 TO WS-START
               PERFORM VARYING J FROM WS-START BY 1 UNTIL J > WS-COUNT
                   IF WS-ARR(I) < WS-ARR(J)
                       MOVE WS-ARR(I) TO WS-TEMP
                       MOVE WS-ARR(J) TO WS-ARR(I)
                       MOVE WS-TEMP TO WS-ARR(J)
                   END-IF
               END-PERFORM
           END-PERFORM.

       REVERSE-ARRAY.
           MOVE 1 TO WS-START
           MOVE WS-COUNT TO WS-END
           PERFORM UNTIL WS-START >= WS-END
               MOVE WS-ARR(WS-START) TO WS-TEMP
               MOVE WS-ARR(WS-END) TO WS-ARR(WS-START)
               MOVE WS-TEMP TO WS-ARR(WS-END)
               ADD 1 TO WS-START
               SUBTRACT 1 FROM WS-END
           END-PERFORM.

       CONVERT-TO-STRING.
           MOVE 0 TO WS-COUNT
           PERFORM VARYING I FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL I > 8
               IF WS-ARR(I) >= 1 AND WS-ARR(I) <= 9
                   EVALUATE WS-ARR(I)
                       WHEN 1 MOVE "One" TO WS-STR
                       WHEN 2 MOVE "Two" TO WS-STR
                       WHEN 3 MOVE "Three" TO WS-STR
                       WHEN 4 MOVE "Four" TO WS-STR
                       WHEN 5 MOVE "Five" TO WS-STR
                       WHEN 6 MOVE "Six" TO WS-STR
                       WHEN 7 MOVE "Seven" TO WS-STR
                       WHEN 8 MOVE "Eight" TO WS-STR
                       WHEN 9 MOVE "Nine" TO WS-STR
                   END-EVALUATE
                   ADD 1 TO WS-COUNT
                   MOVE WS-STR TO WS-RESULT(WS-COUNT)
               END-IF
           END-PERFORM.

       DISPLAY-RESULT.
           PERFORM VARYING J FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL J > WS-COUNT
               DISPLAY WS-RESULT(J)
           END-PERFORM.

       END PROGRAM BY-LENGTH.

       01 WS-RESULT OCCURS 100 TIMES INDEXED BY WS-INDEX-RESULT PIC S9(10).

       PROCEDURE DIVISION USING LINKED-ITEMS.
       MAIN-LOGIC.
           MOVE 1 TO WS-INDEX
           PERFORM UNTIL WS-INDEX > L-N
               IF FUNCTION MOD(WS-INDEX, 2) = 0
                   MOVE 1 TO WS-VALUE
                   MOVE 1 TO WS-TEMP
                   PERFORM UNTIL WS-TEMP > WS-INDEX
                       MULTIPLY WS-VALUE BY WS-TEMP GIVING WS-VALUE
                       ADD 1 TO WS-TEMP
                   END-PERFORM
                   MOVE WS-VALUE TO WS-RESULT(WS-INDEX)
               ELSE
                   MOVE 0 TO WS-VALUE
                   MOVE 1 TO WS-TEMP
                   PERFORM UNTIL WS-TEMP > WS-INDEX
                       ADD WS-TEMP TO WS-VALUE GIVING WS-VALUE
                       ADD 1 TO WS-TEMP
                   END-PERFORM
                   MOVE WS-VALUE TO WS-RESULT(WS-INDEX)
               END-IF
               ADD 1 TO WS-INDEX
           END-PERFORM
           MOVE WS-RESULT TO RESULT
           GOBACK.
       END PROGRAM F.

IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. COUNT-NUMS.

       ENVIRONMENT DIVISION.
       
       INPUT-OUTPUT SECTION.

       DATA DIVISION.

       LINKAGE SECTION.

       01 LINKED-ITEMS.
           05 L-ARR OCCURS 3 TIMES INDEXED BY NI PIC S9(10).
           05 RESULT PIC S9(10).



       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       01 WS-COUNT PIC S9(10) VALUE 0.
       01 WS-NEG PIC S9(10) VALUE 1.
       01 WS-DIGITS OCCURS 10 TIMES INDEXED BY DI PIC S9(10).
       01 WS-NUM PIC S9(10).
       01 WS-SUM PIC S9(10) VALUE 0.
       01 WS-INDEX PIC S9(10).
       01 WS-TEMP PIC S9(10).
       01 WS-STR PIC X(10).
       01 WS-CHAR PIC X(1).
       01 WS-LEN PIC S9(10).

       PROCEDURE DIVISION USING LINKED-ITEMS.
       MAIN-LOGIC.
           PERFORM VARYING NI FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL NI > 3
               MOVE L-ARR(NI) TO WS-NUM
               IF WS-NUM < 0
                   MOVE -1 TO WS-NEG
                   COMPUTE WS-NUM = -WS-NUM
               ELSE
                   MOVE 1 TO WS-NEG
               END-IF

               MOVE 0 TO WS-SUM
               MOVE 0 TO WS-INDEX
               MOVE FUNCTION NUMVAL-C(WS-NUM) TO WS-STR
               MOVE FUNCTION LENGTH(WS-STR) TO WS-LEN

               PERFORM VARYING DI FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL DI > WS-LEN
                   MOVE WS-STR(DI:1) TO WS-CHAR
                   MOVE FUNCTION NUMVAL(WS-CHAR) TO WS-TEMP
                   IF DI = 1
                       COMPUTE WS-TEMP = WS-TEMP * WS-NEG
                   END-IF
                   ADD WS-TEMP TO WS-SUM
               END-PERFORM

               IF WS-SUM > 0
                   ADD 1 TO WS-COUNT
               END-IF
           END-PERFORM

           MOVE WS-COUNT TO RESULT
           GOBACK.
       END PROGRAM COUNT-NUMS.

IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. MOVE-ONE-BALL.

       ENVIRONMENT DIVISION.
       
       INPUT-OUTPUT SECTION.

       DATA DIVISION.

       LINKAGE SECTION.

       01 LINKED-ITEMS.
           05 L-ARR OCCURS 5 TIMES INDEXED BY NI PIC S9(10).
           05 RESULT PIC 9.

       WORKING-STISION.
       01 WS-ARR OCCURS 5 TIMES INDEXED BY I PIC S9(10).
       01 WS-SORTED-ARR OCCURS 5 TIMES INDEXED BY J PIC S9(10).
       01 WS-MY-ARR OCCURS 5 TIMES INDEXED BY K PIC S9(10).
       01 WS-ARR-SIZE PIC 9(2) VALUE 5.
       01 WS-MIN-VALUE PIC S9(10).
       01 WS-MIN-INDEX PIC 9(2).
       01 WS-RESULT PIC 9 VALUE 0.

       PROCEDURE DIVISION USING LINKED-ITEMS.
       MAIN-PROCEDURE.
           PERFORM INITIALIZE-ARRAY.
           PERFORM SORT-ARRAY.
           PERFORM FIND-MIN-VALUE.
           PERFORM CREATE-MY-ARR.
           PERFORM COMPARE-ARRAYS.
           MOVE WS-RESULT TO RESULT.
           GOBACK.

       INITIALIZE-ARRAY.
           PERFORM VARYING I FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL I > WS-ARR-SIZE
               MOVE L-ARR(I) TO WS-ARR(I)
           END-PERFORM.

       SORT-ARRAY.
           PERFORM VARYING I FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL I > WS-ARR-SIZE
               MOVE WS-ARR(I) TO WS-SORTED-ARR(I)
           END-PERFORM.
           PERFORM VARYING I FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL I > WS-ARR-SIZE
               PERFORM VARYING J FROM I BY 1 UNTIL J > WS-ARR-SIZE
                   IF WS-SORTED-ARR(I) > WS-SORTED-ARR(J)
                       MOVE WS-SORTED-ARR(I) TO WS-ARR(I)
                       MOVE WS-SORTED-ARR(J) TO WS-SORTED-ARR(I)
                       MOVE WS-ARR(I) TO WS-SORTED-ARR(J)
                   END-IF
               END-PERFORM
           END-PERFORM.

       FIND-MIN-VALUE.
           MOVE WS-ARR(1) TO WS-MIN-VALUE
           MOVE 1 TO WS-MIN-INDEX
           PERFORM VARYING I FROM 2 BY 1 UNTIL I > WS-ARR-SIZE
               IF WS-ARR(I) < WS-MIN-VALUE
                   MOVE WS-ARR(I) TO WS-MIN-VALUE
                   MOVE I TO WS-MIN-INDEX
               END-IF
           END-PERFORM.

       CREATE-MY-ARR.
           PERFORM VARYING I FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL I > WS-ARR-SIZE
               IF I >= WS-MIN-INDEX
                   MOVE WS-ARR(I) TO WS-MY-ARR(I - WS-MIN-INDEX + 1)
               ELSE
                   MOVE WS-ARR(I) TO WS-MY-ARR(WS-ARR-SIZE - WS-MIN-INDEX + I + 1)
               END-IF
           END-PERFORM.

       COMPARE-ARRAYS.
           PERFORM VARYING I FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL I > WS-ARR-SIZE
               IF WS-MY-ARR(I) NOT = WS-SORTED-ARR(I)
                   MOVE 0 TO WS-RESULT
                   EXIT PERFORM
               END-IF
           END-PERFORM.
           IF WS-RESULT = 0
               MOVE 0 TO WS-RESULT
           ELSE
               MOVE 1 TO WS-RESULT
           END-IF.

       END PROGRAM MOVE-ONE-BALL.

IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. EXCHANGE.

       ENVIRONMENT DIVISION.
       
       INPUT-OUTPUT SECTION.

       DATA DIVISION.

       LINKAGE SECTION.

       01 LINKED-ITEMS.
           05 L-LST1 OCCURS 4 TIMES INDEXED BY NI PIC S9(10).
           05 L-LST2 OCCURS 4 TIMES INDEXED BY NJ PIC S9(10).
           05 RESULT PIC X(100).



       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       
       01 WS-ODD-COUNT PIC S9(10) VALUE 0.
       01 WS-EVEN-COUNT PIC S9(10) VALUE 0.
       01 WS-INDEX PIC S9(10) VALUE 0.
       01 WS-RESULT PIC X(100) VALUE SPACES.

       PROCEDURE DIVISION USING LINKED-ITEMS.
       MAIN-LOGIC.
           PERFORM VARYING WS-INDEX FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL WS-INDEX > 4
               IF FUNCTION MOD(L-LST1(WS-INDEX), 2) = 1
                   ADD 1 TO WS-ODD-COUNT
               END-IF
           END-PERFORM

           PERFORM VARYING WS-INDEX FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL WS-INDEX > 4
               IF FUNCTION MOD(L-LST2(WS-INDEX), 2) = 0
                   ADD 1 TO WS-EVEN-COUNT
               END-IF
           END-PERFORM

           IF WS-EVEN-COUNT >= WS-ODD-COUNT
               MOVE "YES" TO WS-RESULT
           ELSE
               MOVE "NO" TO WS-RESULT
           END-IF

           MOVE WS-RESULT TO RESULT
           GOBACK.
       END PROGRAM EXCHANGE.

IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. MINSUBARRAYSUM.

       ENVIRONMENT DIVISION.
       
       INPUT-OUTPUT SECTION.

       DATA DIVISION.

       LINKAGE SECTION.

       01 LINKED-ITEMS.
           05 L-NUMS OCCURS 6 TIMES INDEXED BY NI PIC S9(10).
           05 RESULT PIC S9(10).



       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       
       01 WS-MIN-SUM PIC S9(10) VALUE 9999999999.
       01 WS-SUM PIC S9(10) VALUE 0.
       01 WS-INDEX PIC 9(2) VALUE 1.

       PROCEDURE DIVISION USING LINKED-ITEMS.
       MAIN-LOGIC.
           PERFORM VARYING WS-INDEX FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL WS-INDEX > 6
               ADD L-NUMS(WS-INDEX) TO WS-SUM
               IF WS-MIN-SUM > WS-SUM
                   MOVE WS-SUM TO WS-MIN-SUM
               END-IF
               IF WS-SUM > 0
                   MOVE 0 TO WS-SUM
               END-IF
           END-PERFORM
           MOVE WS-MIN-SUM TO RESULT
           GOBACK.
       END PROGRAM MINSUBARRAYSUM.
