IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. GET-CLOSEST-VOWEL.

       ENVIRONMENT DIVISION.
       
       INPUT-OUTPUT SECTION.

       DATA DIVISION.

       LINKAGE SECTION.

       01 LINKED-ITEMS.
           05 L-WORD PIC X(100).
           05 RESULT PIC X(100).



       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       01 WS-WORD PIC X(100).
       01 WS-RESULT PIC X(100) VALUE SPACES.
       01 WS-LENGTH PIC 9(3) VALUE 0.
       01 WS-VOWELS PIC X(10) VALUE "aeiouAEIOU".
       01 WS-INDEX PIC 9(3) VALUE 0.
       01 WS-CHAR PIC X(1).
       01 WS-PREV-CHAR PIC X(1).
       01 WS-NEXT-CHAR PIC X(1).
       01 WS-VOWEL-FLAG PIC X(1) VALUE "N".
       01 WS-CONSONANT-FLAG PIC X(1) VALUE "N".

       PROCEDURE DIVISION USING LINKED-ITEMS.
       MAIN-LOGIC.
           MOVE L-WORD TO WS-WORD.
           MOVE FUNCTION LENGTH(WS-WORD) TO WS-LENGTH.

           IF WS-LENGTH < 3
               MOVE SPACES TO WS-RESULT
           ELSE
               PERFORM VARYING WS-INDEX FROM WS-LENGTH - 1 BY -1
                   UNTIL WS-INDEX < 2
                   MOVE WS-WORD(WS-INDEX:1) TO WS-CHAR
                   MOVE WS-WORD(WS-INDEX - 1:1) TO WS-PREV-CHAR
                   MOVE WS-WORD(WS-INDEX + 1:1) TO WS-NEXT-CHAR

                   MOVE "N" TO WS-VOWEL-FLAG
                   MOVE "N" TO WS-CONSONANT-FLAG

                   INSPECT WS-VOWELS TALLYING WS-VOWEL-FLAG FOR ALL WS-CHAR
                   INSPECT WS-VOWELS TALLYING WS-CONSONANT-FLAG FOR ALL WS-PREV-CHAR
                   INSPECT WS-VOWELS TALLYING WS-CONSONANT-FLAG FOR ALL WS-NEXT-CHAR

                   IF WS-VOWEL-FLAG = "Y" AND WS-CONSONANT-FLAG = "N"
                       MOVE WS-CHAR TO WS-RESULT
                       EXIT PERFORM
                   END-IF
               END-PERFORM
           END-IF.

           MOVE WS-RESULT TO RESULT.
           GOBACK.
       END PROGRAM GET-CLOSEST-VOWEL.

IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. MATCH-PARENS.

       ENVIRONMENT DIVISION.
       
       INPUT-OUTPUT SECTION.

       DATA DIVISION.

       LINKAGE SECTION.

       01 LINKED-ITEMS.
           05 L-LST OCCURS 2 TIMES INDEXED BY NI PIC X(100).
           05 RESULT PIC X(100).



       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       
       01 WS-VAL PIC S9(9) COMP-4 VALUE 0.
       01 WS-INDEX PIC 9(4) COMP-4 VALUE 0.
       01 WS-STRING PIC X(200).
       01 WS-CHAR PIC X.
       01 WS-RESULT PIC X(100) VALUE "No".
       01 WS-CONCATENATED-STRINGS.
           05 WS-CONCAT-1 PIC X(200).
           05 WS-CONCAT-2 PIC X(200).

       PROCEDURE DIVISION USING LINKED-ITEMS.
       MAIN-PROCEDURE.
           MOVE L-LST(1) TO WS-CONCAT-1.
           STRING WS-CONCAT-1 DELIMITED BY SIZE
                  L-LST(2) DELIMITED BY SIZE
                  INTO WS-CONCAT-1
           END-STRING.

           MOVE L-LST(2) TO WS-CONCAT-2.
           STRING WS-CONCAT-2 DELIMITED BY SIZE
                  L-LST(1) DELIMITED BY SIZE
                  INTO WS-CONCAT-2
           END-STRING.

           PERFORM CHECK-STRING
           IF WS-RESULT = "Yes"
               EXIT PROGRAM
           END-IF.

           PERFORM CHECK-STRING
           IF WS-RESULT = "Yes"
               EXIT PROGRAM
           END-IF.

           MOVE "No" TO RESULT.
           EXIT PROGRAM.

       CHECK-STRING.
           MOVE 0 TO WS-VAL.
           MOVE 1 TO WS-INDEX.
           MOVE WS-CONCAT-1 TO WS-STRING.

           PERFORM VARYING WS-INDEX FROM 1 BY 1
               UNTIL WS-INDEX > FUNCTION LENGTH(WS-STRING)
               MOVE WS-STRING(WS-INDEX:1) TO WS-CHAR
               IF WS-CHAR = "("
                   ADD 1 TO WS-VAL
               ELSE
                   SUBTRACT 1 FROM WS-VAL
               END-IF
               IF WS-VAL < 0
                   EXIT PERFORM
               END-IF
           END-PERFORM.

           IF WS-VAL = 0
               MOVE "Yes" TO WS-RESULT
           END-IF.

           EXIT.

       END PROGRAM MATCH-PARENS.

IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. MAXIMUM.

       ENVIRONMENT DIVISION.
       
       INPUT-OUTPUT SECTION.

       DATA DIVISION.

       LINKAGE SECTION.

       01 LINKED-ITEMS.
           05 L-ARR OCCURS 3 TIMES INDEXED BY NI PIC S9(10).
           05 L-K PIC S9(10).
           05 RESULT OCCURS 100 TIMES INDEXED BY NJ PIC S9(10).



       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       
       01 WS-ARR OCCURS 100 TIMES INDEXED BY I PIC S9(10).
       01 WS-SORTED-ARR OCCURS 100 TIMES INDEXED BY J PIC S9(10).
       01 WS-RESULT OCCURS 100 TIMES INDEXED BY K PIC S9(10).
       01 WS-ARR-SIZE PIC S9(10) VALUE 0.
       01 WS-K PIC S9(10) VALUE 0.
       01 WS-TEMP PIC S9(10) VALUE 0.
       01 WS-START-INDEX PIC S9(10) VALUE 0.
       01 WS-END-INDEX PIC S9(10) VALUE 0.
       01 WS-RESULT-SIZE PIC S9(10) VALUE 0.

       PROCEDURE DIVISION USING LINKED-ITEMS.
       MAIN-PROCEDURE.
           MOVE L-K TO WS-K.
           MOVE 0 TO WS-ARR-SIZE.
           PERFORM VARYING I FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL I > 3
               MOVE L-ARR(I) TO WS-ARR(I)
               ADD 1 TO WS-ARR-SIZE
           END-PERFORM.

           IF WS-K = 0
               MOVE 0 TO WS-RESULT-SIZE
               GO TO END-PROGRAM
           END-IF.

           PERFORM SORT-ARRAY.

           COMPUTE WS-START-INDEX = WS-ARR-SIZE - WS-K + 1.
           COMPUTE WS-END-INDEX = WS-ARR-SIZE.

           MOVE 0 TO WS-RESULT-SIZE.
           PERFORM VARYING K FROM WS-START-INDEX BY 1 UNTIL K > WS-END-INDEX
               MOVE WS-SORTED-ARR(K) TO WS-RESULT(WS-RESULT-SIZE + 1)
               ADD 1 TO WS-RESULT-SIZE
           END-PERFORM.

           PERFORM VARYING K FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL K > WS-RESULT-SIZE
               MOVE WS-RESULT(K) TO RESULT(K)
           END-PERFORM.

           MOVE WS-RESULT-SIZE TO L-K.

       END-PROGRAM.
           STOP RUN.

       SORT-ARRAY.
           PERFORM VARYING I FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL I > WS-ARR-SIZE
               MOVE WS-ARR(I) TO WS-SORTED-ARR(I)
           END-PERFORM.

           PERFORM VARYING I FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL I > WS-ARR-SIZE - 1
               PERFORM VARYING J FROM I BY 1 UNTIL J > WS-ARR-SIZE
                   IF WS-SORTED-ARR(I) > WS-SORTED-ARR(J)
                       MOVE WS-SORTED-ARR(I) TO WS-TEMP
                       MOVE WS-SORTED-ARR(J) TO WS-SORTED-ARR(I)
                       MOVE WS-TEMP TO WS-SORTED-ARR(J)
                   END-IF
               END-PERFORM
           END-PERFORM.
       END PROGRAM MAXIMUM.

IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. SOLUTION.

       ENVIRONMENT DIVISION.
       
       INPUT-OUTPUT SECTION.

       DATA DIVISION.

       LINKAGE SECTION.

       01 LINKED-ITEMS.
           05 L-LST OCCURS 4 TIMES INDEXED BY NI PIC S9(10).
           05 RESULT PIC S9(10).



       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       
       01 WS-SUM PIC S9(10) VALUE 0.
       01 WS-INDEX PIC S9(10) VALUE 0.
       01 WS-ODD-FLAG PIC S9(10) VALUE 0.

       PROCEDURE DIVISION USING LINKED-ITEMS.
       MAIN-LOGIC.
           PERFORM VARYING WS-INDEX FROM 1 BY 2 UNTIL WS-INDEX > 4
               MOVE L-LST(WS-INDEX) TO WS-ODD-FLAG
               IF FUNCTION MOD(WS-ODD-FLAG, 2) = 1
                   ADD WS-ODD-FLAG TO WS-SUM
               END-IF
           END-PERFORM
           MOVE WS-SUM TO RESULT
           GOBACK.
       END PROGRAM SOLUTION.

IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. ADD-ELEMENTS.

       ENVIRONMENT DIVISION.
       
       INPUT-OUTPUT SECTION.

       DATA DIVISION.

       LINKAGE SECTION.

       01 LINKED-ITEMS.
           05 L-ARR OCCURS 9 TIMES INDEXED BY NI PIC S9(10).
           05 L-K PIC S9(10).
           05 RESULT PIC S9(10).



       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       
       01 WS-ARR OCCURS 9 TIMES INDEXED BY I PIC S9(10).
       01 WS-K PIC S9(10).
       01 WS-SUM PIC S9(10) VALUE 0.
       01 WS-ABS-VALUE PIC S9(10).
       01 WS-ABS-STRING PIC X(10).
       01 WS-ABS-LENGTH PIC S9(10).

       PROCEDURE DIVISION USING LINKED-ITEMS.
       MAIN-LOGIC.
           MOVE L-ARR TO WS-ARR.
           MOVE L-K TO WS-K.
           PERFORM VARYING I FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL I > WS-K
               MOVE WS-ARR(I) TO WS-ABS-VALUE
               IF WS-ABS-VALUE < 0
                   COMPUTE WS-ABS-VALUE = -WS-ABS-VALUE
               END-IF
               MOVE WS-ABS-VALUE TO WS-ABS-STRING
               INSPECT WS-ABS-STRING TALLYING WS-ABS-LENGTH FOR CHARACTERS
               IF WS-ABS-LENGTH <= 2
                   ADD WS-ARR(I) TO WS-SUM
               END-IF
           END-PERFORM.
           MOVE WS-SUM TO RESULT.
           GOBACK.
       END PROGRAM ADD-ELEMENTS.

IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. GET-ODD-COLLATZ.

       ENVIRONMENT DIVISION.
       
       INPUT-OUTPUT SECTION.

       DATA DIVISION.

       LINKAGE SECTION.

       01 LINKED-ITEMS.
           05 L-N PIC S9(10).
           05 RESULT OCCURS 100 TIMES INDEXED BY NI PIC S9(10).



       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       
       01 WS-ODD-COLLATZ.
           05 WS-ODD-COUNT PIC 9(3) VALUE 0.
           05 WS-ODD-VALUES OCCURS 100 TIMES INDEXED BY OI PIC S9(10).

       01 WS-N PIC S9(10).
       01 WS-TEMP PIC S9(10).
       01 WS-I PIC 9(3).
       01 WS-J PIC 9(3).
       01 WS-TEMP-VALUE PIC S9(10).

       PROCEDURE DIVISION USING LINKED-ITEMS.
       MAIN-LOGIC.
           MOVE L-N TO WS-N.
           IF FUNCTION MOD(WS-N, 2) = 1 THEN
               ADD 1 TO WS-ODD-COUNT
               MOVE WS-N TO WS-ODD-VALUES(WS-ODD-COUNT)
           END-IF.

           PERFORM UNTIL WS-N = 1
               IF FUNCTION MOD(WS-N, 2) = 0 THEN
                   COMPUTE WS-N = WS-N / 2
               ELSE
                   COMPUTE WS-N = WS-N * 3 + 1
               END-IF
               IF FUNCTION MOD(WS-N, 2) = 1 THEN
                   ADD 1 TO WS-ODD-COUNT
                   MOVE WS-N TO WS-ODD-VALUES(WS-ODD-COUNT)
               END-IF
           END-PERFORM.

           PERFORM SORT-ODD-COLLATZ.

           MOVE WS-ODD-COUNT TO RESULT(1).
           PERFORM VARYING WS-I FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL WS-I > WS-ODD-COUNT
               MOVE WS-ODD-VALUES(WS-I) TO RESULT(WS-I + 1)
           END-PERFORM.

           GOBACK.

       SORT-ODD-COLLATZ.
           PERFORM VARYING WS-I FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL WS-I >= WS-ODD-COUNT
               PERFORM VARYING WS-J FROM WS-I BY 1 UNTIL WS-J > WS-ODD-COUNT
                   IF WS-ODD-VALUES(WS-I) > WS-ODD-VALUES(WS-J) THEN
                       MOVE WS-ODD-VALUES(WS-I) TO WS-TEMP-VALUE
                       MOVE WS-ODD-VALUES(WS-J) TO WS-ODD-VALUES(WS-I)
                       MOVE WS-TEMP-VALUE TO WS-ODD-VALUES(WS-J)
                   END-IF
               END-PERFORM
           END-PERFORM.
           EXIT.

       END PROGRAM GET-ODD-COLLATZ.

IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. VALID-DATE.

       ENVIRONMENT DIVISION.
       
       INPUT-OUTPUT SECTION.

       DATA DIVISION.

       LINKAGE SECTION.

       01 LINKED-ITEMS.
           05 L-DATE PIC X(100).
           05 RESULT PIC 9.

       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.

       01 WS-DATE PIC X(100).
       01 WS-MONTH PIC 99.
       01 WS-DAY PIC 99.
       01 WS-YEAR PIC 9(4).
       01 WS-VALID PIC 9 VALUE 1.

       PROCEDURE DIVISION USING LINKED-ITEMS.
       MAIN-LOGIC.
           MOVE L-DATE TO WS-DATE
           IF WS-DATE = SPACES
               MOVE 0 TO WS-VALID
           ELSE
               UNSTRING WS-DATE DELIMITED BY "-" INTO WS-MONTH WS-DAY WS-YEAR
               IF WS-MONTH < 1 OR WS-MONTH > 12
                   MOVE 0 TO WS-VALID
               ELSE
                   IF WS-MONTH = 2 AND (WS-DAY < 1 OR WS-DAY > 29)
                       MOVE 0 TO WS-VALID
                   ELSE
                       IF (WS-MONTH = 1 OR WS-MONTH = 3 OR WS-MONTH = 5 OR WS-MONTH = 7 OR WS-MONTH = 8 OR WS-MONTH = 10 OR WS-MONTH = 12) AND (WS-DAY < 1 OR WS-DAY > 31)
                           MOVE 0 TO WS-VALID
                       ELSE
                           IF (WS-MONTH = 4 OR WS-MONTH = 6 OR WS-MONTH = 9 OR WS-MONTH = 11) AND (WS-DAY < 1 OR WS-DAY > 30)
                               MOVE 0 TO WS-VALID
                           END-IF
                       END-IF
                   END-IF
               END-IF
           END-IF
           MOVE WS-VALID TO RESULT
           GOBACK.
       END PROGRAM VALID-DATE.

IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. IS-SORTED.

       ENVIRONMENT DIVISION.
       
       INPUT-OUTPUT SECTION.

       DATA DIVISION.

       LINKAGE SECTION.

       01 LINKED-ITEMS.
           05 L-LST OCCURS 5 TIMES INDEXED BY NI PIC S9(10).
           05 RESULT PIC 9.

       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.

       01 WS-LST OCCURS 5 TIMES INDEXED BY I PIC S9(10).
       01 WS-SORTED-LST OCCURS 5 TIMES INDEXED BY J PIC S9(10).
       01 WS-RESULT PIC 9 VALUE 1.
       01 WS-INDEX PIC 9(2) VALUE 1.
       01 WS-COUNT PIC 9(2) VALUE 0.
       01 WS-TEMP PIC S9(10).

       PROCEDURE DIVISION USING LINKED-ITEMS.

       MAIN-PROCEDURE.
           PERFORM INITIALIZE-LISTS
           PERFORM SORT-LST
           PERFORM CHECK-SORTED
           PERFORM CHECK-DUPLICATES
           MOVE WS-RESULT TO RESULT
           GOBACK.

       INITIALIZE-LISTS.
           PERFORM VARYING I FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL I > 5
               MOVE L-LST(I) TO WS-LST(I)
               MOVE L-LST(I) TO WS-SORTED-LST(I)
           END-PERFORM.

       SORT-LST.
           PERFORM VARYING I FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL I > 5
               PERFORM VARYING J FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL J > 5
                   IF WS-SORTED-LST(I) > WS-SORTED-LST(J)
                       MOVE WS-SORTED-LST(I) TO WS-TEMP
                       MOVE WS-SORTED-LST(J) TO WS-SORTED-LST(I)
                       MOVE WS-TEMP TO WS-SORTED-LST(J)
                   END-IF
               END-PERFORM
           END-PERFORM.

       CHECK-SORTED.
           PERFORM VARYING I FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL I > 5
               IF WS-LST(I) NOT = WS-SORTED-LST(I)
                   MOVE 0 TO WS-RESULT
                   EXIT PERFORM
               END-IF
           END-PERFORM.

       CHECK-DUPLICATES.
           PERFORM VARYING I FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL I > 3
               IF WS-LST(I) = WS-LST(I + 1) AND WS-LST(I) = WS-LST(I + 2)
                   MOVE 0 TO WS-RESULT
                   EXIT PERFORM
               END-IF
           END-PERFORM.

       END PROGRAM IS-SORTED.

IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. INTERSECTION.

       ENVIRONMENT DIVISION.
       
       INPUT-OUTPUT SECTION.

       DATA DIVISION.

       LINKAGE SECTION.

       01 LINKED-ITEMS.
           05 L-INTERVAL1 OCCURS 100 TIMES INDEXED BY NI PIC S9(10).
           05 L-INTERVAL2 OCCURS 100 TIMES INDEXED BY NJ PIC S9(10).
           05 RESULT PIC X(100).



       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       
       01 WS-INTERVAL1.
           05 WS-START1 PIC S9(10).
           05 WS-END1 PIC S9(10).
       01 WS-INTERVAL2.
           05 WS-START2 PIC S9(10).
           05 WS-END2 PIC S9(10).
       01 WS-INTERSECTION.
           05 WS-LEFT PIC S9(10).
           05 WS-RIGHT PIC S9(10).
       01 WS-LENGTH PIC S9(10).
       01 WS-PRIME-FLAG PIC X(3) VALUE "NO".
       01 WS-I PIC S9(10).

       PROCEDURE DIVISION USING LINKED-ITEMS.
       MAIN-PROCEDURE.
           MOVE L-INTERVAL1(1) TO WS-START1.
           MOVE L-INTERVAL1(2) TO WS-END1.
           MOVE L-INTERVAL2(1) TO WS-START2.
           MOVE L-INTERVAL2(2) TO WS-END2.

           IF WS-START1 > WS-START2 THEN
               MOVE WS-START1 TO WS-LEFT
           ELSE
               MOVE WS-START2 TO WS-LEFT
           END-IF.

           IF WS-END1 < WS-END2 THEN
               MOVE WS-END1 TO WS-RIGHT
           ELSE
               MOVE WS-END2 TO WS-RIGHT
           END-IF.

           COMPUTE WS-LENGTH = WS-RIGHT - WS-LEFT.

           IF WS-LENGTH <= 0 THEN
               MOVE "NO" TO RESULT
           ELSE
               IF WS-LENGTH = 1 THEN
                   MOVE "NO" TO RESULT
               ELSE
                   IF WS-LENGTH = 2 THEN
                       MOVE "YES" TO RESULT
                   ELSE
                       PERFORM VARYING WS-I FROM 2 BY 1 UNTIL WS-I >= WS-LENGTH
                           IF FUNCTION MOD(WS-LENGTH, WS-I) = 0 THEN
                               MOVE "NO" TO RESULT
                               EXIT PERFORM
                           END-IF
                       END-PERFORM
                       IF RESULT = SPACES THEN
                           MOVE "YES" TO RESULT
                       END-IF
                   END-IF
               END-IF
           END-IF.

           DISPLAY RESULT.
           GOBACK.
       END PROGRAM INTERSECTION.

IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. PROD-SIGNS.

       ENVIRONMENT DIVISION.
       
       INPUT-OUTPUT SECTION.

       DATA DIVISION.

       LINKAGE SECTION.

       01 LINKED-ITEMS.
           05 L-ARR OCCURS 4 TIMES INDEXED BY NI PIC S9(10).
           05 RESULT PIC S9(10).



       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       
       01 WS-ARR OCCURS 4 TIMES INDEXED BY I PIC S9(10).
       01 WS-ARR-SIZE PIC 9(2) VALUE 4.
       01 WS-PROD PIC S9(10) VALUE 1.
       01 WS-SUM PIC S9(10) VALUE 0.
       01 WS-ZERO-FLAG PIC X VALUE 'N'.
       01 WS-NEG-COUNT PIC 9(2) VALUE 0.
       01 WS-INDEX PIC 9(2) VALUE 0.

       PROCEDURE DIVISION USING LINKED-ITEMS.
       MAIN-PROCEDURE.
           PERFORM INITIALIZE-ARRAY
           PERFORM CHECK-EMPTY-ARRAY
           PERFORM CHECK-ZERO-ARRAY
           PERFORM CALCULATE-NEG-COUNT
           PERFORM CALCULATE-PROD
           PERFORM CALCULATE-SUM
           PERFORM CALCULATE-RESULT
           DISPLAY "Result: " RESULT
           GOBACK.

       INITIALIZE-ARRAY.
           MOVE 1 TO WS-ARR(1)
           MOVE 2 TO WS-ARR(2)
           MOVE 2 TO WS-ARR(3)
           MOVE -4 TO WS-ARR(4).

       CHECK-EMPTY-ARRAY.
           IF WS-ARR-SIZE = 0
               MOVE 0 TO RESULT
               GOBACK.

       CHECK-ZERO-ARRAY.
           PERFORM VARYING I FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL I > WS-ARR-SIZE
               IF WS-ARR(I) = 0
                   MOVE 'Y' TO WS-ZERO-FLAG
                   EXIT PERFORM
               END-IF
           END-PERFORM
           IF WS-ZERO-FLAG = 'Y'
               MOVE 0 TO RESULT
               GOBACK.

       CALCULATE-NEG-COUNT.
           PERFORM VARYING I FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL I > WS-ARR-SIZE
               IF WS-ARR(I) < 0
                   ADD 1 TO WS-NEG-COUNT
               END-IF
           END-PERFORM.

       CALCULATE-PROD.
           IF FUNCTION MOD(WS-NEG-COUNT, 2) = 1
               MOVE -1 TO WS-PROD
           ELSE
               MOVE 1 TO WS-PROD
           END-IF.

       CALCULATE-SUM.
           PERFORM VARYING I FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL I > WS-ARR-SIZE
               ADD FUNCTION ABS(WS-ARR(I)) TO WS-SUM
           END-PERFORM.

       CALCULATE-RESULT.
           COMPUTE RESULT = WS-PROD * WS-SUM.

       END PROGRAM PROD-SIGNS.

IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. TRI.

       ENVIRONMENT DIVISION.
       
       INPUT-OUTPUT SECTION.

       DATA DIVISION.

       LINKAGE SECTION.

       01 LINKED-ITEMS.
           05 L-N PIC S9(10).
           05 RESULT OCCURS 100 TIMES INDEXED BY NI PIC S9(10).



       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       
       01 WS-INDEX PIC S9(10) VALUE 0.
       01 WS-TEMP PIC S9(10) VALUE 0.
       01 WS-RESULT OCCURS 100 TIMES INDEXED BY WS-INDEX.
           05 WS-RESULT-ITEM PIC S9(10).

       PROCEDURE DIVISION USING LINKED-ITEMS.
       MAIN-PROCEDURE.
           IF L-N = 0 THEN
               MOVE 1 TO WS-RESULT(1)
               MOVE 1 TO RESULT(1)
           ELSE
               MOVE 1 TO WS-RESULT(1)
               MOVE 3 TO WS-RESULT(2)
               PERFORM VARYING WS-INDEX FROM 3 BY 1 UNTIL WS-INDEX > L-N + 1
                   IF FUNCTION MOD(WS-INDEX, 2) = 0 THEN
                       COMPUTE WS-TEMP = WS-INDEX / 2 + 1
                       MOVE WS-TEMP TO WS-RESULT(WS-INDEX)
                   ELSE
                       COMPUTE WS-TEMP = WS-RESULT(WS-INDEX - 1) + WS-RESULT(WS-INDEX - 2) + (WS-INDEX + 3) / 2
                       MOVE WS-TEMP TO WS-RESULT(WS-INDEX)
                   END-IF
               END-PERFORM
               PERFORM VARYING WS-INDEX FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL WS-INDEX > L-N + 1
                   MOVE WS-RESULT(WS-INDEX) TO RESULT(WS-INDEX)
               END-PERFORM
           END-IF
           GOBACK.
       END PROGRAM TRI.

IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. DIGITS.

       ENVIRONMENT DIVISION.
       
       INPUT-OUTPUT SECTION.

       DATA DIVISION.

       LINKAGE SECTION.

       01 LINKED-ITEMS.
           05 L-N PIC S9(10).
           05 RESULT PIC S9(10).



       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       01 WS-PRODUCT PIC S9(10) VALUE 1.
       01 WS-ODD-COUNT PIC S9(10) VALUE 0.
       01 WS-DIGIT PIC S9(10).
       01 WS-N PIC S9(10).
       01 WS-TEMP PIC S9(10).
       01 WS-REMAINDER PIC S9(10).
       01 WS-INDEX PIC S9(10) VALUE 1.

       PROCEDURE DIVISION USING LINKED-ITEMS.
       MAIN-LOGIC.
           MOVE L-N TO WS-N.
           PERFORM UNTIL WS-N = 0
               DIVIDE WS-N BY 10 GIVING WS-TEMP REMAINDER WS-REMAINDER
               MOVE WS-REMAINDER TO WS-DIGIT
               IF FUNCTION MOD(WS-DIGIT, 2) = 1
                   MULTIPLY WS-PRODUCT BY WS-DIGIT GIVING WS-PRODUCT
                   ADD 1 TO WS-ODD-COUNT
               END-IF
               MOVE WS-TEMP TO WS-N
           END-PERFORM
           IF WS-ODD-COUNT = 0
               MOVE 0 TO RESULT
           ELSE
               MOVE WS-PRODUCT TO RESULT
           END-IF
           GOBACK.
       END PROGRAM DIGITS.

IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. IS-NESTED.

       ENVIRONMENT DIVISION.
       
       INPUT-OUTPUT SECTION.

       DATA DIVISION.

       LINKAGE SECTION.

       01 LINKED-ITEMS.
           05 L-STRING PIC X(100).
           05 RESULT PIC 9.

       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.

       01 WS-STRING PIC X(100).
       01 WS-LENGTH PIC 9(3) VALUE 0.
       01 WS-OPEN-COUNT PIC 9(3) VALUE 0.
       01 WS-CLOSE-COUNT PIC 9(3) VALUE 0.
       01 WS-OPEN-INDEXES OCCURS 100 TIMES PIC 9(3).
       01 WS-CLOSE-INDEXES OCCURS 100 TIMES PIC 9(3).
       01 WS-I PIC 9(3) VALUE 0.
       01 WS-J PIC 9(3) VALUE 0.
       01 WS-OPEN-INDEX PIC 9(3) VALUE 0.
       01 WS-CLOSE-INDEX PIC 9(3) VALUE 0.
       01 WS-NESTED PIC 9 VALUE 0.

       PROCEDURE DIVISION USING LINKED-ITEMS.

       MAIN-PROCEDURE.
           MOVE L-STRING TO WS-STRING.
           MOVE FUNCTION LENGTH(WS-STRING) TO WS-LENGTH.

           PERFORM VARYING WS-I FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL WS-I > WS-LENGTH
               IF WS-STRING(WS-I:1) = '['
                   ADD 1 TO WS-OPEN-COUNT
                   MOVE WS-I TO WS-OPEN-INDEXES(WS-OPEN-COUNT)
               ELSE
                   ADD 1 TO WS-CLOSE-COUNT
                   MOVE WS-I TO WS-CLOSE-INDEXES(WS-COUNT)
               END-IF
           END-PERFORM.

           PERFORM VARYING WS-J FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL WS-J > WS-CLOSE-COUNT
               MOVE WS-CLOSE-INDEXES(WS-J) TO WS-CLOSE-INDEX
               MOVE WS-OPEN-INDEXES(WS-J) TO WS-OPEN-INDEX
               IF WS-OPEN-INDEX < WS-CLOSE-INDEX
                   ADD 1 TO WS-NESTED
               END-IF
           END-PERFORM.

           IF WS-NESTED >= 2
               MOVE 1 TO RESULT
           ELSE
               MOVE 0 TO RESULT
           END-IF.

           GOBACK.
       END PROGRAM IS-NESTED.

IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. SUM-SQUARES.

       ENVIRONMENT DIVISION.
       
       INPUT-OUTPUT SECTION.

       DATA DIVISION.

       LINKAGE SECTION.

       01 LINKED-ITEMS.
           05 L-LST OCCURS 4 TIMES INDEXED BY NI COMP-2.
           05 RESULT PIC S9(10).



       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       
       01 WS-RESULT PIC S9(10) VALUE 0.
       01 WS-INDEX PIC 9(2) VALUE 1.
       01 WS-CEILED-VALUE PIC S9(10).
       01 WS-SQUARED-VALUE PIC S9(10).

       PROCEDURE DIVISION USING LINKED-ITEMS.
       MAIN-LOGIC.
           PERFORM VARYING WS-INDEX FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL WS-INDEX > 4
               COMPUTE WS-CEILED-VALUE = FUNCTION CEILING(L-LST(WS-INDEX))
               COMPUTE WS-SQUARED-VALUE = WS-CEILED-VALUE * WS-CEILED-VALUE
               ADD WS-SQUARED-VALUE TO WS-RESULT
           END-PERFORM
           MOVE WS-RESULT TO RESULT
           GOBACK.
       END PROGRAM SUM-SQUARES.

IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. IS-LAST-CHAR-LETTER.

       ENVIRONMENT DIVISION.
       
       INPUT-OUTPUT SECTION.

       DATA DIVISION.

       LINKAGE SECTION.

       01 LINKED-ITEMS.
           05 L-TXT PIC X(100).
           05 RESULT PIC 9.

       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       01 WS-WORDS.
           05 WS-WORD OCCURS 100 TIMES PIC X(100).
       01 WS-CHECK PIC X(100).
       01 WS-INDEX PIC 9(3) VALUE 1.
       01 WS-LEN PIC 9(3).
       01 WS-CHAR PIC X.
       01 WS-RESULT PIC 9 VALUE 0.

       PROCEDURE DIVISION USING LINKED-ITEMS.
       MAIN-LOGIC.
           MOVE L-TXT TO WS-CHECK.
           UNSTRING WS-CHECK DELIMITED BY SPACE INTO WS-WORD(WS-INDEX)
               WITH POINTER WS-INDEX
               UNTIL WS-INDEX > 100.
           MOVE WS-WORD(WS-INDEX - 1) TO WS-CHECK.
           MOVE FUNCTION LENGTH(WS-CHECK) TO WS-LEN.
           IF WS-LEN = 1
               MOVE WS-CHECK(1:1) TO WS-CHAR
               IF WS-CHAR >= 'A' AND WS-CHAR <= 'Z'
                   OR WS-CHAR >= 'a' AND WS-CHAR <= 'z'
                   MOVE 1 TO WS-RESULT
               END-IF
           END-IF.
           MOVE WS-RESULT TO RESULT.
           GOBACK.
       END PROGRAM IS-LAST-CHAR-LETTER.

IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. CAN-ARRANGE.

       ENVIRONMENT DIVISION.
       
       INPUT-OUTPUT SECTION.

       DATA DIVISION.

       LINKAGE SECTION.

       01 LINKED-ITEMS.
           05 L-ARR OCCURS 5 TIMES INDEXED BY NI PIC S9(10).
           05 RESULT PIC S9(10).



       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       
       01 WS-INDEX PIC S9(10) VALUE -1.
       01 WS-I PIC S9(10) VALUE 1.
       01 WS-ARR OCCURS 5 TIMES INDEXED BY I PIC S9(10).

       PROCEDURE DIVISION USING LINKED-ITEMS.
       MAIN-LOGIC.
           PERFORM VARYING WS-I FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL WS-I > 5
               MOVE L-ARR(WS-I) TO WS-ARR(WS-I)
           END-PERFORM
           PERFORM VARYING WS-I FROM 2 BY 1 UNTIL WS-I > 5
               IF WS-ARR(WS-I) < WS-ARR(WS-I - 1)
                   MOVE WS-I TO WS-INDEX
               END-IF
           END-PERFORM
           MOVE WS-INDEX TO RESULT
           GOBACK.
       END PROGRAM CAN-ARRANGE.

IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. IS-EQUAL-TO-SUM-EVEN.

       ENVIRONMENT DIVISION.
       
       INPUT-OUTPUT SECTION.

       DATA DIVISION.

       LINKAGE SECTION.

       01 LINKED-ITEMS.
           05 L-N PIC S9(10).
           05 RESULT PIC 9.

       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       
       PROCEDURE DIVISION USING LINKED-ITEMS.
           IF FUNCTION MOD(L-N, 2) = 0 AND L-N >= 8 THEN
               MOVE 1 TO RESULT
           ELSE
               MOVE 0 TO RESULT
           END-IF.
           GOBACK.
       END PROGRAM IS-EQUAL-TO-SUM-EVEN.

IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. SPECIAL-FACTORIAL.

       ENVIRONMENT DIVISION.
       
       INPUT-OUTPUT SECTION.

       DATA DIVISION.

       LINKAGE SECTION.

       01 LINKED-ITEMS.
           05 L-N PIC S9(10).
           05 RESULT PIC S9(10).



       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       
       01 WS-FACTORIAL-I PIC S9(10) VALUE 1.
       01 WS-SPECIAL-FACTORIAL PIC S9(10) VALUE 1.
       01 WS-I PIC S9(10) VALUE 1.

       PROCEDURE DIVISION USING LINKED-ITEMS.
       MAIN-LOGIC.
           PERFORM VARYING WS-I FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL WS-I > L-N
               MULTIPLY WS-I BY WS-FACTORIAL-I GIVING WS-FACTORIAL-I
               MULTIPLY WS-FACTORIAL-I BY WS-SPECIAL-FACTORIAL GIVING WS-SPECIAL-FACTORIAL
           END-PERFORM
           MOVE WS-SPECIAL-FACTORIAL TO RESULT
           GOBACK.
       END PROGRAM SPECIAL-FACTORIAL.

IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. FILE-NAME-CHECK.

       ENVIRONMENT DIVISION.
       
       INPUT-OUTPUT SECTION.

       DATA DIVISION.

       LINKAGE SECTION.

       01 LINKED-ITEMS.
           05 L-FILE-NAME PIC X(100).
           05 RESULT PIC X(100).



       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       
       01 WS-FILE-NAME PIC X(100).
       01 WS-RESULT PIC X(100).
       01 WS-EXTENSION PIC X(3).
       01 WS-NAME PIC X(100).
       01 WS-DOT-COUNT PIC 9(1) VALUE 0.
       01 WS-DIGIT-COUNT PIC 9(1) VALUE 0.
       01 WS-INDEX PIC 9(3) VALUE 0.
       01 WS-CHAR PIC X(1).
       01 WS-VALID-EXTENSIONS.
           05 WS-EXTENSION-1 PIC X(3) VALUE "txt".
           05 WS-EXTENSION-2 PIC X(3) VALUE "exe".
           05 WS-EXTENSION-3 PIC X(3) VALUE "dll".

       PROCEDURE DIVISION USING LINKED-ITEMS.
       MAIN-LOGIC.
           MOVE L-FILE-NAME TO WS-FILE-NAME.
           MOVE "No" TO WS-RESULT.

           PERFORM CHECK-VALIDITY.
           MOVE WS-RESULT TO RESULT.
           GOBACK.

       CHECK-VALIDITY.
           PERFORM SPLIT-FILE-NAME.
           IF WS-DOT-COUNT NOT = 1
               EXIT PARAGRAPH
           END-IF.

           IF WS-NAME = SPACES
               EXIT PARAGRAPH
           END-IF.

           IF WS-NAME(1:1) NOT = "A" AND WS-NAME(1:1) NOT = "B" AND WS-NAME(1:1) NOT = "C" AND WS-NAME(1:1) NOT = "D" AND WS-NAME(1:1) NOT = "E" AND WS-NAME(1:1) NOT = "F" AND WS-NAME(1:1) NOT = "G" AND WS-NAME(1:1) NOT = "H" AND WS-NAME(1:1) NOT = "I" AND WS-NAME(1:1) NOT = "J" AND WS-NAME(1:1) NOT = "K" AND WS-NAME(1-1) NOT = "L" AND WS-NAME(1:1) NOT = "M" AND WS-NAME(1:1) NOT = "N" AND WS-NAME(1:1) NOT = "O" AND WS-NAME(1:1) NOT = "P" AND WS-NAME(1:1) NOT = "Q" AND WS-NAME(1:1) NOT = "R" AND WS-NAME(1:1) NOT = "S" AND WS-NAME(1:1) NOT = "T" AND WS-NAME(1:1) NOT = "U" AND WS-NAME(1:1) NOT = "V" AND WS-NAME(1:1) NOT = "W" AND WS-NAME(1:1) NOT = "X" AND WS-NAME(1:1) NOT = "Y" AND WS-NAME(1:1) NOT = "Z" AND WS-NAME(1:1) NOT = "a" AND WS-NAME(1:1) NOT = "b" AND WS-NAME(1:1) NOT = "c" AND WS-NAME(1:1) NOT = "d" AND WS-NAME(1:1) NOT = "e" AND WS-NAME(1:1) NOT = "f" AND WS-NAME(1:1) NOT = "g" AND WS-NAME(1:1) NOT = "h" AND WS-NAME(1:1) NOT = "i" AND WS-NAME(1:1) NOT = "j" AND WS-NAME(1:1) NOT = "k" AND WS-NAME(1:1) NOT = "l" AND WS-NAME(1:1) NOT = "m" AND WS-NAME(1:1) NOT = "n" AND WS-NAME(1:1) NOT = "o" AND WS-NAME(1:1) NOT = "p" AND WS-NAME(1:1) NOT = "q" AND WS-NAME(1:1) NOT = "r" AND WS-NAME(1:1) NOT = "s" AND WS-NAME(1:1) NOT = "t" AND WS-NAME(1:1) NOT = "u" AND WS-NAME(1:1) NOT = "v" AND WS-NAME(1:1) NOT = "w" AND WS-NAME(1:1) NOT = "x" AND WS-NAME(1:1) NOT = "y" AND WS-NAME(1:1) NOT = "z"
               EXIT PARAGRAPH
           END-IF.

           IF WS-EXTENSION NOT = WS-EXTENSION-1 AND WS-EXTENSION NOT = WS-EXTENSION-2 AND WS-EXTENSION NOT = WS-EXTENSION-3
               EXIT PARAGRAPH
           END-IF.

           PERFORM COUNT-DIGITS.
           IF WS-DIGIT-COUNT > 3
               EXIT PARAGRAPH
           END-IF.

           MOVE "Yes" TO WS-RESULT.

       SPLIT-FILE-NAME.
           MOVE 0 TO WS-DOT-COUNT.
           MOVE SPACES TO WS-NAME.
           MOVE SPACES TO WS-EXTENSION.
           PERFORM VARYING WS-INDEX FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL WS-INDEX > LENGTH OF WS-FILE-NAME
               MOVE WS-FILE-NAME(WS-INDEX:1) TO WS-CHAR
               IF WS-CHAR = "."
                   ADD 1 TO WS-DOT-COUNT
                   IF WS-DOT-COUNT = 1
                       MOVE WS-FILE-NAME(1:WS-INDEX - 1) TO WS-NAME
                       MOVE WS-FILE-NAME(WS-INDEX + 1:LENGTH OF WS-FILE-NAME - WS-INDEX) TO WS-EXTENSION
                   END-IF
               END-IF
           END-PERFORM.

       COUNT-DIGITS.
           MOVE 0 TO WS-DIGIT-COUNT.
           PERFORM VARYING WS-INDEX FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL WS-INDEX > LENGTH OF WS-NAME
               MOVE WS-NAME(WS-INDEX:1) TO WS-CHAR
               IF WS-CHAR >= "0" AND WS-CHAR <= "9"
                   ADD 1 TO WS-DIGIT-COUNT
               END-IF
           END-PERFORM.

       END PROGRAM FILE-NAME-CHECK.

IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. WORDS-IN-SENTENCE.

       ENVIRONMENT DIVISION.
       
       INPUT-OUTPUT SECTION.

       DATA DIVISION.

       LINKAGE SECTION.

       01 LINKED-ITEMS.
           05 L-SENTENCE PIC X(100).
           05 RESULT PIC X(100).



       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       
       01 WS-SENTENCE PIC X(100).
       01 WS-RESULT PIC X(100) VALUE SPACES.
       01 WS-WORD PIC X(20).
       01 WS-WORD-LEN PIC 9(2).
       01 WS-FLAG PIC X VALUE 'T'.
       01 WS-I PIC 9(2).
       01 WS-INDEX PIC 9(3) VALUE 1.
       01 WS-SPACE-FOUND PIC X VALUE 'F'.
       01 WS-SPACE-INDEX PIC 9(3) VALUE 0.

       PROCEDURE DIVISION USING LINKED-ITEMS.
       MAIN-PROCEDURE.
           MOVE L-SENTENCE TO WS-SENTENCE.
           PERFORM VARYING WS-INDEX FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL WS-INDEX > 100
               IF WS-SENTENCE(WS-INDEX:1) = SPACE
                   MOVE WS-INDEX TO WS-SPACE-INDEX
                   MOVE 'T' TO WS-SPACE-FOUND
                   EXIT PERFORM
               END-IF
           END-PERFORM.

           IF WS-SPACE-FOUND = 'F'
               MOVE WS-SENTENCE TO WS-WORD
               MOVE FUNCTION LENGTH(WS-WORD) TO WS-WORD-LEN
               PERFORM CHECK-PRIME
               IF WS-FLAG = 'T'
                   STRING WS-WORD DELIMITED BY SIZE
                          INTO WS-RESULT
               END-IF
           ELSE
               PERFORM VARYING WS-INDEX FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL WS-INDEX > WS-SPACE-INDEX
                   MOVE WS-SENTENCE(WS-INDEX:1) TO WS-WORD(WS-INDEX:1)
               END-PERFORM
               MOVE FUNCTION LENGTH(WS-WORD) TO WS-WORD-LEN
               PERFORM CHECK-PRIME
               IF WS-FLAG = 'T'
                   STRING WS-WORD DELIMITED BY SIZE
                          INTO WS-RESULT
               END-IF
           END-IF.

           MOVE WS-RESULT TO RESULT.
           GOBACK.

       CHECK-PRIME.
           IF WS-WORD-LEN = 1
               MOVE 'F' TO WS-FLAG
           ELSE
               PERFORM VARYING WS-I FROM 2 BY 1 UNTIL WS-I >= WS-WORD-LEN
                   IF FUNCTION MOD(WS-WORD-LEN, WS-I) = 0
                       MOVE 'F' TO WS-FLAG
                       EXIT PERFORM
                   END-IF
               END-PERFORM
           END-IF.
           EXIT.

       END PROGRAM WORDS-IN-SENTENCE.

IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. SIMPLIFY.

       ENVIRONMENT DIVISION.
       
       INPUT-OUTPUT SECTION.

       DATA DIVISION.

       LINKAGE SECTION.

       01 LINKED-ITEMS.
           05 L-X PIC X(100).
           05 L-N PIC X(100).
           05 RESULT PIC 9.

       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.

       01 WS-NUMERATOR PIC S9(9) COMP-4.
       01 WS-DENOMINATOR PIC S9(9) COMP-4.
       01 WS-RESULT PIC 9.

       PROCEDURE DIVISION USING LINKED-ITEMS.
       MAIN-LOGIC.
           UNSTRING L-X DELIMITED BY "/" INTO WS-NUMERATOR WS-DENOMINATOR.
           UNSTRING L-N DELIMITED BY "/" INTO WS-NUMERATOR WS-DENOMINATOR.
           COMPUTE WS-NUMERATOR = WS-NUMERATOR * WS-NUMERATOR.
           COMPUTE WS-DENOMINATOR = WS-DENOMINATOR * WS-DENOMINATOR.
           IF WS-NUMERATOR / WS-DENOMINATOR * WS-DENOMINATOR = WS-NUMERATOR
               MOVE 1 TO WS-RESULT
           ELSE
               MOVE 0 TO WS-RESULT
           END-IF.
           MOVE WS-RESULT TO RESULT.
           GOBACK.
       END PROGRAM SIMPLIFY.

IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. SPECIALFILTER.

       ENVIRONMENT DIVISION.
       
       INPUT-OUTPUT SECTION.

       DATA DIVISION.

       LINKAGE SECTION.

       01 LINKED-ITEMS.
           05 L-NUMS OCCURS 6 TIMES INDEXED BY NI PIC S9(10).
           05 RESULT PIC S9(10).



       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       
       01 WS-COUNT PIC S9(10) VALUE 0.
       01 WS-ODD-DIGITS PIC X(5) VALUE "13579".
       01 WS-NUMBER-STRING PIC X(10).
       01 WS-FIRST-DIGIT PIC X.
       01 WS-LAST-DIGIT PIC X.
       01 WS-INDEX PIC 9(2) VALUE 0.

       PROCEDURE DIVISION USING LINKED-ITEMS.
       MAIN-LOGIC.
           PERFORM VARYING NI FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL NI > 6
               IF L-NUMS(NI) > 10
                   MOVE L-NUMS(NI) TO WS-NUMBER-STRING
                   MOVE WS-NUMBER-STRING(1:1) TO WS-FIRST-DIGIT
                   MOVE WS-NUMBER-STRING(LENGTH OF WS-NUMBER-STRING:1) TO WS-LAST-DIGIT
                   IF WS-ODD-DIGITS(1:1) = WS-FIRST-DIGIT OR WS-ODD-DIGITS(2:1) = WS-FIRST-DIGIT OR WS-ODD-DIGITS(3:1) = WS-FIRST-DIGIT OR WS-ODD-DIGITS(4:1) = WS-FIRST-DIGIT OR WS-ODD-DIGITS(5:1) = WS-FIRST-DIGIT
                       AND WS-ODD-DIGITS(1:1) = WS-LAST-DIGIT OR WS-ODD-DIGITS(2:1) = WS-LAST-DIGIT OR WS-ODD-DIGITS(3:1) = WS-LAST-DIGIT OR WS-ODD-DIGITS(4:1) = WS-LAST-DIGIT OR WS-ODD-DIGITS(5:1) = WS-LAST-DIGIT
                       ADD 1 TO WS-COUNT
                   END-IF
               END-IF
           END-PERFORM
           MOVE WS-COUNT TO RESULT
           GOBACK.
       END PROGRAM SPECIALFILTER.

IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. GET-MAX-TRIPLES.

       ENVIRONMENT DIVISION.
       
       INPUT-OUTPUT SECTION.

       DATA DIVISION.

       LINKAGE SECTION.

       01 LINKED-ITEMS.
           05 L-N PIC S9(10).
           05 RESULT PIC S9(10).



       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       01 WS-ARRAY.
           05 WS-ARRAY-ELEMENTS OCCURS 1000 TIMES.
               10 WS-ARRAY-VALUE PIC S9(10).
       01 WS-COUNT PIC S9(10) VALUE 0.
       01 WS-I PIC S9(10).
       01 WS-J PIC S9(10).
       01 WS-K PIC S9(10).
       01 WS-SUM PIC S9(10).

       PROCEDURE DIVISION USING LINKED-ITEMS.
       MAIN-LOGIC.
           PERFORM VARYING WS-I FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL WS-I > L-N
               COMPUTE WS-ARRAY-VALUE(WS-I) = WS-I * WS-I - WS-I + 1
           END-PERFORM

           PERFORM VARYING WS-I FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL WS-I > L-N
               PERFORM VARYING WS-J FROM WS-I + 1 BY 1 UNTIL WS-J > L-N
                   PERFORM VARYING WS-K FROM WS-J + 1 BY 1 UNTIL WS-K > L-N
                       COMPUTE WS-SUM = WS-ARRAY-VALUE(WS-I) + WS-ARRAY-VALUE(WS-J) + WS-ARRAY-VALUE(WS-K)
                       IF FUNCTION MOD(WS-SUM, 3) = 0
                           ADD 1 TO WS-COUNT
                       END-IF
                   END-PERFORM
               END-PERFORM
           END-PERFORM

           MOVE WS-COUNT TO RESULT
           GOBACK.
       END PROGRAM GET-MAX-TRIPLES.

IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. BF.

       ENVIRONMENT DIVISION.
       
       INPUT-OUTPUT SECTION.

       DATA DIVISION.

       LINKAGE SECTION.

       01 LINKED-ITEMS.
           05 L-PLANET1 PIC X(100).
           05 L-PLANET2 PIC X(100).
           05 RESULT OCCURS 100 TIMES INDEXED BY NI PIC X(100).



       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       01 PLANET-NAMES.
           05 PLANET-NAME OCCURS 8 TIMES INDEXED BY PI PIC X(100).
       01 PLANET1-INDEX PIC 9(3) VALUE 0.
       01 PLANET2-INDEX PIC 9(3) VALUE 0.
       01 RESULT-COUNT PIC 9(3) VALUE 0.
       01 I PIC 9(3) VALUE 0.
       01 J PIC 9(3) VALUE 0.
       01 TEMP-PLANET PIC X(100).
       01 FOUND-PLANET1 PIC X VALUE 'N'.
       01 FOUND-PLANET2 PIC X VALUE 'N'.

       PROCEDURE DIVISION USING LINKED-ITEMS.
       MAIN-PROCEDURE.
           MOVE "Mercury" TO PLANET-NAME(1).
           MOVE "Venus" TO PLANET-NAME(2).
           MOVE "Earth" TO PLANET-NAME(3).
           MOVE "Mars" TO PLANET-NAME(4).
           MOVE "Jupiter" TO PLANET-NAME(5).
           MOVE "Saturn" TO PLANET-NAME(6).
           MOVE "Uranus" TO PLANET-NAME(7).
           MOVE "Neptune" TO PLANET-PLANET1-INDEX = 0
       SET FOUND-PLANET1 TO 'N'
       SET FOUND-PLANET2 TO 'N'
       PERFORM VARYING I FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL I > 8
           IF PLANET-NAME(I) = L-PLANET1
               SET FOUND-PLANET1 TO 'Y'
               MOVE I TO PLANET1-INDEX
           END-IF
           IF PLANET-NAME(I) = L-PLANET2
               SET FOUND-PLANET2 TO 'Y'
               MOVE I TO PLANET2-INDEX
           END-IF
       END-PERFORM

       IF FOUND-PLANET1 = 'N' OR FOUND-PLANET2 = 'N' OR PLANET1-INDEX = PLANET2-INDEX
           MOVE 0 TO RESULT-COUNT
           GO TO END-PROGRAM
       END-IF

       IF PLANET1-INDEX < PLANET2-INDEX
           PERFORM VARYING I FROM PLANET1-INDEX + 1 BY 1 UNTIL I >= PLANET2-INDEX
               ADD 1 TO RESULT-COUNT
               MOVE PLANET-NAME(I) TO RESULT(RESULT-COUNT)
           END-PERFORM
       ELSE
           PERFORM VARYING I FROM PLANET2-INDEX + 1 BY 1 UNTIL I >= PLANET1-INDEX
               ADD 1 TO RESULT-COUNT
               MOVE PLANET-NAME(I) TO RESULT(RESULT-COUNT)
           END-PERFORM
       END-IF

       END-PROGRAM.
       GOBACK.
       END PROGRAM BF.

IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. X-OR-Y.

       ENVIRONMENT DIVISION.
       
       INPUT-OUTPUT SECTION.

       DATA DIVISION.

       LINKAGE SECTION.

       01 LINKED-ITEMS.
           05 L-N PIC S9(10).
           05 L-X PIC S9(10).
           05 L-Y PIC S9(10).
           05 RESULT PIC S9(10).



       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       
       01 WS-N PIC S9(10).
       01 WS-X PIC S9(10).
       01 WS-Y PIC S9(10).
       01 WS-RESULT PIC S9(10).
       01 WS-I PIC S9(10).

       PROCEDURE DIVISION USING LINKED-ITEMS.
       MAIN-LOGIC.
           MOVE L-N TO WS-N.
           MOVE L-X TO WS-X.
           MOVE L-Y TO WS-Y.

           IF WS-N = 1 THEN
               MOVE WS-Y TO WS-RESULT
           ELSE
               MOVE 2 TO WS-I
               PERFORM UNTIL WS-I >= WS-N
                   IF FUNCTION MOD(WS-N, WS-I) = 0 THEN
                       MOVE WS-Y TO WS-RESULT
                       EXIT PERFORM
                   END-IF
                   ADD 1 TO WS-I
               END-PERFORM
               IF WS-RESULT = 0 THEN
                   MOVE WS-X TO WS-RESULT
               END-IF
           END-IF.

           MOVE WS-RESULT TO RESULT.
           GOBACK.
       END PROGRAM X-OR-Y.

IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. COMPARE.

       ENVIRONMENT DIVISION.
       
       INPUT-OUTPUT SECTION.

       DATA DIVISION.

       LINKAGE SECTION.

       01 LINKED-ITEMS.
           05 L-GAME OCCURS 6 TIMES INDEXED BY NI PIC S9(10).
           05 L-GUESS OCCURS 6 TIMES INDEXED BY NJ PIC S9(10).
           05 RESULT OCCURS 100 TIMES INDEXED BY NK PIC S9(10).



       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       
       01 WS-INDEX PIC 9(2) VALUE 1.
       01 WS-LENGTH PIC 9(2) VALUE 6.
       01 WS-ABS-DIFF PIC S9(10).

       PROCEDURE DIVISION USING LINKED-ITEMS.
       MAIN-LOGIC.
           PERFORM VARYING WS-INDEX FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL WS-INDEX > WS-LENGTH
               COMPUTE WS-ABS-DIFF = FUNCTION ABS(L-GAME(WS-INDEX) - L-GUESS(WS-INDEX))
               MOVE WS-ABS-DIFF TO RESULT(WS-INDEX)
           END-PERFORM
           GOBACK.
       END PROGRAM COMPARE.

IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. STRONGEST-EXTENSION.

       ENVIRONMENT DIVISION.
       
       INPUT-OUTPUT SECTION.

       DATA DIVISION.

       LINKAGE SECTION.

       01 LINKED-ITEMS.
           05 L-CLASS-NAME PIC X(100).
           05 L-EXTENSIONS OCCURS 4 TIMES INDEXED BY NI PIC X(100).
           05 RESULT PIC X(100).



       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       
       01 WS-STRONG-EXTENSION PIC X(100) VALUE SPACES.
       01 WS-MY-VAL PIC S9(9) COMP-4 VALUE 0.
       01 WS-VAL PIC S9(9) COMP-4 VALUE 0.
       01 WS-CAP PIC S9(9) COMP-4 VALUE 0.
       01 WS-SM PIC S9(9) COMP-4 VALUE 0.
       01 WS-INDEX PIC 9(2) COMP-4 VALUE 0.
       01 WS-CHAR PIC X VALUE SPACES.
       01 WS-RESULT PIC X(200) VALUE SPACES.

       PROCEDURE DIVISION USING LINKED-ITEMS.
       MAIN-PROCEDURE.
           MOVE L-EXTENSIONS(1) TO WS-STRONG-EXTENSION
           PERFORM CALCULATE-VAL
           MOVE WS-VAL TO WS-MY-VAL

           PERFORM VARYING WS-INDEX FROM 2 BY 1 UNTIL WS-INDEX > 4
               MOVE L-EXTENSIONS(WS-INDEX) TO WS-STRONG-EXTENSION
               PERFORM CALCULATE-VAL
               IF WS-VAL > WS-MY-VAL
                   MOVE WS-STRONG-EXTENSION TO WS-STRONG-EXTENSION
                   MOVE WS-VAL TO WS-MY-VAL
               END-IF
           END-PERFORM

           STRING L-CLASS-NAME DELIMITED BY SIZE
                  "." DELIMITED BY SIZE
                  WS-STRONG-EXTENSION DELIMITED BY SIZE
                  INTO WS-RESULT
           END-STRING

           MOVE WS-RESULT TO RESULT
           GOBACK.

       CALCULATE-VAL.
           MOVE 0 TO WS-CAP
           MOVE 0 TO WS-SM
           PERFORM VARYING WS-INDEX FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL WS-INDEX > FUNCTION LENGTH(WS-STRONG-EXTENSION)
               MOVE WS-STRONG-EXTENSION(WS-INDEX:1) TO WS-CHAR
               IF WS-CHAR IS ALPHABETIC
                   IF WS-CHAR IS UPPER-CASE
                       ADD 1 TO WS-CAP
                   ELSE
                       ADD 1 TO WS-SM
                   END-IF
               END-IF
           END-PERFORM
           COMPUTE WS-VAL = WS-CAP - WS-SM
           EXIT.

       END PROGRAM STRONGEST-EXTENSION.

IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. CYCPATTERN-CHECK.

       ENVIRONMENT DIVISION.
       
       INPUT-OUTPUT SECTION.

       DATA DIVISION.

       LINKAGE SECTION.

       01 LINKED-ITEMS.
           05 L-A PIC X(100).
           05 L-B PIC X(100).
           05 RESULT PIC 9.

       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       01 WS-A PIC X(100).
       01 WS-B PIC X(100).
       01 WS-LEN-B PIC 9(3).
       01 WS-PAT PIC X(200).
       01 WS-INDEX-A PIC 9(3).
       01 WS-INDEX-B PIC 9(3).
       01 WS-INDEX-PAT PIC 9(3).
       01 WS-SUB-A PIC X(100).
       01 WS-SUB-PAT PIC X(100).
       01 WS-FOUND PIC 9 VALUE 0.

       PROCEDURE DIVISION USING LINKED-ITEMS.
       MAIN-LOGIC.
           MOVE L-A TO WS-A.
           MOVE L-B TO WS-B.
           MOVE FUNCTION LENGTH(WS-B) TO WS-LEN-B.
           STRING WS-B WS-B DELIMITED BY SIZE INTO WS-PAT.
           PERFORM VARYING WS-INDEX-A FROM 1 BY 1
               UNTIL WS-INDEX-A > FUNCTION LENGTH(WS-A) - WS-LEN-B + 1
               PERFORM VARYING WS-INDEX-B FROM 1 BY 1
                   UNTIL WS-INDEX-B > WS-LEN-B
                   MOVE WS-INDEX-A TO WS-INDEX-PAT
                   ADD WS-INDEX-B TO WS-INDEX-PAT
                   MOVE WS-A(WS-INDEX-A:WS-LEN-B) TO WS-SUB-A
                   MOVE WS-PAT(WS-INDEX-PAT:WS-LEN-B) TO WS-SUB-PAT
                   IF WS-SUB-A = WS-SUB-PAT
                       MOVE 1 TO WS-FOUND
                       EXIT PERFORM
                   END-IF
               END-PERFORM
               IF WS-FOUND = 1
                   EXIT PERFORM
               END-IF
           END-PERFORM
           MOVE WS-FOUND TO RESULT.
           GOBACK.
       END PROGRAM CYCPATTERN-CHECK.

IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. EVEN-ODD-COUNT.

       ENVIRONMENT DIVISION.
       
       INPUT-OUTPUT SECTION.

       DATA DIVISION.

       LINKAGE SECTION.

       01 LINKED-ITEMS.
           05 L-NUM PIC S9(10).
           05 RESULT OCCURS 100 TIMES INDEXED BY NI PIC S9(10).



       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       01 WS-EVEN-COUNT PIC S9(10) VALUE 0.
       01 WS-ODD-COUNT PIC S9(10) VALUE 0.
       01 WS-ABS-NUM PIC S9(10).
       01 WS-CHAR-ARRAY PIC X(10).
       01 WS-CHAR PIC X.
       01 WS-INDEX PIC 9(2) VALUE 1.

       PROCEDURE DIVISION USING LINKED-ITEMS.
       MAIN-LOGIC.
           MOVE L-NUM TO WS-ABS-NUM.
           IF WS-ABS-NUM < 0
               COMPUTE WS-ABS-NUM = -WS-ABS-NUM
           END-IF.

           MOVE FUNCTION NUMVAL-C (WS-ABS-NUM) TO WS-CHAR-ARRAY.

           PERFORM VARYING WS-INDEX FROM 1 BY 1
               UNTIL WS-INDEX > FUNCTION LENGTH (WS-CHAR-ARRAY)
               MOVE WS-CHAR-ARRAY (WS-INDEX:1) TO WS-CHAR
               IF FUNCTION NUMVAL (WS-CHAR) MOD 2 = 0
                   ADD 1 TO WS-EVEN-COUNT
               ELSE
                   ADD 1 TO WS-ODD-COUNT
               END-IF
           END-PERFORM.

           MOVE WS-EVEN-COUNT TO RESULT (1).
           MOVE WS-ODD-COUNT TO RESULT (2).

           GOBACK.
       END PROGRAM EVEN-ODD-COUNT.

IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. INT-TO-MINI-ROMAN.

       ENVIRONMENT DIVISION.
       
       INPUT-OUTPUT SECTION.

       DATA DIVISION.

       LINKAGE SECTION.

       01 LINKED-ITEMS.
           05 L-NUMBER PIC S9(10).
           05 RESULT PIC X(100).



       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       01 WS-NUMBER PIC S9(10).
       01 WS-RESULT PIC X(100) VALUE SPACES.
       01 WS-I PIC 9(2) VALUE 12.
       01 WS-DIV PIC 9(2).
       01 WS-INDEX PIC 9(2).
       01 WS-TEMP PIC X(100) VALUE SPACES.
       01 WS-TEMP-LEN PIC 9(3) VALUE 0.

       01 WS-NUM-ARRAY.
           05 WS-NUM-ITEM OCCURS 13 TIMES PIC S9(10).

       01 WS-SYM-ARRAY.
           05 WS-SYM-ITEM OCCURS 13 TIMES PIC X(10).

       PROCEDURE DIVISION USING LINKED-ITEMS.
       MAIN-PROCEDURE.
           MOVE L-NUMBER TO WS-NUMBER.
           MOVE SPACES TO WS-RESULT.
           MOVE 12 TO WS-I.

           PERFORM VARYING WS-I FROM 12 BY -1 UNTIL WS-I < 1
               COMPUTE WS-DIV = WS-NUMBER / WS-NUM-ITEM(WS-I)
               COMPUTE WS-NUMBER = FUNCTION MOD(WS-NUMBER, WS-NUM-ITEM(WS-I))
               PERFORM VARYING WS-INDEX FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL WS-INDEX > WS-DIV
                   STRING WS-RESULT DELIMITED BY SIZE
                          WS-SYM-ITEM(WS-I) DELIMITED BY SIZE
                          INTO WS-RESULT
               END-PERFORM
           END-PERFORM.

           MOVE FUNCTION LOWER-CASE(WS-RESULT) TO WS-TEMP.
           MOVE FUNCTION LENGTH(WS-TEMP) TO WS-TEMP-LEN.
           MOVE WS-TEMP(1:WS-TEMP-LEN) TO RESULT.

           GOBACK.
       END PROGRAM INT-TO-MINI-ROMAN.

IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. RIGHT-ANGLE-TRIANGLE.

       ENVIRONMENT DIVISION.
       
       INPUT-OUTPUT SECTION.

       DATA DIVISION.

       LINKAGE SECTION.

       01 LINKED-ITEMS.
           05 L-A PIC S9(10).
           05 L-B PIC S9(10).
           05 L-C PIC S9(10).
           05 RESULT PIC 9.

       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       01 WS-A PIC S9(10).
       01 WS-B PIC S9(10).
       01 WS-C PIC S9(10).
       01 WS-RESULT PIC 9.

       PROCEDURE DIVISION USING LINKED-ITEMS.
       MAIN-LOGIC.
           MOVE L-A TO WS-A.
           MOVE L-B TO WS-B.
           MOVE L-C TO WS-C.

           IF WS-A * WS-A = WS-B * WS-B + WS-C * WS-C
              OR WS-B * WS-B = WS-A * WS-A + WS-C * WS-C
              OR WS-C * WS-C = WS-A * WS-A + WS-B * WS-B
               MOVE 1 TO WS-RESULT
           ELSE
               MOVE 0 TO WS-RESULT
           END-IF.

           MOVE WS-RESULT TO RESULT.
           GOBACK.
       END PROGRAM RIGHT-ANGLE-TRIANGLE.

IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. EAT.

       ENVIRONMENT DIVISION.
       
       INPUT-OUTPUT SECTION.

       DATA DIVISION.

       LINKAGE SECTION.

       01 LINKED-ITEMS.
           05 L-NUMBER PIC S9(10).
           05 L-NEED PIC S9(10).
           05 L-REMAINING PIC S9(10).
           05 RESULT OCCURS 100 TIMES INDEXED BY NI PIC S9(10).



       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       
       01 WS-RESULT.
           05 WS-TOTAL-EATEN PIC S9(10).
           05 WS-REMAINING-CARROTS PIC S9(10).

       PROCEDURE DIVISION USING LINKED-ITEMS.
       MAIN-LOGIC.
           IF L-NEED <= L-REMAINING THEN
               COMPUTE WS-TOTAL-EATEN = L-NUMBER + L-NEED
               COMPUTE WS-REMAINING-CARROTS = L-REMAINING - L-NEED
           ELSE
               COMPUTE WS-TOTAL-EATEN = L-NUMBER + L-REMAINING
               MOVE 0 TO WS-REMAINING-CARROTS
           END-IF

           MOVE WS-TOTAL-EATEN TO RESULT(1)
           MOVE WS-REMAINING-CARROTS TO RESULT(2)

           GOBACK.
       END PROGRAM EAT.

IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. SOLVE.

       ENVIRONMENT DIVISION.
       
       INPUT-OUTPUT SECTION.

       DATA DIVISION.

       LINKAGE SECTION.

       01 LINKED-ITEMS.
           05 L-S PIC X(100).
           05 RESULT PIC X(100).



       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       01 WS-FLAG PIC X VALUE 'T'.
       01 WS-NEW-STRING PIC X(100) VALUE SPACES.
       01 WS-INDEX PIC 9(3) VALUE 1.
       01 WS-CHAR PIC X.
       01 WS-REVERSED-STRING PIC X(100) VALUE SPACES.
       01 WS-REVERSED-INDEX PIC 9(3) VALUE 100.

       PROCEDURE DIVISION USING LINKED-ITEMS.
       MAIN-LOGIC.
           MOVE L-S TO WS-NEW-STRING.
           PERFORM VARYING WS-INDEX FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL WS-INDEX > 100
               MOVE WS-NEW-STRING(WS-INDEX:1) TO WS-CHAR
               IF WS-CHAR >= 'A' AND WS-CHAR <= 'Z'
                   MOVE FUNCTION LOWER-CASE(WS-CHAR) TO WS-NEW-STRING(WS-INDEX:1)
                   MOVE 'F' TO WS-FLAG
               ELSE IF WS-CHAR >= 'a' AND WS-CHAR <= 'z'
                   MOVE FUNCTION UPPER-CASE(WS-CHAR) TO WS-NEW-STRING(WS-INDEX:1)
                   MOVE 'F' TO WS-FLAG
               ELSE
                   CONTINUE
               END-IF
           END-PERFORM.
           IF WS-FLAG = 'T'
               PERFORM REVERSE-STRING
           END-IF.
           MOVE WS-NEW-STRING TO RESULT.
           GOBACK.

       REVERSE-STRING.
           PERFORM VARYING WS-INDEX FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL WS-INDEX > 100
               MOVE WS-NEW-STRING(WS-INDEX:1) TO WS-REVERSED-STRING(WS-REVERSED-INDEX:1)
               SUBTRACT 1 FROM WS-REVERSED-INDEX
           END-PERFORM.
           MOVE WS-REVERSED-STRING TO WS-NEW-STRING.
           EXIT.

       END PROGRAM SOLVE.

IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. GENERATE-INTEGERS.

       ENVIRONMENT DIVISION.
       
       INPUT-OUTPUT SECTION.

       DATA DIVISION.

       LINKAGE SECTION.

       01 LINKED-ITEMS.
           05 L-A PIC S9(10).
           05 L-B PIC S9(10).
           05 RESULT OCCURS 100 TIMES INDEXED BY NI PIC S9(10).



       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       01 WS-LOWER PIC S9(10) VALUE 0.
       01 WS-UPPER PIC S9(10) VALUE 0.
       01 WS-INDEX PIC S9(10) VALUE 0.
       01 WS-COUNT PIC S9(10) VALUE 0.

       PROCEDURE DIVISION USING LINKED-ITEMS.
       MAIN-LOGIC.
           IF L-A < L-B THEN
               MOVE L-A TO WS-LOWER
               MOVE L-B TO WS-UPPER
           ELSE
               MOVE L-B TO WS-LOWER
               MOVE L-A TO WS-UPPER
           END-IF

           IF WS-LOWER < 2 THEN
               MOVE 2 TO WS-LOWER
           END-IF

           IF WS-UPPER > 8 THEN
               MOVE 8 TO WS-UPPER
           END-IF

           PERFORM VARYING WS-INDEX FROM WS-LOWER BY 2 UNTIL WS-INDEX > WS-UPPER
               ADD 1 TO WS-COUNT
               SET NI TO WS-COUNT
               MOVE WS-INDEX TO RESULT(NI)
           END-PERFORM

           DISPLAY "Result: "
           PERFORM VARYING WS-INDEX FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL WS-INDEX > WS-COUNT
               DISPLAY RESULT(WS-INDEX)
           END-PERFORM

           GOBACK.
       END PROGRAM GENERATE-INTEGERS.
